# Australia Workflow Data Fabric

- [Workflow Data Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/337116e5eece49adef97eae7edf7c07bc19e4c73.md) -- Increase the impact of your cross‑enterprise workflows by connecting any application or data. Connect people, processes, and apps to enhance the value of your ServiceNow investment.
  - [Workflow Data Fabric Home](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/565a64a6268676c6726c31b4c7810fdc56f3ffcc.md) -- Unify data from different systems into one consistent, governed layer. Package trusted, business-ready Data Products with built-in context and meaning. Simplify how teams discover, understand, and reuse data through the catalog.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/99bcabd89eb0b668f1fe4f3ceed436fe983947e5.md) -- Workflow Data Fabric Home is ServiceNow's unified data foundation that connects enterprise data where it lives, governs it through stable contracts, and makes it ready for workflows, analytics, and AI.
      - [Navigation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/762a92a19c8cd44c795a8593203af7f7215fa32c.md) -- Workflow Data Fabric Home provides a unified, guided experience for connecting, understanding, and using enterprise data to power workflows, analytics, and AI. Access the tools needed to build trusted data assets, govern them, and make them available for consumption.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fb6149802abd2fd1c29ee471f5fbe20c8dac0c04.md) -- Install Workflow Data Fabric Home and supporting applications to integrate data from multiple sources, unify it into a consistent structure, and make it available across UI, workflows, GenAI, agents, and processes.

Connectors move data, trigger actions, and automate tasks between platforms based on your workflow needs.

      - [ServiceNow MCP Registry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/45f479795721acaf34315fa57733d2813a791b41.md) -- Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables AI agents to connect to external systems and perform the required actions without any human intervention. ServiceNow MCP Registry is a private registry where large language models (LLMs), AI agents, and teams discover and connect to approved MCP servers, finding the best tool for every business problem, governed at every step. With these configurations, you can use any generative AI assistant to perform the required actions in ServiceNow.

Use the Data Catalog to search for data across multiple systems, view comprehensive metadata and relationships, track data lineage, and connect to data sources for analysis.

        - [Prepare to run the Microsoft SQL Server collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ee47ff9f6fd1e9996344beeb516597670849c8a.md) -- Configure authentication and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Set up NTLM authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ee47ff9f6fd1e9996344beeb516597670849c8a.md) -- Configure authentication and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Set up username and password authentication for SQL Server collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ee47ff9f6fd1e9996344beeb516597670849c8a.md) -- Configure authentication and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Set up Service Principal authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ee47ff9f6fd1e9996344beeb516597670849c8a.md) -- Configure authentication and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Set up permissions for harvesting SQL Server Agent jobs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ee47ff9f6fd1e9996344beeb516597670849c8a.md) -- Configure authentication and permissions before running the collector.
        - [Create a Microsoft SQL Server metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/990db500de6bf3533eec00b1f82651da26e5114f.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from Microsoft SQL Server.
      - [MongoDB metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fbd8a8e45c6b5611447c7ef8e414bae3c07fe266.md) -- MongoDB metadata collector provides read-only access to metadata from a MongoDB account.
        - [Prepare to run the MongoDB collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8f9e94bd2bd3dda047b6cd5cfda5e620efa224cd.md) -- Create a MongoDB user and configure authentication before running the collector.
        - [Create a MongoDB metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3cebe2e829e83e79d5d80e05535314325680682c.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from MongoDB.
      - [MySQL metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fe0c9756c867062f88b9aa872563fedfd4a314db.md) -- The MySQL metadata collector provides read-only access to metadata from an external MySQL database.
        - [Prepare to run the MySQL collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/18ecd8a067b8fcbf7768959a9e193bbcf8bf4bf2.md) -- Create a MySQL user and grant permissions before running the collector.
        - [Create a MySQL metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6bab0ebb30bd6da0a3b76b29a48f5cbf719dc260.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from MySQL.
      - [Oracle metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4c6ec034f7befcb60919e5d0be76ee40cc1648c7.md) -- The Oracle metadata collector provides read-only access to metadata from an external Oracle account.

          - [Set up user permissions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cfd68de43bd6df5c74b58c0c6306712e8bffe0b0.md) -- Set up database user permissions and configure advanced features before running the collector.
          - [Set up AWR permissions for lineage extraction](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cfd68de43bd6df5c74b58c0c6306712e8bffe0b0.md) -- Set up database user permissions and configure advanced features before running the collector.
          - [Prepare to harvest cross-server lineage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cfd68de43bd6df5c74b58c0c6306712e8bffe0b0.md) -- Set up database user permissions and configure advanced features before running the collector.
        - [Create an Oracle metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b04efc9a2280154e4c6e6bcefde9c10bdcdc7c48.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from Oracle.

        - [Create a PostgreSQL metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2b2c199cbcbf478752162249cee381e3ab638e59.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from PostgreSQL.
      - [PowerBI metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8dc6ee13a13c7c6b19ea147572567b370cec4622.md) -- The PowerBI metadata collector provides read-only access to metadata from a PowerBI account.
        - [Prepare to run the PowerBI collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3fd032f52474b905148acfb9682defa269312d86.md) -- Set up Azure application registration, authentication, and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Register Power BI application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/73783ed9b71b1cd0013f08a5df516e5f22993b22.md) -- Register an application in Azure and create client credentials for Power BI collector authentication.
          - [Configure Power BI service principal authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/567c7a999257563d9b4358dc9c04082376456ad6.md) -- Set up service principal authentication to enable Power BI metadata collection.
          - [Configure Power BI username and password authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2091460d86317356f10985b6ef820585dec04481.md) -- Set up API permissions for username and password authentication to enable Power BI metadata collection.
          - [Configure Power BI metadata scanning](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bf3097032ef5423b0fa426c661ba7ecafed07c78.md) -- Enable metadata scanning to access detailed data source information including tables and columns.
          - [Get Power BI tenant ID](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ed9492848a06213d6305e70f2bbb60cebe7c33a.md) -- Retrieve the tenant ID from the Power BI application.
          - [Configure Power BI report image harvesting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c40c13f1269680594a26bffaf7ef24ca90418a1f.md) -- Enable report image harvesting to collect preview images from Power BI reports.
          - [Configure Power BI lineage mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/796892c4ad76846139a27e40b76e2237e6277cef.md) -- Create a YAML file to map data sources for lineage harvesting.
        - [Create a PowerBI metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/985bc8ddff79eb9387cf242c41979cebf4793c08.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from PowerBI.
      - [ServiceNow metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e45cc2be634e47338713fdfb72348e9afe1b1179.md) -- Provides read-only access to metadata from a ServiceNow instance.
        - [Prepare to run the ServiceNow collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0d3333f8c507f603c44f6f1cf76edcd8bb6b297a.md) -- Create a ServiceNow user and configure permissions before running the collector.
        - [Create a ServiceNow metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/77376a3d53ce51a8e3e30a800fa344f8ecd08e1b.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from ServiceNow.
      - [Snowflake metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ea80a8c97155ad61d86f2874bbbee3631a9c0948.md) -- The Snowflake metadata collector provides read-only access to metadata from an external Snowflake account.
        - [Prepare to run the Snowflake collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/92236c1bca964562eafe0eaeeb87923018743bf4.md) -- Set up authentication and grant role permissions to enable Snowflake metadata collection.
        - [Create a Snowflake metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e0855c7e4460f0bc1eec9d9569be36c616137acb.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from Snowflake.
      - [Tableau metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b6c704977340154f75cf6e7803c4f2a64e44c652.md) -- Tableau metadata collector provides read-only access to metadata from a Tableau account.
        - [Prepare to run the Tableau collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05bab9df553d93d05025add13cbde3f66c88bf53.md) -- Set up API access, authentication, and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Enable Tableau Metadata API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05bab9df553d93d05025add13cbde3f66c88bf53.md) -- Set up API access, authentication, and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Configure Tableau user permissions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05bab9df553d93d05025add13cbde3f66c88bf53.md) -- Set up API access, authentication, and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Configure Tableau JWT authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05bab9df553d93d05025add13cbde3f66c88bf53.md) -- Set up API access, authentication, and permissions before running the collector.
          - [Set up a YAML file for hostnames mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05bab9df553d93d05025add13cbde3f66c88bf53.md) -- Set up API access, authentication, and permissions before running the collector.
        - [Create a Tableau metadata collector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e81bea69a5e666d19740787f4c0b44107855b9df.md) -- Create a collector to import metadata from Tableau.
    - [Running metadata collectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/951a2df81c4ba100ba8bb0bc89b65742cb4c698a.md) -- A metadata collector run harvests technical metadata from the connected data platform and updates the Data Catalog. Collectors can run on demand or on a defined schedule. Runtime logs record the status and details of each run.
      - [Run metadata collectors manually](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1fcee815107ad95414fa4ee6238609be1f04802e.md) -- Execute a metadata collector on-demand to import metadata immediately.
      - [Schedule metadata collector runs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a02edff347e29d171831cb12f4e063e1c8e7c81f.md) -- Schedule a metadata collector to run automatically at a specified frequency.
      - [View runtime logs for collector runs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8913c0979c449f5c462727e8c203dae1d8c1099a.md) -- Access execution logs and download detailed log files for metadata collector runs.
    - [Finding and accessing data assets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e613a1c4a4bb5a774df740992d0712e46c3a9799.md) -- The Data Catalog provides a searchable view of data assets collected from connected systems. You can find assets by keyword, tag, domain, or glossary term, view metadata and lineage, and request access to data products and data interfaces.
      - [Explore data assets in the data catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3dd06565882ef6ed73702c450f54b17f1629170e.md) -- Find and explore catalog assets through search, filtering, and browsing.
      - [View data asset details](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/beac79887c345c5ebc8e0b37d0f8d64779e55eb1.md) -- View comprehensive information about data assets on the asset detail page.
        - [Explore data asset relationships](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9ea9cd6a430831b6b37766560747a4504d802ca8.md) -- See the data assets, business terms, and governance objects connected to a data asset. Open the relationships view in Graph Explorer to expand, hide, and rearrange the graph.
        - [Explore data assets lineage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3de3abbd6ca33302a9906a12290bb71484d7c35e.md) -- Trace the upstream sources and downstream consumers of a data asset. Open the lineage view in Graph Explorer to examine specific relationships, focus on a path, and review related asset details.
      - [Request access to data assets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dcc012e30ac31caf7f2fc66258181c9a8ded25ac.md) -- Request access to data products and data interfaces in the Workflow Data Fabric to consume data for your workflows and applications.
    - [Governing the Data Catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3682e18eafa7f6429204198d71bcdefbad8e61ce.md) -- Data stewards add business context to catalog assets, making them more discoverable for catalog consumers. Governance tools include glossary terms, tags, domains, and direct asset updates.
      - [Update a data asset](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/110ee58303143c47fd536c77f9d806ffc46a4cb0.md) -- Edit catalog asset metadata to add business context, improve discoverability, and provide additional information.
      - [Create a glossary term](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5794a97b609fab34ad92f57aeb7e6e942092d9ad.md) -- Create glossary terms to define business concepts and provide context for data assets.
      - [Create catalog tags](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/040809ca490e44bfc92c8149736c0b75804390bf.md) -- Create tags that can be applied to data assets for classification and categorization.
      - [Create catalog domains](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/846f612e7083e4df1d708b11bcf53672ad5935e7.md) -- Organize data assets by creating hierarchical domain structures that represent business areas, departments, or data categories.
    - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6661eee37c9e13e74c8caa2bd8503af4cb561d5d.md) -- Reference topics provide information about roles and key terms.
      - [Data catalog key terms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bd0caa5a06a139b232c907d3388b98dff5e18fde.md) -- Key terms used in Data catalog.
      - [Data catalog roles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a9b57e327379eccbee5adb0e85e75193bc331cf3.md) -- Assign roles to specify what different users can see and do.
  - [Data Products](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05047cec0c8929d804914ef50d751f030fef5b7e.md) -- Create and manage data products and data interfaces to enable data sharing and consumption across your organization.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/111bbc71ce3f131859fbbaee26c0c57cfffacb58.md) -- Data products package data interfaces with metadata and governance to provide reusable, discoverable data for workflows, AI agents, and analytics.
      - [Data interfaces](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d869fe04dc7d2d824bbd164d623dbb1fdabebe9e.md) -- Data interfaces provide stable contracts for accessing data from single tables or combined sources through JOIN or UNION operations.
      - [Data products use cases](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b8ac3eece47d62de5501436b78c6ba41076e6a7e.md) -- Explore common scenarios for publishing data products and learn which pattern fits your data and your consumers' needs.
      - [Data products navigation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/26de5fc79e0951597795d1da055bfa99eaa90245.md) -- Navigate to four areas to build, publish, and manage data products from data ingestion through consumer access.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0ecb43902b0e984f620c66eec5213bb110fe205b.md) -- You can plan and configure a Data Products implementation in your organization.
      - [Install data products store application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e3f0554adb9a70fd2c5d56fc1713d9d8a76f263e.md) -- You can install the Data Products application (sn_data_product) if you have the admin role. The application include installs related ServiceNow Store applications and plugins if they are not already installed.
      - [Assign roles to data product users](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1b914061d9e202c800b137af1a684946150bb3f2.md) -- Assign roles to control access to features, capabilities, and data in data products.
      - [Prerequisites and setup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ccf31f5f6fc5ce2e95060916de343bec2ed300a0.md) -- Before creating data interfaces and data products, confirm that the required plugin is activated, roles are assigned, and external data sources are connected.
    - [Managing data interfaces](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f4516228001ed5ef9f401e700bc0793f7247e108.md) -- Create a data interface to control how source data is filtered, combined, and exposed to consumers as a stable, governed schema.
      - [Create a data interface from a single table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b6ad66687bdbb746ea4639677d66b56f4dbcedeb.md) -- Create a governed data interface on a single source table and publish it to the Data Catalog so consumers can access the data through a stable schema.
      - [Create a data interface using UNION](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5677c3df4a27091caaddccecff1410bdf1825ee5.md) -- Create a governed data interface that consolidates rows from two or more source tables with compatible schemas using UNION. Publish it to the Data Catalog so consumers can access an aggregated view through a stable schema.
      - [Create a data interface using JOIN](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/731bf5062cc1a44182366659c9ed35e6abb875dc.md) -- Create a governed data interface that combines rows from two or more source tables using an INNER JOIN and publish it to the Data Catalog. Consumers can access a unified view through a stable schema.
      - [Edit a data interface](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8484c4ec4746339fe4c9980f1ed1754634ca0512.md) -- Update a published data interface in place when source data or consumer requirements change, without unpublishing or recreating the interface.
    - [Managing data products](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8c17dbc397354b9be8bb61bad80676aeef6a9045.md) -- Create, publish, and promote data products to make governed data available to consumers in your organization.
      - [Create a data product](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f4457232bd38faca9f11992fe13fa677c4862e72.md) -- Create a data product to group one or more data interfaces into a governed, publishable collection that consumers can discover and access through the Data Catalog.
      - [Publish a data product](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/571f0752f823021ae529d662f3ca1fa6c88cd0b4.md) -- Publish a data product to make it available to consumers in the Data Catalog.
    - [Move data interfaces and data products to production](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f933a25704f0ddefc0f4a72389e00e4325290c02.md) -- Use a local update set to move data interfaces and data products from a subproduction instance to production.
    - [Review and approve data access requests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4b7195d63bbeaad0614c90423f8fa0a9b7a83497.md) -- Review and act on requests from consumers who need access to a data product or data interface.
  - [Automation Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a561f9642b795b9cc4b0ab478973deecbc806663.md) -- Use the ServiceNow Automation Center application to govern your end-to-end multi-vendor automation life cycles from one place. By using real-time dashboards, you can manage and measure the health of the automation and prevent automation failures across multiple vendors​.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/56f03539b0711139b4d27c3b9b88b6985c74d42e.md) -- Learn about the Automation Center application key features, architecture, and workspace.
      - [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f285216746dffbfd1d236989da6f75a4602d91a8.md) -- Learn about the Automation Center architecture.
      - [Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/492bc8318ec3c1ac6a6f9d312152c59cbcbb602d.md) -- Automation Center Workspace provides an overall view of the performance and value of the KPIs for existing automations, executions, and new automation requests.
        - [Overview dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7655b3352303780049ef791e2443f8d75ec46a14.md) -- The Automation Center Workspace landing page is the Overview dashboard, which contains basic score cards, lists, and reports.
        - [Executions dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7117f71339d4d4b9f4a25bf5231c76473b9e73bb.md) -- The Automation Center Executions dashboard helps you manage the health of automations in one central place. You can also​ import automation metrics and data from third-party providers regardless of the technology used.
        - [Value dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3acbd5ba3f24227fcf0a781c992512116d9d1d33.md) -- The Automation Center Value dashboard provides summary information about the states of goals and automations along with the actual and estimated cost and time saved for all active and future automations.
      - [Kanban board](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5efdabf8b23c99b2a350fe853f8701fc3037e5f0.md) -- The Automation Center Kanban board provides an easy access to view and manage automation requests and automation tasks.
        - [Manage automation requests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d5439177d6b8f1f76fcc759bfdc49baa756d364.md) -- Manage all automation requests from one location from the Request Board in the Automation Center Kanban board.
          - [Run fix script to view demo data on Kanban board](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7a138a70386d7ede87f0966e9b150827e52f1705.md) -- To view automation requests from the demo data in your Kanban board, you must run the fix script.
        - [Manage automation tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/752037d6ac131e59b60d244622a926796a5ed563.md) -- Manage all tasks associated with the automation requests from one location from the Task Board in the Automation Center Kanban board.
      - [Action Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8b1fee2d134461fc20bb854912ab721ce9abb104.md) -- Action Center provides an easy way to fix repeated issues that cause automations to fail in Automation Center.
      - [Connection Manager](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fc9653bdb190a4ca07ccb9bf8087db0b4a37a404.md) -- Connection Manager enables you to add data from a third-party tool into Automation Center tables by correctly mapping and testing the data import.
      - [Migration accelerator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c7cc9b790908a79547cde53cf04d7c7f6fd6650d.md) -- Migration accelerator enables seamless, low-effort, cost-efficient migration of UiPath automations to ServiceNow RPA Hub. It’s a solution that minimizes downtime, maximizes reuse, and accelerates time-to-value.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/491e6f22a4dba0d4cf655f27eab7f9554c9c36eb.md) -- You can plan and configure an Automation Center implementation in your organization.
      - [Install](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/380195fce089007d720531d787ff47b61da052c9.md) -- If you have the admin role, you can install the Automation Center application (sn_ac). If the application does NOT include demo data or it does NOT install related applications and plugins, delete or revise the following sentence:The application includes demo data and installs related ServiceNow Store applications and plugins if they aren’t already installed.
      - [Configuring automation summary execution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05953e5effba1fd3d42695c5a23fef826d3591da.md) -- Configure the execution summary of automation to specify how automation data is aggregated and presented on the Automation Center dashboard.
        - [Create automation source type](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/66108ce2313d165131d178fb37d7bdf88cd4fd85.md) -- Define the kind of source type that you want to import and use in Automation Center.
        - [Create automation source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/16c1c57579a1bbd688b5b226a2854d236bf3c24f.md) -- Associate a data source for the selected source type.
        - [Configure execution summary](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/57c155441273ea6a0ca1c0c4c7d6e623d96a9585.md) -- Configure the execution summary with the appropriate conditions.
        - [Create execution state mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7fbaa002ec9d8154381c0d28dd50f83d154e3d47.md) -- Define the mapping for the source and target tables for the configuration to work as expected.
      - [Track flows and actions as automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d96dacbbed159da4cec9d9d9e0cefa74f30e98f7.md) -- Track ServiceNow flows and actions as automations so you can view summary and detailed information of the flows and actions in the Automation Center Workspace.
      - [Configuring UiPath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0773152fea67297c3c642562b73d65abfea79f58.md) -- Easily view and analyze UiPath data from Automation Center.
        - [Create UiPath webhook registry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/716f7cb20e183a3a6471ed57a6f7e4be27baf721.md) -- Create UiPath webhook registries to establish a connection between UiPath and Automation Center.
        - [Set UiPath WebHook routing policies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8091d0e54409184aa4c4ef212a6ccbd52c4b6abd.md) -- Set the UiPath WebHook routing policies to enable the data to get populated in the ServiceNow tables, and then used by Automation Center.
      - [Tracking third-party automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d495ab842e2c807d02bb4fe5827b34880c38aeb4.md) -- Track any third-party automations in Automation Center.
      - [Customize the layout for an automation request form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a745fd0ce5bbc0a70218b2bb94a31eb03f40d87a.md) -- Change the layout of the automation request form from the Service Catalog to meet the requirements of your organization requirements.
      - [Set properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/964ef529a69588fedcdf2dd6a8790ef97aee4e4e.md) -- You must set the properties to define the default settings that are required for Automation Center.
      - [Configuring Recommended Actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/82d6eca3197cfa988cc326bca2d5d38d1a4dcd08.md) -- Configuring the Recommended Actions application to work with Automation Center enables you to reuse an existing request or plan your automation request based on an existing request.
        - [Install](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6225bc0b77f9edcb74e3fd727c06551ced3a889b.md) -- Install the Recommended Actions application to use its capabilities.
        - [Set the system properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/76ec014761e6f627cb6967ecb436aac6c78d6968.md) -- Set the system properties for the Recommended Actions application to view the recommendations in the contextual panel of the Automation Center Workspace.
        - [Select options for recommendations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3b678df5ba6e9d32c8ebd07b232ebad05cf2bb6c.md) -- There are two options for the Recommended Actions application: String-based and ML-based. These options decide the kind of data that you get for your search. It displays data about automations in all states except the Published state.
      - [Spotlight feature](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6d69eb394922a465af3416ea80f5c309bd318d9e.md) -- Use the ServiceNow Spotlight feature to auto-calculate automation request scores. Scores define the execution priority of the automation request. The higher the score, the higher the priority of the automation request.
        - [Configuration settings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1159f8868c95d61b11e8a0a17eac236e5ae7c3d3.md) -- To use the ServiceNow Spotlight feature, set the configuration settings.
        - [Default criteria](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f5040289b71e16cebbcfac6e3e2c15117a19c318.md) -- ServiceNow Spotlight is available with default criteria. Each field provides a score based on the default criteria.
        - [Set up](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/708b944aeb86b09bd94b6c0dec63f0d1788a59f8.md) -- Set up ServiceNow Spotlight to start using and getting the benefits of this feature. The Spotlight feature automatically calculates the execution priority of the automation requests.
      - [CSDM guidelines](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/240ece7974f55a26bf1ffbcdb5c741c9a84c2577.md) -- Apply Common Service Data Model (CSDM) to Automation Center.
        - [Product view](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/846c0dbd92861942ba723dda480e1e4f5c2d8c31.md) -- Use the ServiceNow Automation Center application to govern your end-to-end multi-vendor automation life cycles from one place. By using real-time dashboards, you can manage and measure the health of the automation and prevent automation failures across multiple vendors​.
        - [Automation Center and CSDM tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b0483478dae5b774202277b9308dbd1fc1fd6ee4.md) -- Automation Center uses CSDM tables. Several ServiceNow products benefit from and add value to Automation Center.
        - [Use cases](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/21ef76490427d6ba30fcc9716afe3fbef2fee32e.md) -- Automation Center enables you to manage your automations from one central place.
    - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e6f47eb9b8b0e4ccd5c9f193d4afbb3b2bfc339.md) -- If you're an automation business user, technical user, or administrator, you can use the Automation Center application to create an automation task, resource, insight rule, and insight trigger. You can also move an automation request to different life cycle stages.
      - [Working with automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b08b0a586276df024f1e8cafd557afc49edc77ec.md) -- Create automations to automatically streamline your business processes, reduce the time that you spend on manual activities, and reduce your costs.
        - [Create an automation goal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d12db62905e6c186f3b5d51cf498b8dd1af2a0b0.md) -- Create an automation goal to manage the progress and estimate the outcomes of an automation request. One goal can be associated with multiple automation requests. But an automation request can be associated with only one goal.
        - [Reinstate an automation goal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a1d42364c2f73e1be968c59e36263de91d5fa646.md) -- Reinstate an already achieved automation goal to restore and alter the scope of the automation.
        - [Creating an automation request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/665b19c68bac03760bd3bf71c4657bc0ab156233.md) -- An automation request helps you to automatically streamline your business processes, reduce the time that you spend on manual activities, and reduce your costs.
          - [From Service Catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8c574258261ea33d584dae20f1139f63dc220417.md) -- Submit an automation request using the ServiceNow Service Catalog form to automate your business processes to streamline, reduce time spent on manual activities, and reduce costs.
          - [From Automation Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7e5ab17fc00902bf2577df35b35ec9efb393bf1e.md) -- Create an automation request from Automation Center to automatically streamline your business processes, reduce how much time is spent on manual activities, and reduce your costs.
          - [From Process Mining Workspace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a38241bad12f35ebfd0655ac31413f7ea27819e3.md) -- Create an automation request from the Process Mining Workspace, which is outside of the Automation Center. If you have installed Process Mining and Automation Center, then you can create an automation request from the Process Mining Workspace.
        - [Create an automation task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3ac7ae6029401c90e5939e98227dcafddd84a974.md) -- Create an automation task to effectively manage the activities associated with the automation request. However, this is an optional step.
        - [Create an automation resource](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/61d5b5f3da4a4142b19ef7cca2dfdf8599b1c83b.md) -- Create an automation resource to associate a resource to an automation task. However, this is an optional step.
        - [Move request to Planned state](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d758d1a1849e4d5240f138ef48d2640c5d12709.md) -- After creating an automation request, move it to the Planned state before you work on it or create associated automation tasks or resources.
        - [Move request to In progress state](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/15ecd10b3a8f63036dee0ff8b52881d99390bf57.md) -- As you begin the development for the automation request, move it to the In progress state. This state notifies anyone using Automation Center that the work for the automation is in progress.
        - [Defer a request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a83dac09c4c8f0aef48792df86dac4e3e30bb672.md) -- Defer an automation request from Automation Center if the priority of the request has changed and it is not urgent anymore.
        - [Reject a request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/671a80d27bf21a46448ebcdc5e665ad2a4c56da2.md) -- Reject an automation request from Automation Center if it's a duplicate of an existing automation or if it doesn’t meet the required criteria.
        - [Publish a request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/702df930b6e195849ef59fac4890b1183812432e.md) -- Publish an automation request from Automation Center to make the request ready for execution.
        - [Create an agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/932bf364fdc38774ec0bfe8a03f1efcce7f426b8.md) -- Create an automation request agent to efficiently manage the tasks of the automation request without manual intervention.
        - [Working with golive checklists](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f02d8ebe1d3594042388dd6aaf63837b43f643eb.md) -- Create a golive checklist to automatically track items that must be reviewed before publishing the automation request. Every golive checklist is associated with an automation request.
          - [Create a checklist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/006c4d52072de67cf01ca1710844337971ed66e2.md) -- Create a checklist to track the items for an automation request. A checklist is a list of tasks that you must track before publishing an automation request.
          - [Edit a task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1e6359d7b3c6dd99c25d0538c1acd999cd2aa930.md) -- Edit a task if you want to update the checklist.
          - [Clear a checklist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/eecce9200ca91fba8f4e2e61d2fe95c5985b8194.md) -- Clear a checklist if you no longer need the checklist for your automation request.
          - [Create a template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0d3893a3d4555455f1d0b4d536e7274b0ece9672.md) -- Create a template when you think a golive checklist is useful for multiple automation requests.
          - [Update a template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f744a48567a160147dd74ef00a298ceae7fae971.md) -- Update your template if you have changed the checklist and want those changes to reflect in your template.
          - [Update task status](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e7b67486d89e98e960decb3e68544e33986f2cd5.md) -- Update the status of a task so that it’s the latest and helps in the publishing of the automation request.
        - [Map automations with automation request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7f85fe9a96270ddb76f2c83e5b81b0c15721ce53.md) -- Map automations in Published state with an automation request to publish the automation request.
        - [Update an automation attribute](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a7a300796957873b16ab29e30ada9702f05d9a98.md) -- Update an automation attribute to include the automation source and time savings information. This information is available in the Automation Center Value dashboard for analysis.
        - [Enable granular integration for automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1020a29ccdc38f085eaf446595bfa2363bc7318d.md) -- Enable granular integration for automations to capture cost saved and time saved at the transaction level. This feature makes the total cost-saved and total time-saved data analysis effective.
        - [Manage and review automation executions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ae392cd704cce7b2ad0c02e98ed9ff0c4aa48915.md) -- Manage and review your automation executions, including their states, so that you can make sure that they are on track.
        - [Review the bot processes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d78a3a9208815f544b75686e1618d4f7e48274f3.md) -- Review a list of available bot processes in Automation Center, so that you can make sure that they are on track.
        - [View the available robots](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/785e2d4c9500590a7df17ee669328ca7c5148a31.md) -- View a list of available robots in Automation Center for reference purpose.
        - [Create an insight rule](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9ea0c6a5212e049ad57d7d227f2c20f44e9a1627.md) -- Create an insight rule to generate custom insights for an automation business process.
          - [Create an insight trigger](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e94ec9ba671ff95f24cdb985993cdd7b8fa12707.md) -- Create an active insight trigger so that you can run the related insight rule.
            - [Map an insight rule to an existing business rule](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f8c47857a3714b7accf0a756cae2c3533dec1f16.md) -- Map an insight rule to an existing business rule to define the type of insight trigger. This insight trigger activates the associated insight rule to run.
            - [Map an insight rule to a new scheduled script](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/754320c318cd623fae7fb178c54f755459cfb185.md) -- Map an insight rule to a new scheduled script to define the type of insight trigger. This insight trigger activates the associated insight rule to run.
            - [Map an insight rule to an existing scheduled job](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0f6333fc955f2bdb2a238f4fde64fa16c911d7e4.md) -- Map an insight rule to an existing scheduled job to define the type of insight trigger. This insight trigger activates the associated insight rule to run.
          - [Write a script for an automation message variable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e3d51452bd0c76a052cc2dbed548a9d188e9488b.md) -- Write JavaScript code input for variables that are added in the message of an insight rule.
        - [View automation insights](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d83498eb29a22a93fe5c4db9a405fe2d3003994.md) -- View automation insights to view the generated insights from the insight rules in Automation Center Executions dashboard.
      - [Working with actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6cf52c33d0aafba30587a0f16aa4d9316ba7d64.md) -- Create actions to fix issues that cause automations to fail.
        - [Creating an action request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a673827772cbc4db06534d026226956605d31110.md) -- An action request helps you to automatically solve issues that cause automations to fail, improving efficiency and saving time and cost.
          - [From Service Catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/09ce74d37ed738dc248a31ca4378eb02f11431bf.md) -- Submit an action request using the ServiceNow Service Catalog form to request for actions to resolve issues causing your automations to fail.
          - [From Automation Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6ace7af5317d194430620c7d69561d2ad91d654.md) -- Create an action request from Automation Center to request for actions to resolve issues causing your automations to fail.
        - [Creating an action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/91394641e4316b0f97e4a20878e16aa3b73abd6d.md) -- Create an action to empower users to fix issues automatically.
          - [Create a flow, subflow, or action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9510981e2633c6ea7c9276a2b59448ce0bb7b1f4.md) -- Create a flow in Workflow Studio to automate fixing repeated issues that cause automations to fail in Automation Center.
          - [Create an action category](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/33e59f9335d1e7d56a2a0822a25bde702e5bb25c.md) -- Create an action category to associate with an action. Action categories help users to categorize the actions into different categories, which would make selecting categories easier.
          - [Create an action type](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a9ca9f3429f829031b5aeabc9592af95ac506cd3.md) -- Create an action type to associate with an action category. Action types are a sub-set of action category. They are used for easier identification based on need.
          - [Create an action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4b8c32b26e8f7d4fbba85064d5ec2b8f76ad36f7.md) -- Create an action to view and execute in Action Center to fix issues that cause automations to fail in Automation Center.
        - [Execute actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3756d9a2246aff69a575a145ba84942c08f455fc.md) -- Execute an action to fix common repeated issues efficiently.
        - [Manage actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8288aea36692721859faaf73ced23245e2136aca.md) -- Manage the actions to set permissions of who can access the actions and view any details or logs of the executed actions.
          - [Create assigned groups](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0766abf643c1898cd727713ca8c4eff0b5678a6b.md) -- Create assigned groups to limit the availability of the action to a specific group.
          - [View action logs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6e79657f83a3e92e63709c069e668adae4506100.md) -- View action logs to see details of actions that are executed.
      - [Working with reviews](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fbee5b9f338686c4e17cd9a2348aac4b4513839e.md) -- Reviews enable you to evaluate automations that have been created.
        - [Creating a review request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1439da7c541364210d8ac38b3a80e586855fc731.md) -- Review request enable you to review the automations.
          - [From Service Catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/62fcc0addbc270f564bf68d5d74eb8d0f7c97bdf.md) -- Submit a review request using the ServiceNow Service Catalog form to request for reviews to review automations.

            - [Select an action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4008b65437056e95dcddfc7533ad1d46c914c06d.md) -- Select an action suitable for your data import into ServiceNow instance.

              - [Edit flow in Workflow Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b5151d596772562a8d4e4ccfbd81386d47647927.md) -- Edit the flow to confirm that the pagination is implemented correctly. This confirms that the data is imported correctly.

          - [Review and activate automation source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/aa4d3f27a69f52cfd50b9634e9a61a5b6d4a290d.md) -- Review all configurations for the automation source, and then activate the automation source.

        - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/528f751a6d27ce9d41b5dcb8067c95676f181772.md) -- Use Now Assist for Automation Center to explore available automations in your ServiceNow instance. You can filter by automation type, execution time period, and application scope, then onboard high-value automations directly to Automation Center for ROI tracking.

Then, filter the results by Now Assist for Automation Center.
    - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3204edcba74f9324bf8bba04901b85aabdbbe972.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information about the lists and forms that you use to configure and administer Automation Center.
      - [Installed components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f507b6231ddd079e827ec93cc42623ada88cbea3.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the activation of Automation Center, including tables, user roles, and scheduled jobs.
      - [Properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/01441f67ceb3b8e7146f778cb1b0c91b5d73ea33.md) -- You can access system properties for Automation Center by navigating to All Automation Center Administration Automation Properties .
      - [Submit an Automation Request form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2581bb08c86b84ec00f6a36216b6b81b9261fc40.md) -- Use the Submit an Automation Request form to create an automation request in Service Catalog.
      - [Automation request form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/835214dddae3b4abc8b7857bcf5e830d2e362535.md) -- Use the Automation request form to create an automation request, action request, or review request from Automation Center.
      - [Automation task form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1abc8fca6f155bc82c40ce7e10fbf1a435d15c6d.md) -- Use the Automation task form to create an automation task in Automation Center.
      - [Automation resource form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2fe1845fec92cb56fae4b7968dfff70b977ce036.md) -- Use the Automation resource form to create an automation resource to associate a resource to an automation task.
      - [Automation execution form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3b4fe0d3d023c605950e5d66e0328c41540052d5.md) -- Use the Automation execution form to view an automation execution from Automation Center.
      - [Insight rule form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/40532f3b0838c0fb4f0ec07cfee050c6aa533e83.md) -- Use the Insight rule form to create an insight rule from Automation Center.
      - [Automation Scheduled Trigger Execution form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/99d95db5293585c87ccef41f59c3c1f990e5fb9d.md) -- Use the Automation Scheduled Trigger Execution form to define the type of insight trigger and map an insight rule to a new scheduled script in Automation Center.
      - [Automation goal form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e92762de1b3e01e1e3bbdd15d302d0c8d8ac2d04.md) -- Use the Automation goal form to create an automation goal in Automation Center.
      - [Life-cycle stages of an automation request](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d002b7df78fe07e1a8b19722657e83ed632e1a38.md) -- The State transition of an automation request guides you through the stages of its life cycle.
      - [Domain separation and Automation Center](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0c2c5b0ef62b606ee9bd684a881405bf2390b05c.md) -- If any conrefs are broken, re-add them from the doc/source/reuse/domain-separation/domain-separation-overview.dita file. In the short description, edit the first sentence to state whether domain separation is supported or not and add the application name. Keep the conref at the end that describes domain separation.Domain separation is supported for Automation Center.
  - [Integration Hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/75f71accc95b9ce4cdc743ca67ffdc2b1d9ad259.md) -- Automate integration tasks using ServiceNow components for ServiceNow Workflow Studio, or develop custom integrations. A separate subscription is required.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c4b7ee0d134f3fd63743bda92291713f89a16bba.md) -- ServiceNow Integration Hub enables you to build reusable integrations with third-party systems and call them from anywhere in the ServiceNow AI Platform. For example, you can request Integration Hub to call external systems using integration APIs from the Action Designer Script step, run the Script step on the ServiceNow MID Server, and activate protocol steps like REST, SOAP, and PowerShell.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b01064f0f8c2d3be827d8f09e96591d04b532120.md) -- Review and select an Integration Hub subscription package. Activate Integration Hub plugins and review usage and transaction details.
      - [Request Integration Hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10a0ec350d31d3c044830a3cfb5320d5a511f19c.md) -- ServiceNow Integration Hub enables you to build reusable integrations with third-party systems and call them from anywhere in the ServiceNow AI Platform. For example, you can request Integration Hub to call external systems using integration APIs from the Action Designer Script step, run the Script step on the ServiceNow MID Server, and activate protocol steps like REST, SOAP, and PowerShell.
        - [Usage and subscription](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a715918bdf1e6dc105bccd70eaef7d51db32261e.md) -- Choose a subscription package to build reusable integrations with third-party systems. Review the usage dashboard to determine the number of transactions used within your current subscription, and to view transaction details.
        - [Subscription notifications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c8d25f06f9c331cae9eb6d0dc3c2628411535842.md) -- Integration Hub displays an information message whenever you use a spoke, protocol, entitlement, or feature that requires an Integration Hub subscription. You can use this information to identify possible gaps between your planned Integration Hub usage and your current subscription entitlements.
        - [Request a plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8aa3e6e089e4c01bbd174ba68eaca2b005c3e3fe.md) -- Integration Hub plugins require a separate subscription and must be activated by ServiceNow personnel.
        - [Integration Hub plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0b4b536d148e5f398a2d87acd7e137a0d9327885.md) -- Request Integration Hub plugins included in your subscription.
      - [Integration Hub Usage Dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a82a8af73fe9d1408535a474beadfa3b89f42236.md) -- Get insights on the usage of Integration Hub data from the Integration Hub Usage Dashboard. For example, view the average number of monthly transactions in the last year or the data egress from Integration Hub via REST and SOAP API protocols. Also reuse this short description in the release notes.
        - [View insights](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7d6beb4bb6071be3672356d1e4e48ca9e481098a.md) -- Use the Integration Hub Usage Dashboard to get insights on the Integration Hub transactions. For example, you can view which protocol was the most used in the transactions in the last year. You can also use filters and customize the layout and arrangement of the columns in the reports.
        - [Transaction reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fc6ade558e76502f259b7a9ba72146495951d39e.md) -- The transaction reports in Integration Hub Usage Dashboard help you to understand the Integration Hub usage transactions.
        - [Data egress reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1d9424ba5cdc94a4fe1a2dc5771041141563c90d.md) -- The Data egress reports give insights on data egress from the ServiceNow instance through API protocols or export sets. You can view more information when you select specific records.
    - [Build integrations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7230cc5465709315cdf831fe74a88311f566a6a7.md) -- Create integrations with Integration Hub.
      - [Integration Hub spokes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cfb5edf6705d1162ad6ae40e987c93c595a829e5.md) -- Activate spokes to enhance your Workflow Studio experience with integration-specific content. Use prebuilt flows and actions to automate your integrations or create your own integration automation.
        - [Adobe Experience Platform Spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c3345a1446b6a6f0cad20bd0207afe4c1ccbe52a.md) -- Automate the process of managing datasets and entities in Adobe Experience Platform from your ServiceNow instance.
          - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa5ebd628d2f482e02575cd7d255a5cea8845f25.md) -- Integrate your Adobe Experience Platform account with your ServiceNow instance. Create a custom OAuth application in Adobe Experience Platform and authenticate requests from ServiceNow.
            - [Create a JWT provider for the Adobe Experience Platform spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa5ebd628d2f482e02575cd7d255a5cea8845f25.md) -- Integrate your Adobe Experience Platform account with your ServiceNow instance. Create a custom OAuth application in Adobe Experience Platform and authenticate requests from ServiceNow.
            - [Register Adobe Experience Platform as OAuth Provider](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa5ebd628d2f482e02575cd7d255a5cea8845f25.md) -- Integrate your Adobe Experience Platform account with your ServiceNow instance. Create a custom OAuth application in Adobe Experience Platform and authenticate requests from ServiceNow.
            - [Create Credential records for the Adobe Experience Platform](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa5ebd628d2f482e02575cd7d255a5cea8845f25.md) -- Integrate your Adobe Experience Platform account with your ServiceNow instance. Create a custom OAuth application in Adobe Experience Platform and authenticate requests from ServiceNow.
            - [Create Connection records for the Adobe Experience Platform spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa5ebd628d2f482e02575cd7d255a5cea8845f25.md) -- Integrate your Adobe Experience Platform account with your ServiceNow instance. Create a custom OAuth application in Adobe Experience Platform and authenticate requests from ServiceNow.
        - [Adobe Sign Spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/345c987c05d9ff004904ecd66e4324563d6ba631.md) -- Automate the process of sending a legal document to an individual or list of recipients for digital signature using Adobe Sign. For example, automate employee onboarding and offboarding, or sending non-disclosure agreements, legal agreements, and statements of work for digital signature. Use ServiceNow data in document templates and enable users to upload documents for signature as needed.
          - [Synchronize Adobe Sign group with ServiceNow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
            - [Create custom OAuth application in Adobe Sign account](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
            - [Configure the webhook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
            - [Configure a connection for the Adobe Sign spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
            - [Configure Application Access to ServiceNow tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
            - [Create Adobe Sign group in ServiceNow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
            - [Synchronize documents in Adobe Sign group with ServiceNow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84ea1a9e7b080d430cc5c5956fd92710e274f6d0.md) -- Synchronize ServiceNow with the required group in Adobe Sign to access the group specific documents, and agreements from the Adobe Sign spoke.
          - [Activate Adobe Sign spoke catalog items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3b7c1a4e4e35084a8eae1c142fa82fc78e237652.md) -- Trigger events in Adobe Sign when an item is requested in Service Catalog. For example, the Adobe Sign - Statement of Work Demo catalog item triggers a sample flow that sends a Adobe Sign document to a designated recipient.
        - [Agent Client Collector Spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/df70c19884d931bfca812fd06639520daee23517.md) -- Automate the process of executing commands on agents or configuration items (CI) using the ServiceNow Agent Client Collector spoke. Agent Client Collector framework allows you to execute commands on the systems where it is installed and sends output data to the ServiceNow instance through the MID Server.
          - [Set up the Agent Client Collector spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6b81eff5462e24ff1906b7649e9bf55a34adc7b8.md) -- Integrate the ServiceNow Agent Client Collector framework and Agent Client Collector spoke.

          - [Create an Aha!             - [Create an Aha! Webhook in ServiceNow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cedd668d8843f6a9e828fc9597512f84429cdc85.md) -- Configure a webhook to subscribe to events in the Aha! account with a ServiceNow callback URL.

Use this data to determine which licenses are stale so that you can reclaim these licenses and realize potential savings.
          - [Set up the Asana spoke](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/50fe608efde412e3afd2204cd83f75fbd5832f18.md) -- Configure the Asana spoke to integrate your ServiceNow instance with the Asana instance. The integration enables you to set up a flow and, when a trigger occurs, automate actions on the Asana instance. For example, set a trigger that triggers a flow every day at 13:00 to get the meta data about a workspace.
            - [Set up an OAuth application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a266db5979f432b5f55e2e148aa318d50ea72492.md) -- Set up an OAuth application on the Asana developer's console to generate the client ID and secret that you use to set up the Asana spoke connection record later.

When your ServiceNow instance requests a connection, the OAuth app you had set up authenticates the request based on the details in the connection record.
          - [Register an Asana OAuth application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b1240a5af24ebb93ee2d0d250c766bffaf257697.md) -- Register the Asana OAuth application to access the Asana API 1.0 and to receive a Client ID and Client secret.

You provide the API key on the SAP Fieldglass spoke connection record and the SAP Fieldglass tenant authenticates your ServiceNow instance based on the API key.
          - [Configure SAP Fieldglass connection record](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d07dee65cf91fe5ef9dc5cefff0a1e61abecd4f7.md) -- Configure the connection record to enable your ServiceNow instance to connect with the SAP Fieldglass tenant.
