        - [Work items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f73301d1bdec8f7dc97688d652973e81fe225c11.md) -- A work item is a record in a work queue that stores the data a robot needs to perform a specific task.
          - [Manage your work items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1889747d8c195338f9d7c6fdceba8d5625caab7a.md) -- Manage your work items more efficiently in RPA Hub. You can view your work items, mark them as complete, and reassign a work item.
            - [Work item form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1889747d8c195338f9d7c6fdceba8d5625caab7a.md) -- Manage your work items more efficiently in RPA Hub. You can view your work items, mark them as complete, and reassign a work item.
          - [Auto-retry function for your failed work items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7d161f5ab093d6f12d17509c4850f6ab71ac44b4.md) -- You can use auto-retry functionality in RPA Hub to retry the failed items automatically in your work queue. The retry functionality is based on the Application exception type only.
        - [Code quality check](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/370e42aa5929d40fccc484400ad44ea489711b91.md) -- A code quality check refers to the process of evaluating the automation file or script to assess its adherence to coding standards, best practices, maintainability, and overall quality.
          - [Code quality rules list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/adce74701fdfd006b0424d3c05ebf4900b6b2315.md) -- View a list of pre-defined rules that RPA admins can set for the RPA developers to follow as a code quality standard.
          - [Code quality check compliance for RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9cc4e45bb5e8bf5e24068bc23eb8f9d1a3111c7d.md) -- View a list of compliance rules that the Code Quality Check feature follows if a package is published from RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Code quality check compliance for RPA Hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05c2c8440fae8f34cc1a736870c6ee9e7fa73320.md) -- View a list of compliance rules that the Code Quality Check feature follows if a bot process is published from RPA Hub.
          - [View the code quality rules list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/490629ab16391773abd07079bb0645102a8d9391.md) -- View a list of the pre-defined code quality check rules along with their active status and severity.
          - [Update the code quality rules list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0b05afd08951dbb59d64988f1c789e897c28fcca.md) -- Update few fields in the code quality rule form to set the code quality check standard.
            - [Code quality rule form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0b05afd08951dbb59d64988f1c789e897c28fcca.md) -- Update few fields in the code quality rule form to set the code quality check standard.
        - [Robot calendar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d939d6d566b56b5a4ca594108e021cb6c0514aa1.md) -- You can use the robot calendar in RPA Hub to view and create the schedule for the unattended robots. It’s a simple, efficient, and interactive way to work with robots and schedules. By using the calendar, you can manage and plan a robot's schedule in a single view.
          - [View robot events](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a86e8639ae6b1b0377c9d2c6f3a16fe4c22a6df9.md) -- View the current robot events on the Robot Calendar tab in RPA Hub for unattended robots. By using the calendar, you can manage and plan a robot's schedule in a single view.
          - [Create a schedule on the robot calendar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0ce73f702b8acbbf00831561cc668f06e9c74722.md) -- Create a schedule on the Robot Calendar tab in RPA Hub to execute unattended robots. You can also identify any conflicts in the schedule by selecting the Preview button.
            - [Schedule form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0ce73f702b8acbbf00831561cc668f06e9c74722.md) -- Create a schedule on the Robot Calendar tab in RPA Hub to execute unattended robots. You can also identify any conflicts in the schedule by selecting the Preview button.
          - [Edit a robot schedule](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6eae5b12d88a9109b8c6c07874a669722f437fb.md) -- Edit a robot schedule of a bot process on the Robot Calendar tab in RPA Hub to resolve any scheduling conflicts or to modify the details on the schedule form.
          - [Delete a robot schedule](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bfe20aa178c38ea67a4640ac060e4f9138d4593a.md) -- Delete an existing robot schedule of a bot process on the Robot Calendar tab in RPA Hub that you no longer need.
        - [Scheduled maintenance days](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7f398493e00e7bb60f6acf4a8af7f0320d269daa.md) -- Track the scheduled maintenance (SM) days on the robot calendar so that the bot processes can function optimally. If an issue occurs, you can take preventive measures. For example, you can know in advance about the days when the robot or the bot process is unavailable so that you can avoid the number of skipped process jobs.
          - [Manage scheduled maintenance days](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/223c159254db1f161bc455cfcd512ec64691282c.md) -- Track scheduled maintenance days on the Robot Calendar tab to manage your current and future automations.
        - [Graceful Stop function](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/af5abbc70ae4ed8607ac26e518f3e58e833fd479.md) -- Graceful Stop functionality provides a capability for robots to exit the automation smoothly. You can define a secure termination point within an automation process. It also enables you to perform clean-up tasks such as closing in-use applications. It is applicable for assigned robots as well as robots in a robot pool.
        - [Workflow Studio actions and subflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0ff2297d8a05232d1ef249b31d61ec88a235ef3d.md) -- Two-way integration of actions and subflows in Workflow Studio and RPA Hub for a seamless robot execution.
          - [Enable the client callable option on a flow or subflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ca05b432c6a6a46a08ad8a1eb224dd4776581154.md) -- Enable a client script to trigger an RPA Hub flow or subflow.
      - [Migrate data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e464420ca38b121fdcf58e4c6425e86e75963337.md) -- Learn how to migrate your data from a lower (non-production) environment to a higher (production) environment.
        - [Restructuring RPA Hub tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/23947a386cc2d559a8dd8085dada6581e3ce851d.md) -- Starting with the Utah release, the Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tables are restructured to an application file, so that changes that you make to these tables are captured in the update sets and can be moved seamlessly across environments. With this process, you don't have to re-create the data records in the targeted environment.
        - [Verify bot process assets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a862b065fc276bffb4d18d868f70a7869c4c5f6e.md) -- Verify that the bot process has the associated schedule, process parameters, shared parameters, package, package version, and work queues in RPA Hub. You do this task when you’re migrating your data from a lower (non-production) environment to a higher (production) environment.
        - [Migrating your data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bdb24710bbaa0cb7364b5f90d785e88ddba43f73.md) -- As a system administrator, after you restructure the RPA Hub tables to extend the Application file (sys_metadata), you can use the update set capability to migrate your data from a lower (non-production) environment to a higher (production) environment for real-time use.
          - [Import a package version attachment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ff1bac0a1d42d5ce615feeb94f02d34f67901862.md) -- Import package version attachments automatically instead of manually uploading a package version attachment, by selecting the Import Attachment button on a package version.
          - [Upload an automation package attachment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/07a02be37c824f0e9273ece3b19372b3243b096e.md) -- Upload a zip file of the automation package in RPA Hub to manually migrate the package from a lower (non-production) to a higher (production) environment.
        - [Migrating the bot process configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/710a3aad31ba536f12e9696b1373386c10b8e5bf.md) -- In RPA Hub, you can migrate the bot process configuration and associated assets for an attended or unattended bot process from one environment to another environment. With this feature, you can create an automation and test it in a lower environment and then migrate it to a higher or production environment.
          - [Mark the bot process as ready for migration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4b85f27f070b6e3535bfc3e72f79360c7c36909f.md) -- Mark the bot process as ready for migration in RPA Hub so that the bot process configuration and associated assets can be migrated to another environment. With this feature, you can create an automation and test it in a lower environment and then migrate it to a higher or production environment.
          - [Migrate the bot process configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9424a22c150205a25e2cc876927332bbfdbba42d.md) -- Migrate the bot process configuration and associated assets to another environment in RPA Hub. With this feature, you can create an automation and test it in a lower environment and then migrate it to a higher or production environment.
      - [Monitor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/72aa4feb89fbecce1c686e946ce646039d850c4c.md) -- Trigger attended or unattended automations or view process jobs, installed plugins, automation logs, maintenance requests, and alerts.
        - [Start an unattended bot process](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/350196aef29de3b794f8e8c658fba1c0ef7841c0.md) -- Start an unattended bot process in the specified robot machine to execute the automation by the selected robot.
        - [Stop an unattended bot process](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/131369873edd85ff661deffec2fdf24cba3d8b96.md) -- Stop the unattended bot process to abort the automation by the selected robot. If robot pool is enabled for a particular bot process, then the execution is stopped for all the robots of the robot pool.
        - [Launch a bot process in Studio for editing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8aecc4e11f85795f39a6afe51f677c2b4c7dced7.md) -- Review, edit, and debug automations by opening the associated package version of the bot process in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.

        - [View a package version](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f267d5a28de26191abd177339216c6386ef5a13a.md) -- View a package version in RPA Hub so that it can be opened from the RPA Desktop Design Studio to build, debug, or modify the automation.
        - [View process jobs of a bot process](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/54f002b9bbb6f3e1e3ebecef5bc4f2be3627fce1.md) -- View a list of execution logs of a bot process in RPA Hub.
          - [Process job form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/54f002b9bbb6f3e1e3ebecef5bc4f2be3627fce1.md) -- View a list of execution logs of a bot process in RPA Hub.

        - [View alerts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6ca3e630e85715cfde59c45f893d85c3235633cc.md) -- View notifications that are generated by the alert rules.         - [View installed RPA Hub plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e85b855c321eb7257824790153c90d64c0a4710b.md) -- View a list of available RPA Hub plugins, the plugin versions, and dependency packs to verify the availability of a specific version that you want to install and use on the RPA Desktop Design Studio.

          - [Maintenance request form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fbe0b981d2a2be011e3abea3bbfab5e6b6fbeefe.md) -- After a scheduled maintenance event card is accepted or rejected on the robot calendar, a maintenance request is created for tracking.
        - [View automation logs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/480dcf943ed1be5aa088a5761e9aae202a03a6b6.md) -- Automation logs are series of succession stages or a series of checkpoints that occur during the execution of a bot process.           - [Automation Logs form](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/480dcf943ed1be5aa088a5761e9aae202a03a6b6.md) -- Automation logs are series of succession stages or a series of checkpoints that occur during the execution of a bot process. It enables monitoring and auditing the automation process. These logs are generated from the robot for unattended and attended bot processes.

    - [Unattended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/732e1dba4ede7a29b5734340f3c3eefb0a3ff00d.md) -- Use the ServiceNow Unattended Robot application to execute unattended automations. Unattended Robot, which is a software agent that you install on a Windows machine, doesn't require human intervention to execute automations.
      - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/eb693309ee600c5ee6616e78fa21966a7146f282.md) -- Learn about the Unattended Robot features that enable you to run unattended automations.
        - [High density robots](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5debeb5b96615c7c370e7e50bbf070893dde64b3.md) -- Execute multiple automations simultaneously and independently on a single Windows Server machine using high density robots.
      - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/78099517b5a788c59dcc1df00ae2c1beb85a4a13.md) -- You can plan and configure an Unattended Robot and Unattended Robot Login Agent implementation in your organization.
        - [Install Unattended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10825da5bfeaea7a2b7ca31a706e5a5468655baa.md) -- You can install the Unattended Robot application in your Windows machine if you have the admin role.
        - [Install Unattended Robot Login Agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e52deac08b911e3ce77f24d58c8af402eeb38dcc.md) -- You can install the Unattended Robot Login Agent application in your Windows machine if you have the admin role.
        - [Set up Unattended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e4c1b6d76c97e4beaaf21c2eef34c88069cc63f1.md) -- Set up the Unattended Robot application to establish a connection between a robot and the ServiceNow RPA Hub instance.
        - [Set up server machine for high density robots](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cfb4948e1872044473d775b6f520232f91bd56de.md) -- Set up the environment for high density robots on a Windows Server machine by installing a Remote Desktop Session Host. Then, add robot user names who can connect to the machine. It enables them to establish Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection to the Windows Server machine.
      - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/98ead5a7a3c6d4bf996e7bab234aa66c851211e9.md) -- You can use the Unattended Robot application to execute unattended automations that are triggered either by a schedule, API, or manually.
        - [Run unattended automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/50c8a4f305326815c233ba8788d7d8c10fda839f.md) -- Run an unattended robot to execute the unattended automations that are triggered either by a schedule, API, or manually.
      - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c259091a474754fac8d20592b6a71e99be6e42ef.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information about the requirements for Unattended Robot installation.
        - [Hardware and software requirements](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/081468c2d41a3ddcb017bce93413bb0b44b7bade.md) -- Ensure that you meet the following hardware and software requirements before you install the Unattended Robot application.
    - [Attended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/151c0e2aac1b994141998b7f16ede43492c116c0.md) -- Use the ServiceNow Attended Robot application to execute attended automations. Attended Robot, which is a software agent that you install on a Windows machine, requires human intervention to execute automations.
      - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/acfb4c8c3bceb28247efc1cf9dfd45bd71f24e0f.md) -- Learn about the Attended Robot features that enable you to run attended automations.
        - [Authentication and automation execution in Embedded Task Automation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d056eafce955f50897cfa2ceff70ec2a7925c792.md) -- Learn about the authentication process in the Attended Robot application and the automation execution, when the automation is triggered from ServiceNow forms.
      - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ac142650ab1aca24e049ae7bfac30383bd9b590d.md) -- You can plan and configure an Attended Robot implementation in your organization.
        - [Install Attended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/13824ed712c86bb2264b89e822796af8bfd4e89d.md) -- You can install the Attended Robot application in your Windows machine if you have the admin role.
        - [Set up Attended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/346ef9c9b4e5c63fac98bf77f77bf693a0b35d0b.md) -- Establish a connection between the Attended Robot and the ServiceNow RPA Hub instance.
        - [Connect to an instance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ca9a761e3020eb7b263a8e356514f41eb31567e2.md) -- Connect to an RPA Hub instance in three ways by using the Connection Manager so that you can establish a connection between the Attended Robot and ServiceNow RPA Hub instance.
        - [Disconnect from an instance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/72492931460a4c911a414fe02b5ffe6da8ee9204.md) -- Disconnect anytime from an RPA Hub instance while using the Attended Robot.
      - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/95c25543061bb684a5af924079bc2d34999c9cd9.md) -- You can use the Attended Robot to execute the attended automations.
        - [Run an automation using Attended Robot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5af6939773081191bf2cb8206cc6c7fe8c409147.md) -- Run an attended robot to execute the attended bot process (attended automations).
    - [Now Assist for RPA Hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0995a945edeb6066146553b52d5941d3daf4c484.md) -- Use the Now Assist for RPA Hub application to transform your automation development process. You can create automations, activities, and automation logic additions from text instructions and preview options.
      - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10a9af18eaf66216d28b1d3cf45c2e0598822c51.md) -- With the Now Assist for RPA Hub application, your RPA Desktop Design Studio users can create and edit automations, activities, and automation logic additions from text instructions and preview options.
        - [Supporting information](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/26ce965324cbe75296a47b5803e5dd1b8def83a5.md) -- Get a quick overview of the important information that is related to the Now Assist for RPA Hub application.
        - [RPA bot generation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/05218c13cd5168d60b11046a495f4138076eee04.md) -- Use the RPA bot generation skill to create automations, activities, and automation logic additions from text instructions and preview options from the RPA Desktop Design Studio user interface.
      - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c4d19a800f12dd0b4d1f8630e1caaeb5639a4e24.md) -- If you have the admin role, you can configure the Now Assist for RPA Hub application so that your human agents or users can get started with developing automations faster.
        - [Turn on the RPA bot generation skill](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bdad44b36f3bb7b489b6ff33310e07b567635be4.md) -- Turn on the Robotic Process Automation (RPA) bot generation skill to use generative AI to create automations, activities, and automation logic additions from text instructions and preview options.
      - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1b65a64fa007d06ebd58ad314cc6c42f74d7a389.md) -- If you're a RPA Desktop Design Studio user, you can create automations, activities, and automation logic additions from text instructions and preview options by using the Now Assist for RPA Hub application.
        - [Create an automation with Now Assist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9f57eed28efa679fdfe4e2e4883e7c77ec0ca014.md) -- Create an automation from text instructions and preview options by using the Now Assist for RPA Hub application.
        - [Create an activity with Now Assist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bdf7721c06346d08b57e9d98be35c80b706b2d1d.md) -- Create activities from text instructions and preview options by using the Now Assist for RPA Hub application. Activities provide modularity to an automation project in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Build an automation with Now Assist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/33ef4f3843e2dfcd6fd8a9451171a3587a7a11fc.md) -- Enhance the automation logic with text instructions, either in an empty activity or by selecting a component in an existing one by using the Now Assist for RPA Hub application.
      - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ad3b64f0ce55594a0791314e1bc904b9eb027619.md) -- Reference topics include information about the limitations of the Robotic Process Automation (RPA) bot generation skill.
        - [Limitations of RPA bot generation skill](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/febbf20f3c76c353ec6ce99a38c0f471fbfb2126.md) -- The limitations of the RPA bot generation skill are as follows.
    - [RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d3f00906dc9939721888a4f3d087ed3ce4d800cd.md) -- Use the ServiceNow Robotic Process Automation (RPA) Desktop Design Studio, which is a low-code Integrated Development Environment (IDE) where you can design or configure automation workflows by dragging and dropping components to the Design surface. RPA Desktop Design Studio is a Windows native application.
      - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b303c8109de797e7f48496bc0b0a8b468e88febe.md) -- Learn about the RPA Desktop Design Studio features that enable you to design and create your business process automations.
        - [RPA Desktop Design Studio user interface](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6566ce4ba6bc78cd0fb9d9e8b1f601cb8f5d85b7.md) -- Learn about the RPA Desktop Design Studio user interface.
      - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3fcb7e859e04a8fb81baab454b4f12e708522dc3.md) -- You can plan and configure an RPA Desktop Design Studio implementation in your organization.
        - [Install RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/35d669deb09c011fa05a95c83e9c84fad4971b03.md) -- Install the RPA Desktop Design Studio application in your Windows machine if you have the admin role.
        - [Set up RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c67ed899b337622a1e3cc17b8bee3e561466e289.md) -- Set up RPA Desktop Design Studio to add your ServiceNow RPA Hub instance details in Connection Manager and to start using the application.
        - [Connect to an instance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0f94833b7aab05698a78845b2e18d47d417941a8.md) -- Connect to an RPA Hub instance in three ways using the Connection Manager so that you can establish a connection between the RPA Desktop Design Studio and ServiceNow RPA Hub instance.
        - [Disconnect from an instance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6d6baa34b2b08faf8ee648c1e68f28da77eeb2c1.md) -- Disconnect a connected RPA Hub instance while you’re using the RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can then log in to the same instance with different credentials. For example, you might want to switch credentials when you use the Assign Bot Process feature.
      - [Build](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/763cced9c350245f693370f814dfc600ca20c3cf.md) -- Create automation projects, use components, and create the activities and variables that are required to design automations in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Create an automation project manually](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/25418205d5c6472528dc2b29fe30eadb80a099d8.md) -- Create an attended or unattended automation project manually in RPA Desktop Design Studio that enables you to automate tasks. You can create an automation project that is based on a prebuilt template and targeted at a use case, or you can create an automation project without using a template.
        - [Create an automation project from a template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/457b91f26ef2407a693bf18c66797b715f4dd853.md) -- Create an automation project from the default automation templates that RPA Desktop Design Studio provides or the templates that you have designed on the RPA Desktop Design Studio and published to the RPA Hub. An automation template caters to a use case and provides a framework of automation.
        - [Create a skill project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/15b2503a8193bfdc3490cb98fa7176068d46a527.md) -- Create a skill automation project in RPA Desktop Design Studio that can be reused in other automations.
        - [Open a local automation project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9903ab665f933e3391eb1c8993046d3c4ac6bcc7.md) -- Open an automation project from the local file system in RPA Desktop Design Studio, so that you can debug, build, or modify the automation.
        - [Open a cloud automation project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2c242360f8be1442373ca758b3d21a7f69529670.md) -- Open an automation project remotely from RPA Hub in RPA Desktop Design Studio, so that you can debug, build, or modify the automation.
        - [Manage RPA plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b0d7514532102ff8531df1edbba9cc1c5e8b7169.md) -- Install, update, or remove plugins to design automations while you're creating unattended and attended automation projects in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Create user plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5ec3b0187d84680ecfe66bb3b7240474c36c4da0.md) -- Create user plugins by using Microsoft Visual Studio to enable RPA developers to use complex .NET components or libraries in RPA Desktop Design Studio in a seamless way.
        - [RPA Desktop Design Studio ports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/20aa31c837cf1555caaff59de213d95596885ef4.md) -- Components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio have ports that are used while creating an automation workflow.
        - [Create and use an activity in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a89db175f29c61f3eebdaab1c02766d54f6b0c2f.md) -- Create and use an activity to provide modularity to an automation project in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Create and use a variable in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/667c6d820aa1daed636b7e14a5bcf3f7e6e39518.md) -- Create a variable in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Create an attended automation form in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/35b85106a6bf9ee576c2fb86e72ecf1463a8d1c0.md) -- Design attended automations by creating an attended user interface (UI) form in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Form designer for building attended automation forms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10757b067f8a34b66b989affc5c8ba480b1833d4.md) -- Form designer is an Integrated Development Environment (IDE) for building attended automation forms in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Configure the form fields for the Form Renderer element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bc8f4839f24e8c6c7e41e4cf4034b5986f6de637.md) -- Configure the form fields in the Form Renderer element while you are building an attended automation form in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Open Service and Runtime logs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/88efc63f699abb21afaa9a3e531c09708a26cac4.md) -- Logs record events that occur during the execution of an automation process. These logs are crucial for debugging and monitoring the performance of the robots.
        - [Post requisites after installing a hot fix](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f1d20bc2fae0d29200edb14f41afdca31506725c.md) -- Perform these tasks after installing a hot fix for either Universal App Connector (UAC) or Chromium connector on your instance to verify the hot fix is accurately downloaded.
      - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/96fe69352ec6e4226c9529fc68ed5b1a68bdc2cc.md) -- You can preview, transform, and validate data on the automations. You can also run, publish, and review automations in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Use a component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/219e69676e424ddcf88deab18d7bedd7f23da7db.md) -- Design automation projects by using components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Use a connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/29b7a666afc829f0029d88e6037db9588a539a71.md) -- Connect to the various data sources and tools to create automation by using a connector in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use connector method](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d2112753c13c7972ac4e581b75c60427092c432d.md) -- Expose and then use the methods within a connector to perform all the actions that the connector can do.
          - [Connectors in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5dea6aca1a04a44c1e597cfe260057fec6ac1b17.md) -- Learn about the connectors that you can use in RPA Desktop Design Studio to create an automation.
          - [Understand levels of connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2abe4540aaa115d7f2cd620165b8384f6de5a224.md) -- Some connectors in the RPA Desktop Design Studio provide methods that interact with various applications at different levels. For example, the Chrome connector provides methods that interact with applications and their elements open in a Google Chrome browser to perform specific Robotic Process Automation tasks.
        - [Use a sample automation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c264661a0e64d31a8036e7b6e608885cf9bfb15b.md) -- Use a sample automation, which is a prebuilt automation, that shows how different components are configured for a specific use case.
          - [Sample automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1d0134985d4cd75066088f4fe9d359f16bf560ec.md) -- The RPA Desktop Design Studio provides multiple sample automations that cater to different use cases.
        - [Recording automations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4593636c0d16c8b0d82d733f07aa760c6527bb64.md) -- Capture your actions from your desktop or web applications and convert them into an automation flow by using the recorder option in the RPA Desktop Design Studio application. You can record attended and unattended automations by using this capability. When you record an automation, you don't have to create it manually by using connectors or components.
          - [Record an automation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3c08b4c3eebbe5f4c59adcd1fa3618f28bdb3ffb.md) -- Record an automation by using the recorder option in the RPA Desktop Design Studio application. The actions that you perform on the application elements can be saved as an automation flow to the automation project.
          - [Types of elements and actions for the recorder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7cdd740f4a106fa24aa7d7b7daef8dd8c220d772.md) -- The actions are the activities that you can perform on an application element such as a text box, button, hyperlinks, and so on. By using these actions, you can build an automation flow in the RPA Desktop Design Studio recorder.
        - [Override a data port](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/09d5a46d3cd1ce9ed4bf4be4a3009a6fc767a332.md) -- Override a data port of a component in RPA Desktop Design Studio so that you can change the default behavior of the Data In and Data Out ports. By overriding a data port, you can simplify the automation workflow development and testing.
        - [Preview the data of a data port in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5efdcf5a187bc240fe434500612cbb9459d193d9.md) -- Preview the data of a Data port in RPA Desktop Design Studio to view and verify if the result of a port is correct and is as expected.
        - [Transform the data in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7a45d5af15160bddc6d56e2c6543597475c665f7.md) -- Transform the data in RPA Desktop Design Studio by using the Transform Data option at a component level. With this option, you can edit the output value of the Data port by using VB.NET, C#.NET, or JavaScript.
        - [Validate the data in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/39a61a13e769eb5c855801907da2cda2c7379cc3.md) -- Validate your data by using the Validate Data option at a component level in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Create a proxy in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/697a6eb88e88eee774a6419ead4d26a99b2a287d.md) -- Create a proxy at a component level in RPA Desktop Design Studio to extract the additional properties of that component.
        - [Set a breakpoint to pause a component in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6c0f6936427c30b94cf728dbcf0f1e235f27e5c.md) -- Set a breakpoint on a component in RPA Desktop Design Studio so that you can pause it for debugging purposes during an automation execution. You can set a breakpoint for any number of components.
        - [Start a workflow execution from a selected component in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3deb2c8f33366ee9c9847d24f9c2110786b79b1a.md) -- Start a workflow execution from a component instead of at the beginning of the workflow by using the Run From Here option in RPA Desktop Design Studio. This functionality allows you to rapidly develop and test the automation workflows.
        - [Run an automation in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fd616ee6fc489ac9b6833ae20369b124d466e96d.md) -- Run an automation to execute the workflow in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Code quality check in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2119fa19412393c303773c9c5216a5908d56a899.md) -- You can use code quality check in RPA Desktop Design Studio to proactively find the issues in an automation activity or the complete automation project. When you publish an automation project, an in-built code quality check is also performed. Code quality check enables you to reduce the number of errors and prevent potential issues that may hinder your automation.
          - [Fix automation issues with Code quality check in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2809f868d667c1c4d7ec49eb0b5e7bfa3e922640.md) -- Fix the automation issues in your automation activity or complete an automation project proactively by using the Code quality check feature in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Assign bot process to an automation project](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c559509b0301ffab27b77f85bddfd2594cc297a0.md) -- Assign a bot process to an automation project in RPA Desktop Design Studio to start using the bot process resources.
        - [Publish an automation project in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ece792bff36a38bd7021b787e5d370fdd02eef01.md) -- Publish an automation project to RPA Hub from RPA Desktop Design Studio as a package or as a template. After publication, you can quickly deploy automation solutions in the RPA platforms by using the packages or by using a template as a framework to create automations.
        - [Resolve conflicts when merging changes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e1161729b7c0cb2a04a7d2f1253e46646528c40f.md) -- Resolve conflicts when merging changes from multiple sources of the same activity by using the Source Control option in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Import project in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/161b8082ae140e02d3f2bdca8dc34a5b6f59b660.md) -- Import a project to reuse resources, such as activities, variables, attended automation forms, and other global objects from a different automation project in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Handle errors in RPA Desktop Design Studio](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a4feae10b39b3cd4c9d0d2bfaad79fb3119e3838.md) -- Handle errors at the component level and activity level in RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can use the Error Handler option to handle the errors that occur during an automation execution.
        - [Configure port properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bdfb2c50574679a835408a59613b89ea005a7c8a.md) -- Configure how data is passed to the input fields of a component or method in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Configure output port properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/07e90a50ac6e9de693fbfdba20cbfe2b68520a56.md) -- Configure the ways the output ports or fields of components or methods return output in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
      - [Automation components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f7d560b4f5afd054181793fb98b5d20b955a0ab2.md) -- Design automations using various components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [List of components compatible with latest version](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a52b6a6791645b73b58bbb166cecb3c6cd445a98.md) -- Learn about the list of components that are executed in their latest versions in the RPA Desktop Design Studio and robots, irrespective of the version they were used during the automation design.
        - [Actions (UI)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/91e121cc82d49eb5832cafa777bf726556436f7b.md) -- The Actions (UI) group of components work on and with browsers, browser elements, applications, and the desktop in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the ActionSet component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10b41a9c3be287a6dd9607b50ff8c5196c0b8283.md) -- The ActionSet component lets an automation interact with Windows applications (such as web browsers) and with Citrix applications. Using this single component in RPA Desktop Design Studio, you can click, drag, read and set text, interact with tables, and more, combining several user actions into a single task.
            - [Use the ActionSet Click action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/738bc83ec1bad53f2a7c6b780d5593ea4e33a05b.md) -- Simulate a simple left-click on the target area as part of a series of actions in the ActionSet component.
            - [Use the ActionSet SetText action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f1da70f44c884b2016f154940042e46c48246c2d.md) -- Set text to fields on the Windows applications or the Internet Explorer browser by using the Set Text action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet GetText action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/86b7682c930b2615692b7224ace68ebba9a97279.md) -- Capture text from the Windows applications, and web pages on the Internet Explorer browser by using the Get Text action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet Text Selection action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0679a2afe5f4c5afd00b32556e84f424354f1d6a.md) -- Select, copy, or delete text from the Desktop and Windows applications, and the Internet Explorer browser by using the Text Selection action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet Get Table action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3ebc9247225eab9098fe0bf87f5b9355d0da7063.md) -- Capture a table from the Windows applications, and web pages on the Internet Explorer browser by using the Get Table component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet GetImage action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c7f9e8e8a37497ab162cd9fadae499cac9044dd1.md) -- Capture images from the desktop, Windows applications, and web pages on the Internet Explorer browser by using the GetImage component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet OCR Read Text action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/524f7957f3867809e0d9dff730da6c4cdc2fb723.md) -- Extract text from images in the desktop, Windows applications, and the Internet Explorer browser by using the OCR Read Text action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet OCR Read Table action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/de996d4692986a99dbeb2fd0be2f09a28e24aba6.md) -- Extract a table from images in the desktop, Windows applications, and web pages on the Internet Explorer browser by using the OCR Read Table action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet OCR ClickText action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/38f6117b3dac760a066c7783c82c59b771e1563d.md) -- Perform a mouse device action on a text in an image in the Internet Explorer browser or Windows applications by specifying the text using the OCR ClickText action.
            - [Use the ActionSet SendKeys action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/35743015ba1d5c582333223cd17ebe4c08443c2b.md) -- Set text or perform keyboard shortcuts on fields and elements on the desktop, Windows applications, and web pages on the Internet Explorer browser using the ActionSet Send Keys action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ActionSet Mouse action](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dc1643cea1182bdb69c76e0d6f330830157d336e.md) -- Do various mouse device actions on the desktop, Windows applications, and web pages on the Internet Explorer browser using the ActionSet Mouse action in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Get Table component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4dddf13138707a52b9be19109719caa52173f155.md) -- Extract and display data and the count of rows from the grids, lists, combo boxes, and HTML tables, by using the Get Table component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Get Text component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4503ba8691354c0384a75460bcc4bffe68f2a6f7.md) -- The Get Text component captures text from an area that you specify in the target application. You can use it to receive data that exists in text format. To capture text from an image, see Use the OCR Text component.
          - [Use the Click component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d8ac51a797db482e3e28b007ec02e04d6c275842.md) -- Simulate the click actions of a mouse device by using the Click component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Mouse component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1a83681e3198d80c1443ddc3e5c06ddca755e07d.md) -- Simulate a mouse action, including alternative mouse device buttons, moves, drags, scrolls, and paste operations.
          - [Use the OCR Text component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d70da6608899c7679e174ae7f784f5f67ab3108.md) -- Extract the text from an image by using the OCR (Optical Character Recognition) Text component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Send Keys component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/675ebb3e821175e30ccd94859026e9727ee3291e.md) -- Send text to fields in web pages, Windows applications, or the Windows desktop using the Send Keys component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. Use the component to enter data to fields such as text boxes and lists and to send special keys such as Shift, Control, F1, and F2.
          - [Use the Set Text component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2d3a72e6bfff7a4382ee4dfe77f7295f2921c4a4.md) -- Set text in text boxes and drop-down lists within applications, check boxes, radio button controls, web pages on Internet Explorer browser or Windows applications by using the Set Text component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Supported keys and functions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/45be4dd94e641271c51ad81ce6b2c42bcc1433b9.md) -- The Send keys component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio supports multiple keys, special keys, and functions. The keyboard keys must be enclosed within []. For example, [Back].
          - [Properties of Actions (UI) components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/97ec6498b3b7e94b59967ccae589cc317c9f7fbb.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Actions (UI) group components. All components under the Actions (UI) group have both unique and common properties.
          - [ActionSet actions properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b4019d285c426142c71c50e60dbb7cc1717149d3.md) -- The ActionSet component performs multiple actions and each action has distinct properties. You can update the properties to modify the behavior of the actions.
          - [Anchor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/803109090935af4d96976bc538344150f44b7cc4.md) -- An anchor is a unique identifier which is identified on the screen. It helps specify the target area for a simulated user interaction by defining a static area from which actions can be defined at a relative distance. The position of actions is calculated based on the anchor and the actions are performed relative to it.
        - [Conditions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/77ad7a56cb2714fa6270e782396eb99adac2b03e.md) -- The Conditions is a group of components that you can use to automate decision making. These decisions are based on the value, input, or data matches with conditions or multiple values.
          - [Use the Decision component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c217c2331d47667dc1ab175bd6b5e44b2e2e043c.md) -- Automate the decision-making process by using the Decision component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Switch component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7088b57d8d4efeb5bd53a2785cad36fe7118b0b9.md) -- Find the exact match of a value among multiple values as part of an automation Workflow by using the Switch component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Functions, data types, and operators](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fd5f787f2b76ef1138348863def19ccaf780cb55.md) -- The Decision component supports certain functions and operators described in the topic. Use this topic as a reference.
          - [Properties of the Conditions components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a670d0938b4038be8112b9dc26b8bc13fee32efb.md) -- Learn about the properties for the Conditions components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Connectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/724057fa2074761ac6894e87667dcbb3be6568d0.md) -- The Connectors provide specialized abilities, such as automating tasks with Microsoft Excel spreadsheets and Microsoft Word documents. Connectors are different from components because they expose multiple methods and they are used differently.
          - [Chromium connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/112ca88db5222a7c49070dad739574f1d33dfae5.md) -- The Chromium connector enables you to interact with various elements in web applications running on Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge Edge and build automations around them.
            - [Configure the Chromium connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1657359cacd284f7f4554173023e664c573d71cd.md) -- Capture one or more web pages from the Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge browser and then the elements on the web pages by configuring the Chromium connector.
            - [Use the Capture element dialog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/990ca9e3f110627552782667059b31c6f36f7aa0.md) -- Identify and capture the elements on a web-based, Java, or Windows application screen by using the Capture element dialog.
            - [Chromium connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ea4eaa7b885048e2b0c7b413c9a5516bf3b3615.md) -- The Chromium connector methods do different tasks on the applications, screens, and the elements on the screens of the Google Chrome and the Microsoft Edge browsers.
            - [Add the ServiceNow RPA Edge extension](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c1058c8f20a558772a88079f33af51529ad4032b.md) -- Add the ServiceNow RPA Edge extension to your Edge browser to enable the Chromium connector to interact with the elements on the web applications that are opened in this browser.
          - [Counter](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/55488ed918e6c9e9f53dd0308a06a07a87c8f7f4.md) -- The Counter connector increments or decrements integers as part of an automation Workflow in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Counter connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1ad2738846df628746560d20a3a4cffac13746d3.md) -- The Counter connector methods increment, decrement, or reset integers as part of an automation Workflow in RPA Desktop Design Studio. All methods have properties that you can update.
            - [Counter method properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5280a55c321b70c65c9eef7b8f24314539d3bd0f.md) -- View or update the Counter method properties.
