          - [Windows connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/acc042767e3f3a5bfd87d699feed8cafbf4de9cf.md) -- The Windows connector enables you to perform various actions on the Windows applications, and their user interface elements. These actions are performed through the methods provided by the Windows connector. You must configure the connector to expose its methods.
            - [Configure Windows connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c1460271d670f64a6f1bab7fe7ebc5bb0bf38d73.md) -- Configure the Windows connector to access its methods and build automation on a Windows application. It provides methods at different levels and you must first configure it to expose methods at all levels.
            - [Windows Connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d684302a88160bf51dd43aef974deabfd19dcfa5.md) -- The Windows methods in RPA Desktop Design Studio interact with the Windows applications to perform various tasks. The connector provides methods at different levels of the Windows applications.
            - [Parameters of the Windows connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/934efbd96e9b0b0897dda2ced7954031996e10e1.md) -- Learn about the parameters of the Windows connector methods in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Application level method parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/34dde1fe9d34f66cefe48af4bbdd41d1a8233f8b.md) -- These parameters pass custom specifications to the various applications such as Java, Google Chrome , Windows , and Mainframe. Based on the specifications, the applications return an output. The process is a part of a Robotic Process Automation .
          - [Element level method parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9ab9d9905d1820797045e900feecba8dc0f4717a.md) -- These parameters pass custom specifications to the elements in various applications such as Java, Google Chrome , Windows , and Mainframe. Based on the specifications, the applications return an output. The process is a part of a Robotic Process Automation .
        - [Data Modellers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/672fbdd6c1574548aa84ea3b547dea5f764003ba.md) -- The Data Modeller creates templates by adding fields or data to PDF and XML documents. It also provides methods to classify the templates and use the fields or data created.
          - [Use the XmlTemplate component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8bf20542ae448431da3dbc90ac2a2fc497ffba84.md) -- Create templates from existing XML or PDF documents by adding custom data or fields to the documents.
          - [View the XmlTemplate methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6ecd46afa6603f8f69e0f5c03ee0668bf03a7fb6.md) -- After configuring the XmlTemplate connector, you can expose its methods.
          - [XmlTemplate connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d01cb3a0fec9aa9e79cbeb2b1eb0bd10eb266235.md) -- The XMLTemplate methods classify the templates and get the fields added to the templates.
          - [Parameters of the XmlTemplate connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b15ae6cb63703b312d9b0d1ca721841fb8b05c6e.md) -- Learn about the various parameters of the XmlTemplate connector methods in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Properties of the XmlTemplate methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b18efe8d013bee504ad709cd1581fda7d2de792b.md) -- Learn about the properties of the XmlTemplate methods in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [General](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9793146a592c2a26ece887419558695870cea27b.md) -- The RPA Desktop Design Studio General components automate diverse use cases. Examples range from execute a database query to passing a variable.
          - [Use the Confirm component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3dc871dfb6742ed59f4bd49c2c1f4fd3283b98e9.md) -- Set a confirmation message that is shown in a dialog box requiring user inputs by using the Confirm component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Input component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/80678b763465ac4180d1e4e05588023555c0fd24.md) -- Set up a user input dialog with by using the Input component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Input Password component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e35bab31d1b9e609490158b7d4b82b3577ab8cc1.md) -- Set up a password input form by using the Input Password component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Show component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/18ca28b100a77f4b846596507ecfacc507ca0b97.md) -- Display custom messages as part of a Attended Robot automation by using the Show component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio
          - [Use the Variable component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7489aa33d721306067645e5f357e7d6104104c06.md) -- Create a variable in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Try Catch component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6275fa75ff77e1e36a2f365755bafc5c21895736.md) -- Catch an error or exception that occurs in a component in an automation and transfer control to the other components within the automation.
          - [Use the Expression component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/db7fa9f2e81fa8f1391362604a29dc69b5488e1a.md) -- Perform mathematical and logical operations with various operands and operators using the Expression component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. The Expression component supports multiple operators and functions for you to use.
          - [Use the Find Window component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f8e06b600d71b6b4256139a87ddf91f95bf1dbec.md) -- Set the focus back on various windows that are inactive or running in the background as part of a Robotic Process Automation workflow in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Parallel component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/760e0848efcad60de86512dad5735337b5c0c9ae.md) -- Execute multiple components in a sequence to perform multiple actions. The Parallel component exposes multiple threads that can execute multiple components as part of a Robotic Process Automation in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Script component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/daf91a4b005b896105c2242078493b5230c3de10.md) -- Write and execute custom Visual Basic (VB) scripts by using the Script component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the SQL component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c5b828dfef9d099738f1865150d63f490f9b44c4.md) -- Write custom SQL queries to perform various operations by using the SQL component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Start App component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/de873b45a9724d6a647a3050c8ebdc6dd48522ea.md) -- Start or launch an application or file by using the START APP component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Format Text component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/92991ccbf327aa95784fb550bdefa7fd6994b170.md) -- Format the text by using variable placeholders and line and tab variables with the Format Text component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can update the text and their positions easily by just updating the variable placeholders and the line and tab variables.
          - [Use the Terminate component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/841623bce1b6a851401136ba4e018c439b1849f8.md) -- Abort an automation by using the Terminate component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Throw Error component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cc481c5db229c0fbadb6c000fb621ecbdfb42a1c.md) -- Raise an exception during the automation process to indicate something incorrect has occurred by using the Throw Error component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Wait For Time component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ea9bfd34c9417ad43150c3c91a8cf1859eb31b7e.md) -- Set a wait time by using the Wait For Time component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Supported functions for the Expression components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d2b135e0168884062322d4703ed7a87aae0b45e7.md) -- Learn about the various functions for the Expression components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Properties of the General components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3d947be138e4d1509541d3591ee8316f0f4f5eb7.md) -- Learn about the properties of the General components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [ITSM connector](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9f7d424a6ae831c9f934775d6905e9462141eac2.md) -- The ITSM connector comprises two connectors: the Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) and PowerShell. The WMI connector enables you to interact with the Windows Operating System to get important information and the PowerShell connector enables you to perform various actions on IT services.
          - [PowerShell connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0cfcd99a6ea97d07b73a6464d510a03b12c0cecc.md) -- The PowerShell connector methods act as interfaces with the Microsoft PowerShell to send requests and get responses in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Parameters of the PowerShell connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/aebea1ff5727731f6a91de9bc842071daf41d412.md) -- Learn about the various parameters of the Microsoft PowerShell connector methods in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [WMI connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6c5dd844e88f59dd5e2a1d7be7cabb0a581437a3.md) -- The Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) connector methods act as interfaces with the WMI to send various requests and get responses in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Parameters for WMI connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d8da2ffcef98844c0c8999e27218309005029569.md) -- The parameters for the Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) connector methods enable you to send custom inputs to the WMI to perform different actions such as get disk details, environment value, CPU usage, and more as part of an automation Workflow in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Loops](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d843de97bb72cbb63519a83ef398df3923845e51.md) -- The Loops provide a set of components that implement the concepts of loops, for each, and while as part of an automation Workflow in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Break component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/beebbe2958f9d450f0ca3d25ae65bd8f43f06180.md) -- Break a loop at any time with the Break component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the For Each component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b7e9d01fa3b6a60cf336d8112cdaa0663e9f8dda.md) -- Traverse each item in a collection in the order of first to last using the For Each component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. The collection can be an array, list, or a table.
          - [Use the For Loop component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b75434adc3a122594c758bc02d10bc20eff4ba5a.md) -- Execute a code recurrently to perform tasks of repetitive nature with the For Loop component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. The For Loop is a control flow component for specifying iterations.
          - [Use the While component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0069a15348f0a4910529434f4fb1b08312ea8644.md) -- Execute a code until a specified condition is true using the While component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Properties of the Loops components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c8ffbef46cb1c1289e75beaf176653b267f8ef76.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Loops components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [RPA Hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/277e724de27689946f0c80dae3e4560f42ba30c9.md) -- The components under RPA Hub enable interactions with the RPA Hub and ServiceNow platforms. The robots designed in RPA Desktop Design Studio can interact with various ServiceNow platform-related features. You can find components to do the same under this category.
          - [Common](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/951e75030b0c883fde65ae91a375b0cdb50d1a7b.md) -- The common components enable you to connect to a RPA Hub instance and impersonate a robot under a bot process.
            - [Use the GetProcessJobSysID component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/318de5782ba77e2b5c71191e867dd69431610a89.md) -- Retrieves the process job SysID of a process job record when an automation gets executed by a robot. By using the GetProcessJobSysID component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio application, you can identify when the robot is in a free state to execute a process or you can identify the state of the process job.
            - [Use the GracefulStop component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/280d31fe05cca665e804ba3b40fbd476da26f36e.md) -- Verify that an automation from RPA Hub doesn't stop abruptly by using the GracefulStop component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. With this component, you can define a secure termination point within an automation process and automate housekeeping activities such as closing in-use applications or performing clean-up operations.
            - [Properties of the Common components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/71826eb1255bff8fc6cfaff708a5024f34ce8a17.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Common components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Credentials](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46a571025d3e664171a80eccb8539c4a68ee9eb9.md) -- The Credentials components retrieve or update the login credentials in the RPA Hub applications.
            - [Use the GetApplicationCredential component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d694314da9f8c41ac424c78f572c665ff57964e.md) -- When login credentials for an RPA Hub application are already set in RPA Hub, retrieve the credentials by using the GetApplicationCredential component.
            - [Use the SetApplicationCredential component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/02c3d55a6862f1fd0fb63a7774d440dca618de28.md) -- Set or update the login credentials in RPA Hub applications by using the SetApplicationCredential component.
            - [Properties of the Credentials components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7a608af8c15fc2699c0a73809cdb4d7f0f4a0762.md) -- To set the properties of a Credentials component, double-click a component and enter the values in the Properties pane.
          - [Process Parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/522454a9f530619aed0ac6a79fd30eea0c63b5b1.md) -- The Process parameters components enable you to get or update the values of the process parameters you had set for bot processes in the RPA Hub.
            - [Use the GetProcessParameter component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ca968c4f890adf527a8efd151bc4d5404f456a16.md) -- Get the value of a specific process parameter you had set for a bot process in RPA Hub with the GetProcessParameter component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetProcessParameters component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/139f94601c52a246ec599df1085e9fcb53750bc1.md) -- Get the values of a process parameter you had set for a bot process in RPA Hub with the GetProcessParameters component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. The component returns both the individual values of the parameters and all values as an object.
            - [Use the SetProcessParameter component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/aae62a6262879ce38ecc3ed42902c03fe4f2e924.md) -- Update the value of an existing process parameter you had set for a bot process in the RPA Hub with the SetProcessParameter component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Process Parameters components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ea6269a9fdb875d4fbcbd753f04524a93ce25c99.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Process Parameters components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Queue](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f9db2cf12b3d215f2e8ab4953c50f9e99c68c2a2.md) -- The Queue connector enables you to create and manage work items on a queue created in the RPA Hub.
            - [Queue connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/049e10de235846ec7400685da638d5e92de6c6b9.md) -- The Queue connector methods enable you to create and manage work items for queues in the RPA Hub.
            - [Parameters for the Queue connector methods](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2be5986c1a71dc1aa69c0f0ce181cc99d2529c6d.md) -- Learn about the various parameters for the Queue connector methods in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Shared Parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cd5c65644ad202be1d26bf860be572d899af8308.md) -- You can set parameters and their values that are shared across bot processes in the RPA Hub. The Shared Parameters components enable you to get the values of one or more such parameters.
            - [Use the GetSharedParameters component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e4d2bbdaf9aebaadf5e47846e0712c898b31c462.md) -- Get the values of multiple shared parameters set up for multiple bot processes on the RPA Hub using the GetSharedParameters component.
            - [Use the SetSharedParameter component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7c96195aa04eaba6c9257c2428a90e483b9d73bf.md) -- Update the value of a specific shared parameter that you had set for multiple bot processes on the RPA Hub by using the SetSharedParameter component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the shared parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7b80cda2a380f7de881868b1bcb5daf1cabceb38.md) -- Learn about the properties of the shared parameters in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Use the Log component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/60466b3601dca0f1e3c3ba2fcfe4a9c376213b06.md) -- Capture custom messages as automation logs by using the Log component in an automation in RPA Desktop Design Studio. With this component, you can write custom messages as automation logs and view them from a unified space so that you can track the progress of an automation.
        - [Security](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6f70e78f20194a809c2fc297a910562ff2bd82f4.md) -- The Security components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio perform data security operations such as Microsoft Data Protection API and data encryption.
          - [DPAPI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c783060056fe1ffbd88914f1d64171bdce7b2b12.md) -- The DPAPI components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio secure data by applying the Microsoft DPAPI.
            - [Use the Protect component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5aea079b5d8ba32d1e16f522197aff1c8c6dc6a1.md) -- Encrypt a string with the DPAPI algorithm from the Microsoft by using the Protect component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. The component returns the encrypted form of the data you provide.
            - [Use the ProtectData component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/86b137dad03eccb884e3a475c1a85ea66cbc655f.md) -- Encrypt and save string data to a file with the ProtectData component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Unprotect component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8b17ffdf4e737a753c72a662725366a2bb8af262.md) -- Decrypt an encrypted string using the Unprotect component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can use the component on strings encrypted by the ProtectData or any other application as part of a Workflow. The Unprotect component returns the decrypted string or data.
            - [Use the UnProtectData component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3a08004369f321092a52603c1129fb8807f1226e.md) -- Decrypt an encrypted string that is saved in a file with the UnProtectData component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the DPAPI components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6bdbdd472cbd86a373d37760866c2066fb138474.md) -- Learn about the properties of the DPAPI components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Encryption components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3775aac7dc288cdf92334f9ccae20f7e531ad7b5.md) -- The RPA Desktop Design Studio secures data through encryption, file hashes, and encoding. This feature of RPA Desktop Design Studio can be the part of a workflow.
            - [Use the DecryptString component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e724fbe5c8c30ab7f05d612546905fe50930ac9d.md) -- Decrypt an encrypted string by providing the encryption key using the Decrypt String component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the EncryptString component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b4ed1d7ed64c660c7f337327dd755ec97095ddec.md) -- Encrypt a string by providing the encryption key with the EncryptString component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GenerateFileHash component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bff5b15b6d4db59bf52bb231d8108a05de415e59.md) -- Generate the file HashCode for any file using the GenerateFileHash component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SecureStringDecode component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/870682fd982024ce23d02920dff887947d32da0e.md) -- Decode a secure string by using the SecureStringDecode component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SecureStringEncode component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5ec2417beb68d3aa32f55b7f62cce259d63c8dcd.md) -- Encode a string to secure it by using the Secure String Encode component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Encryption components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/089777d9db934120373b39d924e9d6993cb26fad.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Encryption components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [ServiceNow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/76cf4f6a0b23005cb13d88d51fca5451712e29c2.md) -- The ServiceNow components enable you to interact with ServiceNow platform features such as the Flow Designer, manage attachments from table records, and trigger embedded task automations.
          - [Flow Designer components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e1d046583539487cb9b09c2b2331c0e4943e035f.md) -- The Flow Designer components let you invoke flows, subflows, and actions from Workflow Studio and use them as part of a workflow. You can also use these components to determine a flow's output or execution status.
            - [Use the InvokeFlow component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/239edb441a2611e2277e41ef71e667dbc79bb525.md) -- Invoke or call a flow that is available in Workflow Studio by using the InvokeFlow component of RPA Desktop Design Studio. Generate the context ID of the flow and use the ID in other flow designer components to get the execution status and output.
            - [Use the GetExecutionStatus component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/abdfff5e1cd5f9086defb80dffbc43c6de8b33f0.md) -- Use the GetExecutionStatus component to determine the execution status of a flow or a subflow in Workflow Studio.
            - [Use the GetOutputs component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/19e2c730d17d6e7a2e69a83a6119d915da320b75.md) -- Use the GetOutputs component to get the output of a flow or a subflow in Workflow Studio.
            - [Use the InvokeSubFlow component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a172dc310bbfd498826f5a31a8b0c60e62b9499f.md) -- The InvokeSubFlow component returns the context ID of a subflow in Workflow Studio so you can use it in other components. For example, you can use the context ID to get the execution status or the output of a subflow.
            - [Use the InvokeAction component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a5e64405b31f0e22b04605573f4f4f6c1a0f625c.md) -- The InvokeAction component returns the context ID of an action in Workflow Studio so you can use it in other components. For example, you can use the context ID to get the execution status or the output of an action.
            - [Properties of the Flow Designer components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f0f1ee93d16cdd606875665b7a46906cfaa400ba.md) -- To set the properties of a Flow Designer component, double-click the component and enter the values in the Properties pane.
          - [Attachments](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/97b62ab9df1c6b33437c5684b0355ee268b389be.md) -- The Attachment components enable you to upload or download attachments from table records in the RPA Hub and get the metadata of the attachments.
            - [Use the DownloadAttachment component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3259d2a556906a2b31c516b3153b65c91efb092c.md) -- Download the attachments from the ServiceNow table record to the local drive by using the DownloadAttachment component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetAttachmentsMetadata component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c997d2cc4b9aab5f56313358af7a17f10e9ef47c.md) -- Get the metadata of all attachments that are associated with a ServiceNow table record by using the GetAttachmentsMetadata component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the UploadAttachment component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d3547d64bf477e59b98f2ebc2650a82000563186.md) -- Attach documents to a table record in the RPA Hub by using the UploadAttachment component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Attachment components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5f72a2be4050990017e61ea59b872ec2b60ccf7b.md) -- Learn about the various properties of the Attachment components.
          - [Forms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0594066d5b322458cb153c260bd58e2f8b4d30bf.md) -- The Forms components help you to trigger attended automations that are enabled with the Embedded Task Automation.
            - [Use the AttendedConfigurations component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/af05a8e1c89b2f7d6836c600d83bb19137a66874.md) -- When you use the AttendedConfigurations component, it shows a list of attended configurations associated to the selected same bot process. To select and give control out port for each configuration that routes the automation logic.
            - [Use the GetProcessFieldParameters component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5a44e25e7bcf09763263592c33989f854993c72b.md) -- Gets the values of the associated Table fields mapped to the process field parameter, that you had configured in an attended configuration record of a bot process. The component returns both the individual values of the parameters and all values as an object. This component reads the value of the associated Table field in the ServiceNow form record.
            - [Use the GetRecordContextID component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ecbb641dfe9d1ed527fc819decaa7b3929cf276f.md) -- Get the Sys ID of the ServiceNow form record that is associated to an attended configuration with the GetRecordContextID component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. Sys ID is the output of the component. For example, Sys ID is used to fetch the attachments in a record.
            - [Use the SetProcessFieldParameters component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1cb1062d5c653d2bd66aecc7c7650cb942712836.md) -- Sets the values of the associated Table fields mapped to the process field parameter, that you had configured in an attended configuration record of a bot process. This component updates the values of the configured field parameters associated to the Table field in the ServiceNow form record.
            - [Properties of the Forms components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bf4f5e2ab45d5323085e17e320aca9221911cea3.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Forms components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Utilities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/055a13477184f78420ae640a71d039a2932b9a5d.md) -- The Utilities components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enable diverse and wide-range useful operations. The utilities range from changing screen resolution to extracting zipped files.
          - [Barcode](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b048833f0e33f096aaff157c8373f1d66a6cb83d.md) -- The Barcode components in RPA Desktop Design Studio accept an image file that contains one or more barcodes and return the barcode values.
            - [Use the ReadBarcode component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/27de21e4d2c08679cb8ab6c18b82fd40103c8822.md) -- Read a single barcode and return its contents by using the ReadBarcode component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ReadBarcodes component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cf179254f4effe1e329b11279eab9748143605d0.md) -- Read multiple barcodes and return their contents by using the ReadBarcode component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Barcode components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/73411195f3ed1b9f8c9f4d1a596bce013ca8e8eb.md) -- Use the properties of the Barcode components to set a delay before or after a component executes, or to set a timeout that stops execution when the component doesn't finish within a period that you set.
          - [Screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b5211278ad6f947fbb1d2afc2a1e8875216cd61d.md) -- The screen components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enable capturing program windows and changing screen resolution.
            - [Use the Capture component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c1b3ad33ece111b49ca65e9376ba3da5e4e781fc.md) -- Capture a screen or a window in the desktop or an application as part of an automation Workflow using the Capture component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio .
            - [Use the CaptureWindow component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bbbd65c7b908a1001edeea1746ab4c6ef161099.md) -- Capture the image of an application window as part of an automation Workflow by using the CaptureWindow component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ChangeResolution component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e95c92e03ae12e8791c4917a3c674db6e9e85f58.md) -- Change the resolution of a user's system screen as part of an automation Workflow by using the ChangeResolution component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetResolution component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0900daec5888f99f71d37f2bf643f7c150d5bb53.md) -- Get the resolution of the current screen by using the GetResolution component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Screen components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/12c51279d897cfd72788821e77a6432d4609f807.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Screen components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Clipboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/85b35250fa3ee3d6e666dbf59d1c124e4105565e.md) -- The Clipboard components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enables the clipboard, copy, and extraction operations on files.
            - [Use the Clear component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c9bd2cfb3832cdceefbb25ed719a09efb590840e.md) -- Clear the contents of the clipboard as part of an automation Workflow using the Clear component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetAsTable component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0d50c56d0182b75fcd44bcd6f60ba310eaa335a8.md) -- Get the content of the clipboard as a data table as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetAsTable component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetFileDropList component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/55a3d7637810df2743ad421f9686be382e849ab8.md) -- Get a list of file names as a string array from the Windows clipboard by using the GetFileDropList component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetImage component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1f389a6f75a2a9a6e8c085a56b5dcd9e1f3b4675.md) -- Get an image from the clipboard by using the GetImage component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetText component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cae85ac14fb93b0dc7aeb5972e494ad32357f1ee.md) -- Get text from the clipboard and return as a string by using the GetText component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SetFileDropList component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2393c5ca0d19e884dad64abcb2ff185408a1e061.md) -- Clear the clipboard and then add a collection of file names by using the SetFileDropList component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SetImage component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5bee4942a9a87379a6d78008c28ea9084ff960b0.md) -- Copy an image to the clipboard by using the SetImage component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SetText component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d58fa651d3ae579ca21312f4d9d5b0bcdf1e493a.md) -- Copy a text string to the Windows clipboard as part of an automation Workflow by using the SetText component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Clipboard components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1f2f8cdf78ebb284dbc5aad4336181ccdd066b13.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Clipboard components in RPA Desktop Design Studio Clipboard utility.
          - [Data Reader](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e35ad10a6235f116927f48bb515d352274247d14.md) -- The Data Reader components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enable reading of data from different programs such as MS Excel and CSV.
            - [Use the GetExcelSheetNames component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/849e2c9736ada23e427fb28788bd7d4b5bf67dde.md) -- Get the names of the sheets in an Excel file as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetExcelSheetNames component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the QueryExcel component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8afcd6a17f004ff694fae50204a314ab9c0e365d.md) -- Query data from a Microsoft Excel file with the QueryExcel component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ReadFromCSV component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2a8b17daa1b12a4e36b58e5c5b5779106c5705de.md) -- Read data from a CSV file by using the ReadFromCSV component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the ReadFromXPS component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fc1fcf156c7b2c50b76e5728452308324d59e23d.md) -- Read the data from an XPS file by using the ReadFromXPS component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Data Reader components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/17b189e62120a74ea7f45718ad4746194ac38b52.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Data Reader components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Data Writer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/85bb01b3f3ba5cad93fbcb77c064ed28544f93b5.md) -- The Data Writer components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio writes data to different programs such as MS Excel and CSV.

            - [Use the WriteText component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c00afeb1cf27be552be6faea46cec38ad8a1cb0d.md) -- Write the data to a text document as part of an automation Workflow by using the WriteText component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can add the data in string format to existing string on the text file or replace the existing data with new data.
            - [Properties of the Data Writer components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e44fe2dec208e54aec492c1abcee24a24f08ce81.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Data Writer components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [DateTime](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/17c62e9b9beba360ef49a3421eb8ee23d753723b.md) -- The DateTime components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enables different useful operations with date and time.
            - [Use the Add component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8e0a421ab135c53086752e94ca6969908e1685e8.md) -- Increase or decrease the time or date by the value you specify as part of a Workflow with the Add component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Compare component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dd8279710930013fbdfba36d72751b61b6eeed6b.md) -- Compare two dates and time to find out whether the dates are the same by using the Compare component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Format component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f94ec42680047346904ae89898c5d2b54c19e937.md) -- Change the format of a date by using the Format component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetPart component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e2f51d5a966e8127743e206303e841f919bbad05.md) -- Get the value of a part of the date format by using the GetPart component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. For example, you might want to get the value of the month in the MM/DD/YYYY format.
            - [Use the IsLeapYear component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5432187d187742579d4d8760469e14e1f1255470.md) -- Specify a year to find out whether it's a leap year by using the IsLeapYear component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Now component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/eae0e8dad2d5fbc668e2f0c54c4a02dd70625929.md) -- Get the current date and time of the system as part of an automation Workflow by using the component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Today component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/56be2046579b9b658e560802456818a441ba1f35.md) -- Get the current date of the system by using the Today component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the UtcNow component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3c5f79f6fd2f84564970f437fc9dd933f5a84ee7.md) -- Get the current date and time of the system in the Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) format by using the UtcNow component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the DateTime components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/251027fd75f196aad96bd7be3ff8630274c4cb24.md) -- Learn about the properties of the DateTime components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Debug](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/be9b72e2b3637f406a9d9b99bb469cac0f378f47.md) -- The Debug components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enable writing logs to the console log and verify whether a project is running from the RPA Desktop Design Studio or a robot.
            - [Use the ConsoleLog component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2b1f9faa992b89c04876a426896c53878d20f621.md) -- Write a message to view the console log of RPA Desktop Design Studio by using the ConsoleLog component.
            - [Use the IsRunningFromStudio component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c80616093596780171301ef306052514e61d44a9.md) -- Determine whether a project is run by studio as part of an automation Workflow using the IsRunningFromStudio component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the IsRunningInBotsession component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6d36a8e8b9131bf4a0f8c9be9ac3c960c46e7803.md) -- Determine if a project is running in a Bot session as part of an automation Workflow by using the IsRunningInBotsession component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Debug components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ff65a5bc8032567a656607c50b3b54ba414d740e.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Debug components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Dialogs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4bea6caad9c87b02ece556a16eb54edb3c76c69a.md) -- The Dialogs group of components performs basic operations on file and folder dialogs as part of an attended automation.
            - [Use the OpenFileDialog component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/56cdaa34764e10cc110330b156c5ee40b2b49417.md) -- Open a file dialog from where you can open a file using the OpenFileDialog component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the LockUIDialog component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c487991d5d3a1d92cdc56dadeea63edd216c55dc.md) -- Provide additional authentication to any step of your attended automation by using the LockUIDialog component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio application.
            - [Use the OpenFolderDialog component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/972c9b622a048139665dcf10cf928fd9f7e8da82.md) -- Open a folder dialog so you can open a folder from there with the OpenFolderDialog component. After opening the folder dialog, you can create a folder.
            - [Use the SaveFileDialog component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5cb9e9bd0993b9308225dcc98c9dd74ad10c3df2.md) -- Save a file to a folder using the SaveFileDialog component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. By default, the component opens the last file dialog you had opened.
            - [Dialog component properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/58eee77b3477e6ccec0a63ac4a1fdc4fb6a2d9cf.md) -- Refer to the descriptions of the properties of the Dialog components. You can update the properties, if required.
          - [Environment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5b3532b0c1a6773c2be4f3b7f37c4bcfc2ac8f91.md) -- The Environment components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio retrieve information and perform specific operations on the Windows environment.
            - [Use the CurrentDirectory component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d831248e79f8ab3fcf4694966388efe2125a3362.md) -- Find out the current working directory and its path by using the CurrentDirectory component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetEnvironmentVariable component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/066809730293a798235a5f5c6f36fef2dd1f8cd6.md) -- Retrieve the value of an environment variable by using the GetEnvironmentVariable component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. For example, you can get the value of the TEMP variable.
            - [Use the Is64BitOperatingSystem component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/178098df966919a29b0c579ed52cb805e55b5ea3.md) -- Determine if an operating system is 64 bits as part of an automation Workflow by using the Is64BitOperatingSystem component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the MachineName component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/078f1b197d8ebe13554b35bb7feb13a7352a8180.md) -- Retrieve the name of your computer as part of an automation Workflow by using the MachineName component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ResolvePath component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3d788bd589abb8f115c8a709b9a88f16f500a872.md) -- Find the path of your current automation project as part of an automation Workflow by using the ResolvePath component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. You must specify the parameter, for example, %projectpath% to get the path.
            - [Use the SetEnvironmentVariable component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ab0b13c244f9554a5c880572d023ae8e0a4136c4.md) -- Create or update an environment variable as part of an automation Workflow by using the SetEnvironmentVariable component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. These variables persist across activities and can be retrieved later using GetEnvironmentVariable.
            - [Use the SpecialFolderPath component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/001914ad9351e11db566c3321edc03a7b3bffcff.md) -- Retrieve the path to a special folder In Windows based on the name you specify by using the SpecialFolderPath component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SystemDirectory component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2df5c984bf2317d9513ad42f575e1311a20b9a8b.md) -- Retrieve the path to the system directory as part of an automation Workflow by using the SystemDirectory component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the UserDomain component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/17fd41d75216e9c5ac9aa6f7604f2810c3d154bc.md) -- Retrieve the user domain name that is associated with a current user as part of an automation Workflow by using the UserDomain component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the UserName component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8f26b5a11f5bc72376d937455a8b967b3a677f75.md) -- Retrieve the user name of the user who is currently logged on to the Windows machine as part of an automation Workflow by using the UserName component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Environment components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/380bcb81bdb359dc23febf0c18e49c69615a5324.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Environment components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [File](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/67a6a584ff41fd262b52c43504853d56ffe3813e.md) -- The File components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio perform standard operations on the Windows files and directories. For example, copying files or retrieving temporary file names.
            - [Use the AppendBytes component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b71af39b6c0477b83b2c7e03f3438158a307ae1b.md) -- Append bytes to a file as part of an automation Workflow by using the AppendBytes component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the AppendText component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6ca57a733919b4cb55a4a1903addcbd3b322b049.md) -- Add text to an existing text of a file as part of an automation Workflow by using the AppendText component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ChangeExtension component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d3e4d1deae8c6dea2d403955dbf7971dae385df1.md) -- Change the extension of a file by using the ChangeExtension component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Combine component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f2880c448ae67839ade37429602be96ce19eaf37.md) -- Combine two paths to create a single path with the Combine component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. For example, C:\Users could be the first path and \Data\TestFolder could be the second path and both could be combined to create the path C:\Users\Data\TestFolder.
            - [Use the CopyFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1e69973aad36c26c83ad11c8f8187d8e4949a999.md) -- Copy an existing file to a new location by using the CopyFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the DeleteFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/555329cd7909c9e677c0de672f21ed01e1b948c5.md) -- Delete a file from the location you specify as part of an automation Workflow by using the DeleteFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the FileExists component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/77876741f708587de2d694f82ae64ee460b76fe6.md) -- Find out whether the file you specify exists as part of an automation Workflow by using the FileExists component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetDirectoryName component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f58539fa8a812383b1fe70e29a550cba12295176.md) -- Get the directory name of the specified path as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetDirectoryName component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetExtension component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5cd13b8d8edcd4d6ab374fcdf00010ea9719e12a.md) -- Get the extension of a file and know its type as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetExtension component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetFileName component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5e688181f0c8c33f44ae9fa2ce0932d409f9aa76.md) -- Get the name of a file as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetFileName component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetFileNameWithoutExtension component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6cbe367017d901eb9ec50d732ddce4ab112258fa.md) -- Get the name of a file without its extension as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetFileNameWithoutExtension component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetLastModifiedFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/86e999ff47756f37c0018c397019bdadf83b9d00.md) -- Get the name and path to the last modified file in a directory by using the GetLastModifiedFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetPathRoot component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/178313bfbf202549c2f866d06cc64ba9e156e899.md) -- Get the name of the root folder or directory of a path by using the GetPathRoot component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetRandomFileName component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa0b0c9f2aa93c0bdb5f565b85fd3c1812913139.md) -- Get randomly generated file names and their extensions by using the GetRandomFileName component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetTempFileName component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/42218f4ebe49f04eb1d7cdc7deacd63bc0ed08dc.md) -- Get the names of temporary Windows files by using the GetTempFileName component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the HasExtension component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b610e6fb6bd4c18a79116b21bf51fd19fcd8187f.md) -- Find out whether a file has an extension by using the HasExtension component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the IsPathRooted component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6df326b6d04805aaf235a6546cbe8b449ccb6f8a.md) -- Find out if the path you specify has a root folder by using the IsPathRooted component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the MoveFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bedee2c37fa43586bd905aed0a9b0e1cbb2aad2.md) -- Move a file from an existing location to a new location as part of an automation Workflow by using the MoveFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ReadBytes component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c9dad6ac12a14df0a65fa3404924697432ff2dc2.md) -- Read the specified number of bytes as part of an automation Workflow by using the ReadBytes component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ReadText component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/feebdaa0617c3f1b9f5c53d52d139e15e661fd25.md) -- Return all text in a file as output by using the ReadText component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the RenameFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f53cfa368688416cb65f579f24997ac344cb5ffd.md) -- Rename a file and change the file type by using the RenameFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the WriteBytes component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3cde806edc63bafd75be2d17eed3453bc5eae775.md) -- Write the specified byte array to a file as part of an automation Workflow by using the WriteBytes component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the DirectoryExists component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6873459877eeea62427eaeae1090408051e96e9d.md) -- Find out if a directory exists by using the DirectoryExists component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetFiles component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e2542e5e68a671b10bbfe35bfa18a27fc7ed5c0e.md) -- Get the names of the files in the directory and subdirectories by using the GetFiles component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the GetSubFolders component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4a62740604a5f9fd9c85980d2f2ff2f3a2a6739c.md) -- Get the names of all subfolders under a directory by using the GetSubFolders component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the MoveDirectory component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/627a2cf16652b608b19bc6a82b38e25256a5a81a.md) -- Move a directory and its contents to a new location by using the MoveDirectory component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

          - [HTTP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/edbacbe3ac50dc600854449a0cdb871273310dcd.md) -- The HTTP components enable you to interact with servers over the HTTP protocol. You can download files or post content to the server using the components.

          - [Image Utilities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/23ecf17dea1b8c485926df826976bbe81aa39537.md) -- The Image utility components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio perform various useful operations on images. For example, adjust brightness or contrast or resize images.
            - [Use the AdjustBrightness component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/972cd4647c790ac6bf34a4813c3a61716747c8cd.md) -- Adjust the brightness of an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the AdjustBrightness component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the AdjustContrast component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4f474f528dbceda05e41a48fafa7651cb911449a.md) -- Adjust the contrast of an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the AdjustContrast component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Convert component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0fc3957317f3db7b0174072b9f53d6f07fa9e527.md) -- Convert the format of an image to a different format by using the Convert component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the DrawBorder component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7d30432ec0771d173282947ce256644aa04c04c2.md) -- Create a border around an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the DrawBorder component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the DrawRectangle component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a872680aac358ed500a57bc328a9c76db1191f41.md) -- Draw a rectangle on an image and specify its dimensions as part of an automation Workflow by using the DrawRectangle component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the DrawString component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a200ad1326d8db67a202312baed7b9b8b7c18b30.md) -- Draw a string on an image at a specific location and set the string's color, font style, and size as part of an automation Workflow by using the DrawString component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetPart component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d9b08d0384ea35380b214106d80ffc9acd922eb7.md) -- Crop and retrieve part of an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the GetPart component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Grayscale component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a9d367a9b223878f5ba4dbf56d4b00508f06c261.md) -- Convert a color image to grayscale as part of an automation Workflow by using the Grayscale component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ImageToString component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c066a3f134f0df1b45f703f6e0523c4ac70ac531.md) -- Extract text from an image and return the text as output by using the ImageToString component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Invert component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9354d8760bfc295e0b426fa4aa46fe4a123ca1b6.md) -- Invert the colors of an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the Invert component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. The component takes the original colors of the image you input and applies the exact opposite of the colors.
            - [Use the Median component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d36839ee8e198e756160156731d1586bd1f91ce.md) -- Apply the median filter to an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the Median component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ReadFromFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/231a0d3823429f39c2d764d1a051054902ece6fe.md) -- Read an image file from its path and name and return the image as an output by using the ReadFromFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Resize component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/180cae5dd9c7fadb2f497732004ec660cd8b8f5f.md) -- Resize an image by specifying the dimensions as part of an automation Workflow by using the Resize component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Save component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/74fd4ccc5f734c724c9ea41b5101a9537fc840dd.md) -- Save an image to a specific location as part of an automation Workflow by using the Save component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ScaleImage component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c2012319d01e6cc6ea0876704e0a087c906252c6.md) -- Scale the size or dimensions of an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the ScaleImage component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Sharpen component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/712c4484bb64314c68ca52468608636da0336006.md) -- Sharpen an image to enhance its appearance as part of an automation Workflow by using the Sharpen component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the StringToImage component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4bf4f18b7a1c7dc2196cba46a676429cb0f3fc57.md) -- Create an image from an input string as part of an automation Workflow by using the StringToImage component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Threshold component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b6b71f7d9073a63403051d6e9b1c0736aa4488c4.md) -- Apply the threshold filter to an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the Threshold component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Trim component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c89a87a53dd93cf8909cf8a7a2f36275ccfced42.md) -- Remove the transparent pixels from the borders of an image as part of an automation Workflow by using the Trim component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Image Utilities components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b75aa08eae72fda123afe90d5452d1314b111c6e.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Image Utilities components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/750fd04429063dc4a00444db4637539bca4d9967.md) -- The JSON components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio perform different operations on JSON objects. For example, serialize a JSON object or get JSON object properties.
            - [Use the DeserializeObject component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dd7668f9e8d0cf2eaf387a3f494fc7f0dc562753.md) -- Convert a string containing JSON data to a JSON object by using the DeserializeObject component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.             - [Use the GetProperties component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/de095a087326773bb4007c3e906b5b65b88daf70.md) -- Get the values of multiple properties from a JSON object by using the GetProperties component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetProperty component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/65d1094539cd942f5a91ab5a85c192dd832bbc25.md) -- Get the value of a property from a JSON object by using the GetProperty component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the JsonArrayToArray component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/85981bad7c9285c442c807a5f3322e29fc27fe60.md) -- Convert a JSON object to an array of objects using the JsonArrayToArray component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SerializeObject component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/039bc36b3a7f326b0ceecb7fe6f3656dd7147a20.md) -- Convert a JSON object to a string by using the SerializeObject component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the SetProperties component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/07714969a1f7752fdc83a690f051136ca86b0d5a.md) -- Set multiple properties within a JSON object by using the SetProperties component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can also override a property within the JSON object.
            - [Use the SetProperty component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46dbf61b8fae95f894127bc86e6bf33ed5fe8797.md) -- Set a property within a JSON object by using the SetProperty component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can also override a property within the JSON object.
            - [Properties of the JSON utilities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8cc27bdd1e59dc9e7c88fdb5ff63727db67ae8f5.md) -- Learn about the properties of the JSON utilities in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Keyboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bb81d858d041954a590a9af44d24e429e57261cb.md) -- The Keyboard component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio simulate keyboard strokes and shortcuts to perform various day-to-day actions on various applications and programs.
            - [Use the SendKeys component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8b6f042bfc288c40f2e32c970e70be13754d5e07.md) -- Simulate the actions of the standard Microsoft Windows supported keys on various applications and programs with the SendKeys component in the RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of keyboard components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/886c61205b20f61416d25a3d317ccdd2c4b270e7.md) -- Learn about the properties of the keyboard components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Math](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/797469c10ca6f3d7a1ea90d5d8f610e67996057e.md) -- The Math components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio perform simple mathematical operations. For example, find the highest integer or round off a decimal.
            - [Use the Max component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2d614f70a958fbd674ee2a682390afa49ef25310.md) -- Take two integers and find which one is larger as part of an automation Workflow by using the Max component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Min component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d597f51131b067c6febca07a5b1593b4bb2934fa.md) -- Take two integers and find which one is smaller as part of an automation Workflow by using the Min component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Round component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/678a9be3dd94b83835554f3ce1ebf69ad3e53636.md) -- Round a decimal to the closest integer as part of an automation Workflow by using the Round component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Math components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7064e0fafeb272aa7b3797f6da4d550df52440b5.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Math components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
          - [Mouse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/55f9ac192b2bca7a4b5827b4043547ad665f4b7d.md) -- The Mouse components enable you to perform various mouse device actions as part of a Workflow on various programs and applications.

            - [Use the Move component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/191df6e5b08b3f9fccb16423115da07ee59b3570.md) -- Move the mouse device to a precise location on the screen by specifying the parameters using the Move component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the Replace component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/31504574235ef1a18d4327ac36286b391a600543.md) -- Replace all occurrences of a word in a text with another word by using the Replace component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the Split component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6b7c93fcac2071e9ce22b7def4707405bbb5567f.md) -- Divide a string into substrings by applying a specified separator.             - [Use the SubString component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/61954f7a8c549f9c934bd624ed4a2363ee648d37.md) -- Retrieve a substring from a string by using the SubString component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can specify the start character position and length of the substring.
            - [Use the ToLowerCase component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/048709ba8d03b34cb8663d3ad7b4b19278f0d302.md) -- Convert an uppercase text to lowercase letters by using the ToLowerCase component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the ToUpperCase component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b881c7c8da4b7d9e5f74edaf16ebe7058b2fc893.md) -- Convert a lowercase text to uppercase by using the ToUpperCase component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the GetMainWindowHandle component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ae5da0dacdab45ca3c053230b0a96abdc4180866.md) -- Retrieve the window handle of a main window of an active process by using the GetMainWindowHandle component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
