            - [Use the GetMainWindowHandleAsInt component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/615d95b27c97a17c19e1bf09093274440bfb5692.md) -- Retrieve the window handle of a main window of an active process as an integer by using the GetMainWindowHandleAsInt component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the GetWindowProcessID component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f9cd470ffb561ae353345dec45d83437dc75ecbb.md) -- Retrieve the window handle of a main window of an active process as an integer by using the GetWindowProcessID component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the StartNew component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/102a1b7e0e1ece35b85d62644fbec67d191aa93c.md) -- Start a new process by using the StartNew component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Properties of the System Process components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e594f87bbcd28c2c0e05ae31bfbe10fbef0756fd.md) -- Learn about the properties of the System Process components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the AddFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f9d9cc749996af45782ab74d03aacfe95c703252.md) -- Add a file to an existing zip archive by using the AddFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the AddFiles component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e6aad2f73e7ac37721f222a930b16c13423462ef.md) -- Add multiple files to an existing zip archive by using the AddFiles component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the CreateFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/75318367f604ec940615b2dcb2843644565a947b.md) -- Zip an existing folder or create a zip file by using the CreateFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

            - [Use the ExtractFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e00445ad9d97fde7ba399ecc567d40cf2de1e329.md) -- Extract a file from a zip archive to a specified location by using the ExtractFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Use the RemoveFile component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2877d4dec31ff910732d68871c835cb2100b93c2.md) -- Delete a specified file in a zip archive by using the RemoveFile component in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
            - [Properties of the Zip components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cf00a6feb674cca6510d2e0f0c2aaada0a0cf2ef.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Zip components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.
        - [Wait](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/731be40284041cc5e2bec526be329bb140b57513.md) -- The Wait components in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enable you to detain or change the automation execution using the criteria provided in the component.
          - [Use the Wait For Images component](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f46e6f32c8ad8df764b38a0ca923effd4aa757e1.md) -- Change the automation execution flow that is based on the image information on the screen by using the Wait For Images component in RPA Desktop Design Studio. You can also identify the state of a business application or an item that is based on an error or status icon.
          - [Properties of the Wait components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0351b49b2e67b2ec840ea9a3ee0693be73fd34a3.md) -- Learn about the properties of the Wait components in RPA Desktop Design Studio.

          - [Methods and events of the TextBlock element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/31a5f8dcaea0f5fc3068057b353f2cac665d66a8.md) -- The TextBlock element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to add a label on the form so that your user can view that label as read-only information.
          - [Methods and events of the TextBox element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7f39fc0a787092cd49bf9c443a8a9ecd0434b9b2.md) -- The TextBox element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to add a text box to a form so that your user can provide information within that text box.
          - [Methods and events of the Date element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/02d4197be52500a17221ba0c3e5d2b312fd64604.md) -- The Date element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to provide a date picker on the form.           - [Methods and events of the Time element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ff33f06bf0087fa3f56700ad20a70d454b9319e6.md) -- The Time element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to provide a time picker on the form so that your user can select a specific time on the form.
          - [Methods and events of the DateTime element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1c91351672ecaefd175e90af9457a3ced19b618f.md) -- The DateTime element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to provide a date and time picker on the form so that your user can select a specific date and time on the form.
          - [Methods and events of the CheckBox element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/64b9dd2dfb79d7fbabeaa3ca648c4f64ad61d6e3.md) -- The CheckBox element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to capture true or false, yes or no, or on or off inputs from users. It helps in decision-making, enabling or disabling features, and controlling workflow execution.
          - [Methods and events of the RadioButton element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8450a862a8ba76a23e8cdd04c299c74a2459a2f5.md) -- The RadioButton element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to select a choice from a group of choices.
          - [Methods and events of the ComboBox element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/15859779e7d9b1c428d8f1f19c2dcaad6cc96d1e.md) -- The ComboBox element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to display the data in a drop-down combination box.
          - [Methods and events of the ListBox element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/78197f1d77262d73c1619fdc95f61c2f77627a93.md) -- The ListBox element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to display a list of items from which you can select one or more Items.
          - [Methods and events of the DataGrid element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7dc926a0d57c61803d1c631b25399b3ab28509a1.md) -- The DataGrid element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to display and manipulate tabular data.
          - [Methods and events of the PasswordBox element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e5308f3fcc6853cda51de23f83315fc5d1856449.md) -- The PasswordBox element in RPA Desktop Design Studio is a text box that displays placeholder characters while you type a string.
          - [Methods and events of the ImageControl element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/140180925e2c6076eb90d4e3da2ba9a6f6f0fc02.md) -- The ImageControl element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to display images in a form.
          - [Methods and events of the ImageViewer element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9db2f06c79aa8d01279a2d6854d20a483d69b5b2.md) -- The ImageViewer element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to open and view image files including JPEG, GIF, WMF, and other image formats in a form. You can also stretch and shrink images, rotate the images at different angles through all axis, and save them in different formats.
          - [Methods and events of the TabControl element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5f2188cd1153bd9b637d37b3ff0d6a337f0dedfb.md) -- The TabControl element in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to add one or more tabs in your form.
          - [Methods and events of the Web Browser element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6a394e3bbf67fc29296b83747312daf63dcc3c0.md) -- The Web Browser element in the RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to host web pages and provides web browsing capabilities to your application.
          - [Methods and events of the Form Renderer element](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90d2b2498753321e04d734a99f2d80b836dd71ad.md) -- The Form Renderer element in RPA Desktop Design Studio enables you to build forms quickly with controls such as TextBox, ComboBox, CheckBox, RadioButton, ToggleButton, Date, Time, and PasswordBox.
  - [Zero Copy Connectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6912ec62240a727952096813b0a2d99cf5f7940c.md) -- Power your AI agents and enrich workflows on the ServiceNow AI Platform with real-time data from across the enterprise using the ServiceNow Zero Copy Connectors application.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c6cbc78ab2e68c98c12615d854b0431985986bf1.md) -- Discover how the Zero Copy Connectors application unifies business and technology data from multiple sources, enabling centralized, real-time access to your enterprise data without copying it to your instance.
      - [Available connectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/513844f801267b2cc37af967a0feec099b1ef37f.md) -- Discover available connectors to use in a zero copy connection.
      - [Established connections](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/45b6843112cbda0f9fb0ab0d495780f417015058.md) -- Access data from external sources directly in the ServiceNow AI Platform, without copying any data to your instance using zero copy connections.
      - [Data fabric tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a984c06048956269578ad7a504202fad89d1e4f8.md) -- Fuel your AI agents and enrich workflows on the ServiceNow AI Platform with external data using data fabric tables.
    - [Primary connectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/963b83d2279eedc809d9810460aed038dbe7424e.md) -- Connect to external data sources using primary connectors in Zero Copy Connector Hub.

If the application does NOT include demo data or it does NOT install related applications and plugins, delete or revise the following sentence:If it isn't already installed, the app installs the Zero Copy Connector Hub.
      - [Create a connection administrator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4fc9a6c8e8736db5b117944426b6b1fe126bb15a.md) -- Create a connection admin who can create zero copy connections in Zero Copy Connector Hub.

        - [View the connection log](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90b7b6fdd74490086940205fa375a360349f6be4.md) -- Keep connection details current by updating service account information, authentication, or security settings.
        - [Deactivate a connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90b7b6fdd74490086940205fa375a360349f6be4.md) -- Keep connection details current by updating service account information, authentication, or security settings.
        - [Reactivate a connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90b7b6fdd74490086940205fa375a360349f6be4.md) -- Keep connection details current by updating service account information, authentication, or security settings.
        - [Delete a connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90b7b6fdd74490086940205fa375a360349f6be4.md) -- Keep connection details current by updating service account information, authentication, or security settings.

    - [Manage data fabric tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b161a57adea5018e1935a28042eec92189a740c3.md) -- Access data virtually from an external source or a local table on your instance using data fabric tables.
      - [Create a data fabric table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c063b783f73076ac0be0aa9bccf6f4336d7cae40.md) -- Retrieve data from an internal or external source by creating a data fabric table.
      - [Update data mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a2aaa826b6ba69f6724ff645b0a69514790d92d1.md) -- Update the data mapping between a source table and a data fabric table.
      - [Delete a data fabric table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c276b1bcdb4375f1c7eeb5287b300fddd1cc4c8e.md) -- Remove a data fabric table from your instance by deleting it.
      - [View data fabric table records](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/12b7b1c0e703f859f9e5c49cc083ad8e7f73af32.md) -- View the records that are currently in a data fabric table.
      - [Change a connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b735453cb3d0fc4cf3c4c5c0a5bb4eaf322d2db4.md) -- Connect a data fabric table to a different data source.
      - [Deploying a data fabric table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/71f57283efdc8420141144a3dfe3b2d733a30e92.md) -- Copy a data fabric table from one instance to another through an update set.
    - [Access real-time data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cf1c45c974589d24a8079ebbf84672123c4faea1.md) -- Fetch real-time data using a data fabric table instead of using the physical table included with an application.
      - [Connect to an external source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/053e226ee429c1f83e89da428e3bba46b3d03a68.md) -- Connect a data fabric table included with an application to an external data source.

Keep the conkeyref at the end that describes domain separation.Domain separation is unsupported for Zero Copy Connectors.

  - [Zero Copy Connector for ERP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/15360d92a888cf215c9c8f0038c8cbe4668f7666.md) -- Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) is a ServiceNow scoped application that enables you to retrieve and update ERP data from a system of record, such as SAP.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/682ff149278b20babd03fe2126f59024eb77288e.md) -- Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) enables you to connect to an ERP system to read, update, create, and extract data for use on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [ERP systems](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/401143b4901466e744f7d277c2c4ce3ce47f6fad.md) -- Create an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system in Zero Copy Connector for ERP to connect to an external ERP system.
      - [Content packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6791d7b8ab77ac6e5820e1e65b6d06dc67ecfcc4.md) -- Use Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) content packs to view examples and create an ERP model faster.
      - [Models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/54c9295d6e062df40e2d0be12b0ced3952536110.md) -- Build ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) models in Zero Copy Connector for ERP to create read, update, and create operations and organize mirrored ERP data.
      - [Remote and extraction tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/59e4b553ceeab23c44118f9dd9090fbb83924021.md) -- Configure remote tables and extraction tables to work with data from the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system of record.
      - [Replatforming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ceebf0d93b9c956aeeb2402bc36f47098db4afb7.md) -- Zero Copy Connector for ERP enables you to connect to your ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system of record, and to organize its data.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/63a6d0059e72fb47db54dbb26ed78c3f323055f1.md) -- Install Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to configure connections to ERP systems of record.
      - [Installation requirements](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6b2ab7c8239ca06bd5886f16b7436b673654ae4.md) -- Before you install Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), you must complete several configurations, on both the ERP system and on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Install Zero Copy Connector for ERP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1b3d265aba2b13a0360915136a0bdf8225be249a.md) -- Install Zero Copy Connector for ERP from the ServiceNow Store, so that you can connect to SAP and other ERP systems and start building models on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Connect to a system of record](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/661ce57b888b069f804978ccfbbea75cf6964257.md) -- Connect Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to a system of record, such as SAP, directly or using a load balancer to enable access to the ERP system.
      - [Connect to SAP with OData and HTTP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46960f1f22d7e03374a39c4ea3c4d91d1a8d2223.md) -- Extract data securely from ERP OData v2 APIs for use in remote tables and extraction tables. OData connects to SAP via HTTP.
        - [Supported OData capabilities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9077b868042ee573c46f295bd1ff5c92cfdd1360.md) -- Details about the OData v2 query capabilities supported in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning).
        - [Create an OData connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3dc852d1c542de2e69b7f0a591ce247e81df0a24.md) -- Create an OData v2 connection to link to SAP via HTTP so data can be extracted for use in remote tables and extraction tables in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning).
        - [Add an OData service manually](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8a3edeea02231592c90e25ddb3707ce86cce63dd.md) -- When adding an entity to a model using OData, if the service you need isn't listed, add the service manually in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning).
        - [Obtain data from SAP SuccessFactors using OData v2 APIs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3e2e30f384b73b6778877625ec70fb7ce51847be.md) -- Access talent management data from SAP SuccessFactors using OData V2 APIs.
        - [Configure OAuth authorization code flow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bde452bb73b09930546f1ba54c39bf95850eef2.md) -- Configure OAuth authorization code flow for SAP and use OAuth to authenticate and authorize users for OData endpoints.
      - [Use an SNC connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/057f85dbc5986e8f39cd84ca7cd5bb84ca1cd5dc.md) -- Use Secure Network Communication (SNC) for data communications between ServiceNow MID Server and SAP systems.
        - [Configure an SNC connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8b30a240eafa3c2084ec8cb375c5620e6e23febc.md) -- Learn how to set up an SNC connection, including preparing the environment, configuring the SAP system, and testing the configuration.
      - [Roles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/419c45703c0546c377c27fd207f8177a95ea4c86.md) -- Assign Zero Copy Connector for ERP roles to give team members the access they must have to configure ERP systems, build models, or read ERP data.
      - [Security](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4e8fbfe9743fb8ae82ef1b1443b77c101632ebe0.md) -- In addition to role-based security and access control, Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) protects personally identifiable data in other ways.
      - [Guided tours](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/443a1b3f680950c29a6256ffcb57c277cec91829.md) -- Learn about Zero Copy Connector for ERP guided tours including how to connect to an external ERP guided tours, including how to access and take them to build your knowledge of Zero Copy Connector for ERP.
      - [Working with ERP systems](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f9ad188b1c211149731455f9d69b5a395bd00464.md) -- A Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system represents a connection to a section of your ERP system of record. For example, sales orders or vendor invoices.
        - [View a list of systems](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5655fa747a00e83666889aaedffd2d9d6e2e556f.md) -- Check the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) systems list in Zero Copy Connector for ERP to view the heartbeats and retrieval status of your ERP systems.
        - [Create a system](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a4a8b95376ef793b2ad1bd288867c986aac7e0e5.md) -- Configure an ERP system in Zero Copy Connector for ERP to register your ERP connection, so that models and tables can use it as a data source.
        - [Edit and delete ERP systems](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/60c38d8359fdae9a38350e2216cf00417b5e1816.md) -- After creating an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system, you can edit system details or delete the system at any time.
        - [View software information](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7da55e149fa81131748b45983f977b5151cd83b1.md) -- In Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) , view software information including ERP family, database type, and more.
        - [View system heartbeat details](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/538168a753240b7a070a49b5d1cb2a4c8df8785c.md) -- In Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), the heartbeat shows the status, date, and time of connections to the ERP system, along with error information.
        - [View partner profile information](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b9be4d921fba1733e26c361eebe1faeae12f3ec8.md) -- In Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), view partner profile information including number and type.
      - [View metrics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/64227a57d0605d060bee43edd7097d7434d9ab48.md) -- Use the Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) home page dashboard to obtain statistics about transactions and information to help you troubleshoot.
    - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f0a3081a318954e6986395f488c1cd0bcb4651ac.md) -- Use Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to work with ERP models, remote tables, and extraction tables, and integrate ERP data from the system of record onto the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Building models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/49d967af399d36c8936c1f77e3f4a1299ae04211.md) -- Models in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) function as templates for sets of tables that give you access to ERP data. Use model management to build read, update, and create operations that access the ERP system. The operations have specified inputs and outputs to map fields for use on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
        - [Content packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a90e0d9c52e9da90306524082b84c020c102f1ab.md) -- Use Zero Copy Connector for ERP content packs as examples to help you implement and deploy applications with less manual work.

          - [Using content packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/462a99e2b2ce6122d5af337541a285b5303b3313.md) -- Learn how to use Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) content packs, from cloning a model to working within a scope. Content pack models and process extensions are examples.
          - [Available content packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6a67736424ffa9fe02a66b473bb11a0905a61049.md) -- These content packs are available for use in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to implement and deploy applications with less manual work.
            - [Enterprise Data Foundation content pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/99634c7a58848c6b2c62cc67ae2f488834490ffd.md) -- Find details about the models and process extensions in the Zero Copy Connector for ERP Enterprise Data Foundation content pack.
              - [Enterprise Data Foundation models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8b5f640f9f5eb53688f4c0fc6f5cc017536fb38a.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Enterprise Data Foundation content pack contains models that you might need when interacting with an SAP system.
              - [Enterprise Data Foundation process extensions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4484ed673ea96deb51b1bf1c4259a449584b4dc.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Enterprise Data Foundation content pack contains process extensions that you may need when interacting with an SAP system.
              - [SAP Foundation models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1bc11f49e7153a770e9ec369cae611a0786e2d6d.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) SAP Foundation content pack contains models that you may need when interacting with an SAP system.
            - [Quote to Cash content pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2d464d3260347720ef545a1150a09cfbef73e5a9.md) -- Find details about the models and process extensions in the Zero Copy Connector for ERP Sales Order content pack.
              - [Quote to Cash models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/176734b4481fa75a90b9c85a0191ab6e7c722ecc.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Quote to Cash content pack contains models that you may need when interacting with an SAP system.
              - [Quote to Cash process extensions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/01d992e62726f5308ab5849eb059153b46f71785.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Quote to Cash content pack contains process extensions that you may need when interacting with an SAP system.
            - [Hire to Retire content pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ccd1aae6da21c1872ba9e6934bacd4a14d3638a.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP Hire to Retire content pack contains models and process extensions that manage the employee lifecycle.
              - [Hire to Retire models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d5c26b19d13fd21d6c6eb0082a909a83bccd67a0.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Hire to Retire content pack contains models that you may need when interacting with an SAP SuccessFactors system. Hire to Retire is a process that manages the employee lifecycle.
            - [Source to Settle content pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/867659a73542de2312e59c9118c8b278d052ac10.md) -- Find details about the models and process extensions in the Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Source to Settle content pack.
              - [Source to Settle models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/02bb2c6ae1b62dcb48a28c287de9085c774ca878.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) Source to Settle content pack contains models that you may need when interacting with an SAP system.
        - [View and edit models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/97288fd29c4f41559c1306ff9e184b65ba3b9018.md) -- Create a holistic dataset by building ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) models in Zero Copy Connector for ERP, which encompasses remote tables and extraction tables from the ERP system, as well as create, read, and update operations.
        - [Model versioning](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a4bd1df5556dff639228639a0e38a2bdcd67de2b.md) -- Use model versioning in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to determine the version of a model on development and production instances.
        - [Clone a model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/524960b1329395fe82a694f4ebfb063d4c0bb81d.md) -- Clone a standard ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) model that ships with Zero Copy Connector for ERP. After you clone the model you can make modifications, such as adding new fields or tables.
        - [Create a model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6dfb67ca2b25565be7022f531903694af517c70.md) -- Add a model in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to create a dataset containing ERP tables from the system of record to read and send updates to the ERP system.
        - [Export and import custom models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f4c06408aacfbca250d2629a75ca12ffbdbfcbaf.md) -- Move a custom ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) model from one instance to another by exporting and importing a remote update set.
        - [Add an operation to a model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/84d2e6f8c20fb2c5fb97ba39ddf3112d715bc73a.md) -- Add an operation to an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) model in Zero Copy Connector for ERP to define how the model retrieves data, writes data, or creates a new instance of the business object.
        - [Operation-level security for models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dfde0b26fd7bd67b8fa7c28bbcafa1279d8e1493.md) -- Control access to model operations with user roles and groups.
        - [Add an entity to a model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/69a3ac939d29b48a065236296b35c254e4bc9ef7.md) -- Specify the operation entity that Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) uses for read, update, or create operations.

          - [Add a REST entity to a model operation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/739c77daffa965451dd0a4a35052c8dd8e1fc071.md) -- Specify the REST entity that a Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) model uses for a read, update, or create operation.
        - [Add joins between tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/29b1202223446452e4425972a78fa1328ab55c5b.md) -- Link multiple ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) tables from the system of record to build an ERP model in Zero Copy Connector for ERP using table joins.
        - [Manage model input parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/29245024f504e324c70d72ddb2b2fdf3043da6d0.md) -- Specify how fields on the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system map to input parameters and their values to define the inputs for an operation that reads, creates, or updates the system of record from Zero Copy Connector for ERP.
        - [Manage model input parameters for REST](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6c5ff2aac7c05694f68ced5804684dc36584382f.md) -- Specify how fields on the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system map to input parameters and their values to define the inputs for an operation that reads, creates, or updates the system of record using REST.
        - [Select model output parameters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/68687ed87fc6237d40005a85e2179c94b5dac399.md) -- Specify output parameters for a model operation in Zero Copy Connector for ERP to define which ERP fields map to the ServiceNow AI Platform and how the returned data is stored.
        - [Select model output parameters for REST](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f378797314343abccffd6a0f81e6c0524e9887d2.md) -- Specify how fields on the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system map to output parameters and their values. This defines the outputs for an operation that reads, creates, or updates the system of record using REST.
        - [Edit input and output mapped value name](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7ceee5107cb6376d649d49195284be27e6a329a5.md) -- Manually edit mapped value field names for input and output when managing models in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning).
        - [Set system data save location](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d900bbe30220bfbe37c624d91218b6a09e17791a.md) -- Data that Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) retrieves from ERP systems can be used in remote tables, extraction tables, and added to flows as data pills in Workflow Studio.
        - [Debug models](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6a716acfeef657d1fca9a97bbb17b47f13194d90.md) -- Use the debug models option in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to see a log capturing the probe payload, payload response, status, and other information.
      - [Retrieving data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/51e0fcad8eae3deba94dee1aa6b380f202109e80.md) -- To retrieve data from an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system, use remote tables or extraction tables.
        - [Using remote tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7fa4d6d29159dfb2089ca53c81efd27d40027ad3.md) -- Remote tables in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) enable you to view and query data from the ERP system of record on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
          - [View and edit remote tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d729d889f7db3c383fc289cbd55713be269a3569.md) -- View and edit details for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) remote tables in Zero Copy Connector for ERP, such as their attachment settings and short descriptions.
          - [Customize remote table fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f4b4889dfc634fecfa41e841e679e8e7bbc5a7df.md) -- Add or remove columns in remote tables in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to create your ERP model. For example, remove fields with sensitive information, such as birthdays.
          - [Query a remote table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8e4074d1a45a465cbd1716d94cf36887c9b67ea4.md) -- Query ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) remote tables from a system of record directly from the All menu using Zero Copy Connector for ERP.
        - [Extracting and transforming data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/00b45f7ac46be3b9c8ef056b478f9ed6a1786f25.md) -- ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) extraction tables enable you to create daily processes that extract large amounts of data. You can then include the extracted data in an ERP model in Zero Copy Connector for ERP.
          - [View ERP extraction tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/feb6e6a4972e7fe34aacbd4b54ebf7d7eac8ed4c.md) -- Work with ETL (extract, transform, and load) processes in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to extract large amounts of data from the ERP system. Extracted data is stored in Glide tables in the ServiceNow AI Platform.
          - [Create an extraction table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5898df91edacd9ee2192414d6c63cea6ecb6ef30.md) -- Create an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) extraction table to capture large amounts of data from the system of record every day, and save the data to a transformation (staging) table. The data is then available on the ServiceNow AI Platform, and you can add the extracted data to an ERP model or remote table.
          - [Select extraction table fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/093401370fe18a4997f3b22382b37a93db0e301b.md) -- Add or remove fields for an extraction table in Zero Copy Connector for ERP(Enterprise Resource Planning). For example, you may want to remove fields with sensitive information, such as birthdays.
          - [Create table transform map from extraction table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6c8c98111b316ef64c198d362b9c96e43163739.md) -- In Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), create a table transform map from an extraction table and map the source fields with target fields.
          - [Create a scheduled extraction](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cb5ba2dfa66a35179d4bfbcb2b699b79c0f4beb7.md) -- Schedule extraction of information for an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) extraction table to capture large amounts of data from the system of record at a regular interval.
          - [Monitor transactions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/31917836bea60697cdbfc808357d25e894719c1a.md) -- Use the monitoring feature to track the progress of each ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) transaction and view logged errors.
            - [Export transaction data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d9c0eaa8a548c2739f7513b696743eaf8b89100c.md) -- Export Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) transaction information such as failures and usage. Filter the data as needed and then export to Excel, CSV, JSON, or PDF format.
        - [Workflow Data Fabric tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/db5d837134dc7fb743d5a4ebe84708f9a00e86dd.md) -- View external records from a data fabric table in lists and forms the same way you view records in a physical table.
      - [Build with ERP data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e218c6875f0e9a279f2024d8f6efcba635f43c56.md) -- Use data extracted from ERP systems, such as SAP, to build applications, workflows, playbooks, and more.
        - [After extracting data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ea0766e8b11fb9475fc905e077a202cb5974a408.md) -- After you identify and extract ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) data with Zero Copy Connector for ERP, you can use that data on the ServiceNow AI Platform as the data source for products and apps.
        - [Managing development](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/22991ebf48860cfb1bab69e8834f5bce21c689a5.md) -- Move your ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) systems, ERP models, tables, operations, and flows from a development instance to a production environment when they're ready.
        - [Build a flow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e087216fcc6236003ac200565b89a888408ff79c.md) -- After you configure an operation in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), you can build a flow in Workflow Studio to specify details for querying the ERP system. For example, build a flow that filters by Order ID.
    - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d02c63eab9314f01b66b3dee6fefe1115ac43a17.md) -- Find reference information for Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), including ERP table details.

        - [Connection and credentials fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ce9986ab154c987284d63ecebc63f022aed7973c.md) -- The Connection and Credential Alias modal contains connection and credential details that specify how Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) connects to the ERP system.
        - [New system fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b65560dc7954d9017efba85578edc223a69f407c.md) -- The new system form in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) contains information on connection details for the ERP system.
        - [Software info fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dc7e00566f2429fd83d5cdfc38de4975a07389a5.md) -- The software info tab in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) contains information about the selected ERP system.
        - [Partner profile fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a9607e969f1d0c8b1b9e5f4546e8fb0a83264f6d.md) -- The partner profile record in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) contains information that defines inbound and outbound communications with a partner.

        - [New model fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1fa59aa616fdc07d5d2c6c06eb5ddf1473eb0b2f.md) -- The new model form in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) contains details for the ERP model.
        - [Debug logs fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/188a37664646606b529e97d4f764f67e6cd8f4a2.md) -- The Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) debug logs contain information about probe payloads, payload responses, and status.

        - [Outbound message transaction details fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e3b468364708619ce6573dd3239d7fb60a0afd2f.md) -- The outbound message transaction details tab in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) contains information about the transaction including ID numbers, transaction time, and the source.
        - [REST API connector for Zero Copy Connector for ERP tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5dbfb24c6b752a2385cf295638739e331ea976f6.md) -- Find details on REST API connector tables in Zero Copy Connector for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning).
      - [Semantic field mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6617efaf2049d51382609cf5796b7dde18a6cd9c.md) -- Semantic field mapping uses AI to match source fields from an external system to target fields in the platform data model, ranked by semantic similarity rather than name or alphabetical order.
      - [Test model inputs and outputs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/458ebcce34cdea97a8f24c68b5c807aa62eda9cf.md) -- After you're done creating and managing your model in Zero Copy Connector for ERP, go to Workflow Studio and use the Use ERP Data action to test your model's inputs and outputs.         - [connection and credential alias](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46e1f11c81f084392a3b4cc45a4672a2a0c5c733.md) --

        - [ERP system](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b90397340f8652d1a0495ce4d7a229b2d50a0bf0.md) --

  - [ERP Semantic Mining overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/08f04d524b9f56dfbe0f4e2f591f06a01c8813de.md) -- The ServiceNow ERP Semantic Mining (formerly named ERP Customization Mining) product enables you to find application candidates with customized code your their ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system. ERP Semantic Mining ranks the candidate suitability for replatforming onto the ServiceNow AI Platform.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7467aac50f7e9c48ae053861bf045d2bc27d94dc.md) -- ERP Semantic Mining enables you to identify candidates for replatforming. These candidates can be custom applications that were built on legacy ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) systems that you want to quickly replatform.
      - [Extracting and processing data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c33709bc772391d22a8b65a01663266a43002af4.md) -- ERP Semantic Mining retrieves data from the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system using extractors and processes it before the data is available on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Determining candidate potential](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/425c61a2ef68925dfe006682c49ccaacc23a402b.md) -- ERP Semantic Mining generates a score to rank the potential for replatforming legacy ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) candidates onto the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Working with other products](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/465afdbb1dc78103d70bd4381d696485f529815d.md) -- Zero Copy Connector for ERP enables you to connect to your ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system of record, and to organize its data.
      - [Recommendations and similar candidates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c26451a7bf8f676c47eca88e06646d7856f8deb1.md) -- The record for each candidate in ERP Semantic Mining displays information on suggested next steps and similar candidates to help you in replatforming an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) app.
      - [Next steps when replatforming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/eb43ea6c7ee21ddf637f6acc8d50102346aa26c6.md) -- After you use ERP Semantic Mining to identify legacy ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) candidates, use additional ServiceNow AI Platform products and resources to replatform your app.
      - [Guided tours](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5366d70ee20412d930e5ecf9136b586642d1604f.md) -- Learn about ERP Semantic Mining guided tours, including how to access and take them to build your knowledge of ERP Semantic Mining.
      - [Get help](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/64c7b3a5f5a89260e7e0eff1adfa24470b587bd8.md) -- For help with ERP Semantic Mining, contact the ServiceNow admin who works in your organization.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4a32b92911e2e92afc56d78ab1060ca624d1378c.md) -- Set up ERP Semantic Mining to enable the app to scan the system of record for candidates to replatform. Administrators can also quickly check the health of the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) connection and investigate any issues, and view knowledge articles related to errors.
      - [Configure SAP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/791f7399d0c65a58a32d12a3aae1b5f7abc78d27.md) -- Enable SQLM (SQL Monitor) on the productive system and confirm that ST03 (Workload Monitor) is collected for daily workloads before you can install ERP Semantic Mining.
      - [Install](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a5d2c04eb7665485bf51f83668305e06c3c4a918.md) -- Install the ERP Semantic Mining application (sn_erp_mining) if you have the admin role from the ServiceNow Store.
      - [Run Guided Setup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/50191056f7d43c0d629967ca5c7436133ef40922.md) -- Run the Guided Setup to configure ERP Semantic Mining.
      - [Configure a connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/55c72331755532b43a0116e6546adcf7d7b2c60c.md) -- Specify the Connections and Credentials alias for ERP Semantic Mining to connect to the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system.
      - [Update a connection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f536f44a30f82e9443bf2bd5ea07d2bf0cff9052.md) -- Update the Connections and Credentials alias for ERP Semantic Mining to change the connection to the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system. For example, you may want to change from a non-production system to a production system.
      - [Troubleshoot data refresh status](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/80e0848db379bf7f6a306ee9360ad9a5520e92c2.md) -- Check the data refresh status to find out when ERP Semantic Mining most recently loaded ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) data from the system of record.
      - [Create a data snapshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/070c7382a212958e5847b3da4d7f1a81645153e9.md) -- Export and import ERP Semantic Mining base data to save and share.
      - [Get connection update notifications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0bcb7ddaf1f45b388f9eebe9d67b5f75e8de742f.md) -- ERP Semantic Mining can email you about the success and failures of ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system connections.
      - [Configure task notifications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9ba9f859b1888edec688a04b03139ac157179bef.md) -- Enable notifications to find out when ERP Semantic Mining succeeds or fails in a mining job for the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system of record.
      - [Roles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7d6a996146acd81d49d37d3dcc4e8b515fc996fe.md) -- Administrators assign roles to give team members permission to configure or use ERP Semantic Mining.
      - [Security](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d57fc2caa551550bc3f35e4bf8b467dfacfc9966.md) -- In addition to role-based security and access control, ERP Semantic Mining protects personally identifiable ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) data in other ways.
    - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5e29d9cb7e67a5d831148f66c28809782975cbc0.md) -- Use ERP Semantic Mining to identify potential ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) app candidates for replatforming.
      - [Obtaining statistics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0fee377e36ecebe2052e69ec86cde0f2150bc3de.md) -- Use the ERP Semantic Mining home page dashboard to obtain statistics about candidates and info to help you troubleshoot.
      - [View candidates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/059f3302fd10aa8c7f50a6bb2337eb061eb7a852.md) -- View the ERP Semantic Mining home page for a summary of ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) app candidates to replatform onto the ServiceNow AI Platform.
      - [Edit candidate information](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5b979ee82db3726a41096fa092e71b9e306cc0ad.md) -- View and edit candidate details and recommended actions in ERP Semantic Mining. Analyze ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system scan results, linked ERP models, usage, and similar candidates.
      - [Check candidate recommendations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/60219657a42f6414319c072ba258abb2fbbe63c0.md) -- Check the actions that ERP Semantic Mining suggests for improving the ease of replatforming an ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) candidate.
      - [Save potential candidates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6f355da568d62499799b8c640cd59088c543eb3.md) -- Use ERP Semantic Mining to save ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) app candidates to replatform.
    - [Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9cbc93457e328d3a992553138da2388317af16f2.md) -- Find ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) reference information for ERP Semantic Mining, including table details.
      - [Domain separation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/852f3eb89be8fc1fc31f43dec828bc09a207c064.md) -- Domain separation is unsupported for ERP Semantic Mining.
      - [Sample ERP data Glide query](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8e78038389bef4c221a77e7cb2aab1b4324acbd1.md) -- Access data from the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system of record through the Glide API.
      - [System connection tasks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4e5cad224d4522e8941b3c6d65c0a3a28703a2f2.md) -- ERP Semantic Mining runs a number of tasks when connecting to the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system.
      - [Snapshot prerequisite check](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9303cfb7608502b93d52bd78bab244a260012004.md) -- Before snapshot import and export in ERP Semantic Mining, a check is performed automatically to confirm that other related processes aren’t in progress.
      - [Standard tables and fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7a67680ebd1728b6043f0d97164486a758b8593b.md) -- Find details on standard ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) remote tables, extraction tables, and fields in ERP Semantic Mining.
        - [Standard remote tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6a58ba6fe51edef71574173a153f81454779dfba.md) -- ERP Semantic Mining accesses several standard remote tables for ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) data.
        - [Standard fields in remote tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f31b570aa4b433c2db6709461296b2aec3a7da34.md) -- The standard ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) remote tables available for use in ERP Semantic Mining contain fields from additional SAP tables.
      - [ERP Semantic Mining field descriptions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/25e3bc7b5cf78313a48b96cdabed6ec1c6f74f25.md) -- Some tables of field descriptions in ERP Semantic Mining are too large to maintain in task topics. Find information on those large tables in this section.
        - [Task list fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ad8a200ff359be416b268dde9ffa81ed027b5c48.md) -- The task list in ERP Semantic Mining displays information on connection tasks for the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system.
        - [Candidate list fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f211e78461bfe1ff7d415bf3a5c43d29063530d0.md) -- The candidate list in ERP Semantic Mining displays information on the basic details for each candidate.
        - [Candidate scan results fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9375cd2ee554f172c6b6bf404bdbf6ba3fb8ad94.md) -- On a candidate record in ERP Semantic Mining the ERP scan results tab displays information about the latest scan of the ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system.
        - [Candidate recommendations fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/33f8932a280172cffb9ead375e74d78732f475da.md) -- On a candidate record in ERP Semantic Mining, the Recommendations tab displays information about suggested next actions for replatforming ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) candidates.
        - [Similar candidates fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d20863d0bc99f9ac866002bb5b174044cefddcd4.md) -- On a candidate record in ERP Semantic Mining the Similar candidates tab displays information about similar candidates for replatforming ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) apps.
        - [Snapshot fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b551f67d088df8eda6d088d1d54b83b2b87d8eac.md) -- In ERP Semantic Mining, the Configuration page Snapshots tab displays information about import and export snapshots.
      - [Zero Copy Connector for ERP and ERP Semantic Mining glossary](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5b1c7eeef04380b5b5bcf65e57b289056d172aba.md) -- Learn about ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) terminology and concepts that apply to Zero Copy Connector for ERP, ERP Semantic Mining, and ERP content packs.
        - [BAPI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/33bd787f5060697669b21a55f9c04b0ba7c6395e.md) -- 
        - [candidate](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/60b01f0d45795371f6988c1143aaffd3f105b023.md) --

        - [connection and credential alias](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46e1f11c81f084392a3b4cc45a4672a2a0c5c733.md) -- 
        - [custom fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a0a5e57e7901157d2e2c00fae7a0bef5866d6b03.md) -- 
        - [entity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a8ccd8ecf7526f933062c508f47532db5259281e.md) -- 
        - [ERP application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d86b346561667633c3517532f39327657fa3f0c4.md) -- 
        - [ERP model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/32bfdf08beb7896a2cb534ac057c37ee84681ded.md) -- 
        - [ERP module](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6fdd9f48d17d8019e397b6f6afb029ffa19b47c1.md) -- 
        - [ERP system](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b90397340f8652d1a0495ce4d7a229b2d50a0bf0.md) -- 
        - [ERP table](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fd6b8ea0b69eb581a5b587d21d45dc3d4e2cc360.md) --
