  - [Reverse Tunnel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/653a7f45a73fe34663dc74d4b3c731a22c38308d.md) -- Establish secure private connectivity between your private cloud data sources and Workflow Data Fabric without having to open inbound firewall ports by using Reverse Tunnel.
    - [Explore](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f9f077ef15e1ef497285363f105c5dd270089399.md) -- Reverse Tunnel enables Zero Copy Connectors to reach private or on-premises data sources through encrypted outbound connections without having to open inbound firewall ports.
      - [Private Relay navigation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/616dc42c1a2a6d0dfd4bdb91d9ca9e537eca000c.md) -- Access Private Relay to manage private relays and service endpoints within your ServiceNow instance.
    - [Configure](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/53b964ddb6809d76719cf7d419cd741dd475421d.md) -- Configure Reverse Tunnel to establish secure, private connectivity between your private cloud data sources and Workflow Data Fabric.
      - [Connect a private relay to the Reverse Tunnel gateway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5cbfcfb293ff820792db0332beea7a0b54e89b05.md) -- Configure and register a private relay to establish an encrypted connection to the Reverse Tunnel gateway.
      - [Configure relay behavior](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/25d358640680f5052fbc44f46e9f592b1d3d09cc.md) -- Configure relay behavior by setting properties either in the config.yaml file or in the relay properties table on your instance.
    - [Use](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/93e21d63dcb37c0bf9cf690b093eabd0a070f268.md) -- Monitor the connection health and registration status of private relays registered with Reverse Tunnel.
      - [Monitor relay connection health](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8e82a5f49be64a9f755f6e4d71e447c5679600ec.md) -- View the heartbeat status of a private relay to verify connectivity.
      - [Manage relay service endpoints through Reverse Tunnel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d35767d2d8030201808cf7fd22d2ef411772639.md) -- Add or update the service endpoints assigned to a private relay to control which data sources are accessible through Reverse Tunnel.
  - [Classic Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/23658ba0262d0573eb3f5f2037e06c057a48cc5f.md) -- ServiceNow Orchestration extends the workflow engine to manage processes and to automate things outside of a ServiceNow instance.
    - [Introduction to Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3fd14858631da0d636e9999d12c2c866dd85245c.md) -- Orchestration automates simple or complex multi-system tasks on remote services, servers, applications, and hardware.
    - [Domain separation and Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c1af3374eec4a5e84b6d88395d23d1e98d25e792.md) -- Domain separation is supported in Orchestration.
    - [Activate Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/aafb54862ae7e3331e5ae85b5acb1922d82c60fa.md) -- The Orchestration (com.snc.runbook_automation) plugin is available within a separate subscription from the rest of the ServiceNow platform.
      - [List of Orchestration plugins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f2ba5e3dde426c09eec9cb1d94579dec19b9dc00.md) -- This table lists all plugins available for Orchestration and their dependencies.
      - [Orchestration Runtime plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3f83f4ee977eee3c543ec2224d746df37e2b7065.md) -- The Orchestration – Runtime plugin enables other applications on the ServiceNow platform to automate tasks, without requiring an Orchestration subscription.
      - [List of Orchestration activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/373d9c48c25b0c6cdf2e897c4567deea4b23dab9.md) -- Use Orchestration activities in a Workflow to integrate with third-party systems.
      - [Available activity packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/132aed9903e0be69b2e04b0892fb960afebe4288.md) -- Activity packs are available with your subscription to Orchestration.
      - [Deprecated Orchestration activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c7a7c855de20a2e5f0283c98a39c53ded13b9af6.md) -- These Orchestration activities have been deprecated.
        - [Reactivate a deprecated activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a0f005535aa97891b380b7577428c0a4e39402e5.md) -- Orchestration activities that were converted to activity packs are deprecated for upgraded and new instances but can be reactivated for use in new workflows.
        - [SOAP Message workflow activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/abf2671f08b9131224934233cb0288f2b8658934.md) -- The SOAP Message activity uses SOAP messages defined in the System Web Services plugin and can call the messages using a MID Server.
        - [Probes used by Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/588a3361ff62322a98a7c8fd63ece2733da097f4.md) -- Certain probes, controlled by MID Servers, perform Orchestration tasks on remote computers, such as restarting a server or creating virtual machines from templates.
        - [PowerShell activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4913ed3627131580ac445616149095c0583ae19c.md) -- PowerShell is built on the Windows .NET Framework and is designed to control and automate the administration of Windows machines and applications.
          - [Legacy Run PowerShell activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4913ed3627131580ac445616149095c0583ae19c.md) -- PowerShell is built on the Windows .NET Framework and is designed to control and automate the administration of Windows machines and applications.
          - [HResult codes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4913ed3627131580ac445616149095c0583ae19c.md) -- PowerShell is built on the Windows .NET Framework and is designed to control and automate the administration of Windows machines and applications.
        - [SSH activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/32afd6a3945060133741b1cfbae57da304728a11.md) -- SSH activities allow workflows to perform operations on Linux and Unix computers.
          - [Run Command activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/32afd6a3945060133741b1cfbae57da304728a11.md) -- SSH activities allow workflows to perform operations on Linux and Unix computers.
          - [Run SCP activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/32afd6a3945060133741b1cfbae57da304728a11.md) -- SSH activities allow workflows to perform operations on Linux and Unix computers.
    - [Orchestration applications](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46a758ef836f3b83ea93002f973d2f7fcfa0c52d.md) -- Orchestration provides several applications with your subscription.
      - [Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a5ffd06d79f11d0455bcb9229756317405aac2bb.md) -- The Orchestration ROI application allows you to estimate and compute cost savings for tasks in your system that could be automated with Orchestration.
        - [Create Orchestration ROI labor rate cards](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/01609d17f77d8fd719c02591c8886b5be87c599a.md) -- Before calculating your Orchestration ROI, you must create labor rate cards for the manual work that would be required to complete the tasks correlated to the ROI calculations.
        - [Create an Orchestration ROI automation entry record](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d25b46617db3994f72f00f2769c1614905cd7e5.md) -- The ROI automation entry record couples the cost of performing a task with the specific workflow that automates the task, for the purpose of calculating the resulting savings.
        - [Create an Orchestration ROI correlated task rule](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cf3a28e829ad0fb4681dbaf34c50bcb1946451ca.md) -- The correlated task rule applies configurable conditions to fields in a selected table that tell the instance which manual tasks correspond to an automation entry record.
        - [Configure the time range for Orchestration ROI calculations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d40b34472d6bc7beef91e2e4f570c71532f25d2.md) -- Select a date range to calculate the average number of tasks and the duration per month for the correlated tasks.
        - [Installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [Tables installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [Plugins installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [Roles installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [UI actions installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [Script includes installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [Client scripts installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
          - [Business rules installed with Orchestration ROI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bfaead4cceee18d4ac5194f2e55f6cc293ac715.md) -- Several types of components are installed with the Orchestration - ROI plugin (com.snc.runbook_automation.roi).
        - [Orchestration ROI reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/23a374c9bdc1541817721fc836e843e0d66690c3.md) -- Orchestration ROI provides a collection of standard and premium reports to help you calculate savings from automating services in your organization.
          - [Orchestration ROI standard reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5f70ca33b7c22c58d3134d6ececc535b40e02ed8.md) -- The dashboard of standard ROI reports provides summaries, estimated costs, and calculated costs for automated processes. To access the ROI standard dashboard, navigate to Orchestration ROI Reports Dashboard .
            - [Schedule Orchestration ROI calculations for standard reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5f70ca33b7c22c58d3134d6ececc535b40e02ed8.md) -- The dashboard of standard ROI reports provides summaries, estimated costs, and calculated costs for automated processes. To access the ROI standard dashboard, navigate to Orchestration ROI Reports Dashboard .
          - [Orchestration ROI premium reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/837622c8e695bc07c7e86f2982dc77a535c21012.md) -- The premium dashboard provides detailed reports on calculated savings over time.
            - [Request Orchestration ROI premium reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/837622c8e695bc07c7e86f2982dc77a535c21012.md) -- The premium dashboard provides detailed reports on calculated savings over time.
            - [Schedule Orchestration ROI calculations for premium reports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/837622c8e695bc07c7e86f2982dc77a535c21012.md) -- The premium dashboard provides detailed reports on calculated savings over time.
      - [Client Software Distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b2de52ea257a1308684802856912b17524202f49.md) -- The Client Software Distribution (CSD) application allows administrators to distribute software from the service catalog using third-party management systems.
        - [Request client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/455569aac2737b6c682209d19a50c9e6550a8463.md) -- Client software distribution requires the Orchestration - Client Software Distribution plugin (com.snc.orchestration.client_sf_distribution), which is available by request with a subscription to Orchestration.
        - [Installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Tables installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Plugins installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Roles installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Script includes installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Properties installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Workflows installed with client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4a8534dfd60d0c3b5f213bf52c8108de29646ba.md) -- Several types of components are installed with client software distribution (CSD).
        - [Create licenses and counters for distributed software](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90460248888e20377131746e3b04a58c644a88dd.md) -- Licenses and software counters are associated with the software model and must be created if you want to track the license for software deployed by client software distribution (CSD).
          - [Client software distribution ordering process](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90460248888e20377131746e3b04a58c644a88dd.md) -- Licenses and software counters are associated with the software model and must be created if you want to track the license for software deployed by client software distribution (CSD).
        - [Extend a software lease](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/527383723bebe4d3fbbe6560d07eb4be0992298b.md) -- Users of software deployed by Client Software Distribution (CSD) can request the extension of a lease window, if the software is revocable by a software distribution system.
        - [Client software distribution from SCCM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b17fa8e7019a614b56061b251f27972fb5d2e21a.md) -- You can use Client Software Distribution (CSD) to deploy and revoke software deployments from Microsoft System Center Configuration Management (SCCM) and manage distributions on SCCM hosts.
          - [Configuring SCCM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4735b1d6b2517e1468d785cc12a516bf8f8bf3b0.md) -- Follow the SCCM configuration procedures in the order shown.
            - [Configure the Application Administrator role on the SCCM server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/643b1cf2684d2720a7573785815762cfa121be12.md) -- To deploy software using ServiceNow Client Software Distribution (CSD), ensure that an SCCM administrative user has the correct permissions to deploy software and that PowerShell is properly configured.
            - [Update the SCCM cmdlet libraries](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9f3bc57e175df000801028b4cab59c0dac037981.md) -- Ensure that the System Center Configuration Manager SCCM Cmdlet Library is up-to-date.
            - [Configure the MID Server for SCCM activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3391572f1e84c967aacedeea19d105c9517e1a98.md) -- To use a MID Server with Microsoft System Center Configuration Management (SCCM) activities, configure it to communicate with the SCCM server.
            - [Create Windows credentials for SCCM deployments](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e877a90c039b0d4a5323e6742d9dacd9b2ceac02.md) -- Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) requires the appropriate credentials to deploy applications using the Client Software Distribution application.
            - [Retrieve SCCM data for client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2aae40578a8f319d6e92aeda5185d80a2c4f0354.md) -- Retrieve the collections and the list of applications available for deployment from your SCCM servers.
              - [SCCM server Discovery for client software distribution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2aae40578a8f319d6e92aeda5185d80a2c4f0354.md) -- Retrieve the collections and the list of applications available for deployment from your SCCM servers.
            - [Set up a software model for an SCCM application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/65f76b066e2a305c64211a9a5a2fa3a5fc3bcb44.md) -- Using the applications discovered on the SCCM server, set up a software model used by the Software Asset Management application to manage licenses.
            - [Define an SCCM configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fdd68406fdb1ad1e80f9d8594ce119cbba49d301.md) -- To create catalog items for SCCM software deployment or to configure your instance to revoke software through SCCM, you must first associate that software with a collection through an SCCM configuration.
            - [Create a catalog item for an SCCM application](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/174b330046cb7aea1329c3347a0c83ac22042a5c.md) -- Using the applications discovered on the SCCM server, create a catalog item for an application you want to offer for distribution from the service catalog.
          - [SCCM deployment](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c1ca3ae4fbfd22e49a49a944062d3815748331a2.md) -- Ordering an SCCM application from a client software distribution (CSD) catalog item in the service catalog triggers the Order Client Software workflow.
          - [Client software distribution validation process](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2a3f90d8705858d0a586c346c83dd0ea4377ee74.md) -- After SCCM deploys software to a target computer, client software distribution (CSD) detects the installation and validates its status.
          - [SCCM software revocation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9bb597d699eb505ee22f2d22ceba3d3edbbd56c1.md) -- An administrator can revoke software without any user interaction using Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) if the software configuration specifies an SCCM uninstall collection, even if the software was installed by some other process or user.
            - [Revoke software deployed through the service catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9bb597d699eb505ee22f2d22ceba3d3edbbd56c1.md) -- An administrator can revoke software without any user interaction using Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) if the software configuration specifies an SCCM uninstall collection, even if the software was installed by some other process or user.
            - [Revoke unentitled software](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9bb597d699eb505ee22f2d22ceba3d3edbbd56c1.md) -- An administrator can revoke software without any user interaction using Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) if the software configuration specifies an SCCM uninstall collection, even if the software was installed by some other process or user.
            - [SCCM software revocation workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9bb597d699eb505ee22f2d22ceba3d3edbbd56c1.md) -- An administrator can revoke software without any user interaction using Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) if the software configuration specifies an SCCM uninstall collection, even if the software was installed by some other process or user.
        - [Client software distribution dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7a2c8c6e090e39b4a96695ef5b0cb3597f77e8d9.md) -- The CSD dashboard provides a collection of visual reports for the Client Software Distribution application.
        - [Client software distribution extension framework](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3c8b6397f88fe37cacafe1674a48388c28cb146c.md) -- Client software distribution (CSD) provides built-in extension points for integrating a ServiceNow instance with client software distribution providers, such as Casper, Altiris, or LANDesk.
          - [Configure client software distribution providers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/97b8c09b4485b636f12887e95848e97ebf7195b9.md) -- Identify the provider and specify the workflows and extension points for a customized software distribution process.
          - [Client software distribution extension keys](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d148684a1b4ccc0a03e062f29a2233b9c5450d7c.md) -- Client software distribution (CSD) extension keys allow you to customize the deployment and revocation of software from distribution providers.
          - [Client software distribution extension points](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/850f1cd8009084019216eeb7fc6f1071687c1c44.md) -- The client software distribution (CSD) extension points create the customization code for the specific provider and the extension keys.
    - [Orchestration examples](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d67d96ea69fc0e33f5aca42da07b905398efa9e7.md) -- These examples demonstrate how Orchestration can be used to automate common tasks.
      - [Active Directory automation example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9a5d88fd3575fcb6b4cf570361dcdd43b91520a5.md) -- A set of six Orchestration Active Directory activities enables organizations to automate their on-boarding/off-boarding processes with auditable, self-documenting workflows that save time and eliminate mistakes.
        - [Update Active Directory with Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9a5d88fd3575fcb6b4cf570361dcdd43b91520a5.md) -- A set of six Orchestration Active Directory activities enables organizations to automate their on-boarding/off-boarding processes with auditable, self-documenting workflows that save time and eliminate mistakes.
    - [Orchestration activity packs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c19c11154e77723a62d28b8ed5c610a9ffbf6f3a.md) -- The base Orchestration system includes packs of custom activities you can use to automate typical IT and business processes in your network.
      - [Use an activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3d71af5d37a9074bc4d0d606e4f3b400f94272e6.md) -- The Packs tab of the Workflow Editor contains any activity packs downloaded from the ServiceNow Store and any activity packs that you create.
      - [Active Directory activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/202940c7e6214d16f44c698f78b15cc77dccd1f3.md) -- The Active Directory (AD) activity pack enables an administrator to create, delete, and manage objects in Windows Active Directory, such as users, groups, and computers, using a ServiceNow Orchestration workflow.
        - [Add User to Group AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/30da6b44a2bb578bf91be963ae622a907712b671.md) -- The Add User to Group activity adds a user to a group in Windows Active Directory.
        - [Change AD User Password activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a86997be38a079309b41630f4f324626b5d1320b.md) -- The Change AD User Password activity changes the password for an Active Directory user account.
        - [Create AD Object activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0cd0e40eea5c48c49422a92f5c3e48ab57140cc8.md) -- The Create AD Object activity creates an object in Windows Active Directory.
        - [Disable AD User Account activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b03ac51d0aaaa9a0ffab7b1aab1b2fc7ec42ff77.md) -- The Disable AD User Account activity disables a Windows Active Directory user account, making it inactive.
        - [Enable AD User Account activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d400d7c2bc08e396b1571c405239e07d2f5e2a35.md) -- The Enable AD User Account activity enables a Windows Active Directory user account, making it active.
        - [Is AD Account Locked activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90d00499c58b8b5127f653c251917fe69cf3f9c8.md) -- The Is AD Account Locked activity determines whether an Active Directory user account is locked.
        - [Query AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c47c85f74cc14e16892f408c0bb7651027e7ff96.md) -- The Query AD activity retrieves entries from the Windows Active Directory based on an LDAP search filter and stores the results as a JSON string that can be used in the data bus.
        - [Remove AD Object activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f2e372632fe5b9b06de77f4475539ad55be2b6fe.md) -- The Remove AD Object activity deletes an object from Windows Active Directory.
        - [Remove User from Group AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/802b718bfd3815149b718bac616a60198d49b6ae.md) -- The Remove User from Group activity removes a user from a group in Windows Active Directory.
        - [Reset AD User Password activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/181bfbffb0dbb180f76703836eb4a2f27337c273.md) -- The Reset AD User Password activity resets the password of a user account in Windows Active Directory.
        - [Unlock AD Account activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e1fb8126767b0ab2a12c7d76d571029278f73406.md) -- The Unlock AD Account activity unlocks a locked Active Directory user account.
        - [Update AD Object activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6bcc5e58710f94a5d4e37d093fca82a01ad659f.md) -- The Update AD Object activity updates an object in Windows Active Directory.
      - [Azure AD activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9aa8110d56be147b019dfa33edb8b4b115642701.md) -- The Azure AD activity pack enables an administrator to automate employee onboarding and offboarding functions on Azure AD and manage Office 365 licensing.
        - [Add User to Group Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8ed9c6372b3bc2bc17f07dd3f3061088eaa34df8.md) -- The Add User to Group activity adds a user to an existing security group in Azure Active Directory.
        - [Assign User License Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3dded54171bb6412807a2ec1855273bd50999969.md) -- The Assign User License activity assigns an additional Office 365 software license to the named user.
        - [Create User Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a2546b92bdafe192b00af8336d484a966d17ffcc.md) -- The Create User activity creates a user for the Azure Active Directory tenant.
        - [Delete User Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c3a6031950cf38c4fd169dacfcc483fd45a3032a.md) -- The Delete User activity deletes the named user's account from the Azure Active Directory tenant.
        - [Get User Info Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5a5085122fdf059a328ccf7c3500435e93a44909.md) -- The Get User Info activity returns the named user's information from the Azure Active Directory.
        - [Remove User from Group Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cd3e604aef31fc96c895bdddf6c2c3decff4137c.md) -- The Remove User from Group activity removes an existing user from a security group in Azure Active Directory.
        - [Remove User License Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/27a83beaf4fcf3d72244172024bd6d5c99f52355.md) -- The Remove User License activity revokes the specified Office 365 software license for the named user.
        - [Reset User Password Azure AD activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d8e624eef42716c40ca49d24d747ca57a7e7fb14.md) -- The Reset User Password activity changes the named user's Azure Active Directory password.
      - [Exchange activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/34fb1f0ab413142cd2140a9b37f2b2f08d13416e.md) -- The Exchange activity pack allows workflows to manage Microsoft Exchange mail systems.
        - [Configure MID Server for Exchange](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f97213c761fb86aaced95abfc6bc65fbe0037675.md) -- Configure a MID Server with defined IP ranges to use Exchange.
        - [Pass multivalued properties with an Exchange activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3c861ff70eec07eb2fac368ffae28d38cb6cfa07.md) -- To set a multivalued property using an Exchange activity, you must use a specific parameter format.
        - [Create Address List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d762b3ad5196c84a6769ed719cf8b653d390f5c7.md) -- The Create Address List activity creates a new address list that acts as an alias for emailing all users in the group.
        - [Delete Address List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a96eeff12dceca6c0392dffac113641baf15fbcb.md) -- The Delete Address List activity removes an existing address list from an Exchange server.
        - [Get Address List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6cd58f27f936f584e47cac7066353f1986cc749.md) -- The Get AddressList activity retrieves all attributes from the specified Exchange address list.
        - [Move Address List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5eed7c4b0eacc828147c0a0cd9bfaa8bc92dfc09.md) -- The Move Address List activity moves a Microsoft Exchange address list to another location in the address hierarchy.
        - [Set Address List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/adf36b66b91467ac7cdf659e5fbf40a7278c2d9a.md) -- The Set Address List activity modifies a Microsoft Exchange address list.
        - [Update Address List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5f53fc8411269c1f3449cabe5a52547ca448dd85.md) -- The Update Address List activity adds or removes users from the specified address list and immediately applies any cached address list changes to the server.
        - [Create Mailbox activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a2127353138cec5436247a43530e692a7881b92b.md) -- The Create Mailbox activity creates a new Active Directory user, if that user does not already exist, and a Microsoft Exchange mailbox for that user.
        - [Delete Mailbox activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fb61d82f9b5654fbb50827875d937064c455360f.md) -- The Delete Mailbox activity deletes the Microsoft Exchange mailbox of an Active Directory user.
        - [Disable Mailbox activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ae3b1ac92bc9cb7f49823fa8ee37cc6f6cb954d8.md) -- The Disable Mailbox activity disables the mailbox associated with a specified Active Directory account.
        - [Enable Mailbox activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/205e3c1142648178e869dd783c42f303449b43fe.md) -- The Enable Mailbox activity creates a new mailbox for an existing Active Directory user.
        - [Get Mailbox activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a3c54fe3b52f8fed1f28ead877674faa8154272d.md) -- The Get Mailbox activity gets the mailbox for the specified user or all mailboxes on a Microsoft Exchange server.
        - [Set Mailbox activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bb4bb5fc49f4d4860b52aadcf56af165f92deddd.md) -- The Set Mailbox activity modifies the settings of an existing Microsoft Exchange mailbox.
      - [F5 Network Management activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7caab19c19b32bf20785425f7aed168b7746367c.md) -- Orchestration provides custom activities for configuring elements of an F5 load balancer, including pools, pool members, and the virtual servers contained in the pool.
        - [Add F5 Pool Member activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c45406b4977eaeb8f43bbdce130feb47852684fa.md) -- The Add F5 Pool Member activity adds a member to an F5 load balancer pool.
        - [Get F5 Pool Member activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/664853e6f7783560adf564bb485ab98de9aa2397.md) -- The Get F5 Pool Member activity returns the pool members and verifies the pool's status.
        - [Delete F5 Virtual Server activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/32ef3860f82c1cb0fb20f7f7bb08cef8f249f535.md) -- The Delete F5 Virtual Server activity deletes a virtual server from an F5 load balancer pool.
        - [Check F5 Pool activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fe88b4c4bfdf810a85111dc684e84d8f3632cec1.md) -- The Check F5 Pool activity checks the status of a pool to determine if it is available to accept traffic.
        - [Add F5 Profile to Virtual Server activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2703d1c27101fe34df5240d6b4b5fe6ff6235cf4.md) -- The Add F5 Profile to Virtual Server activity adds a profile to a virtual server assigned to an F5 load balancer pool.
        - [Modify F5 Virtual Server activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fa4e875c67426ecc241c51d2049cbedd69f29c71.md) -- The Modify F5 Virtual Server activity configures a virtual server assigned to an F5 load balancer pool with irules and a vlan.
        - [Add F5 Virtual Server activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a947876f39ebd883c33c9941beab2ec4f5320c38.md) -- The Add F5 Virtual Server activity adds a virtual server.
        - [Delete F5 Pool Member activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7dd281a4d596e0ed266f67710e7d7d65f489cec7.md) -- The Delete F5 Pool Member activity deletes an F5 load balancer pool member.
        - [Delete F5 Pool activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/97062b32d25647dc8229514f1276f2fb6fc0e0e1.md) -- The Delete F5 Pool activity deletes an F5 load balancer pool.
        - [Add F5 Pool activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ae1492ebf32807d20d4830ea7cf8524c7839bf46.md) -- The Add F5 Pool activity creates the F5 load balancer pool.
      - [Infoblox DDI activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/32ff9bf704eb37434a8451c5d22142f62c3bd330.md) -- This activity pack supports Infoblox DDI management through ServiceNow Orchestration.
        - [Create a REST credential for Infoblox activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d1dabf5315e6291db7a8874e7678fa790447d983.md) -- All Infoblox activities require a REST credential to manage IP addresses from the Infoblox DDI server.
        - [Infoblox workflows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ada31b1d1c351a1c7491226e77419b634dff8b35.md) -- The Infobox DDI activity pack includes two default workflows, one that reserves and registers IP addresses and another that releases IP addresses.
        - [Infoblox roles and permissions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ec127e180e765bbfbbdeabd4438275740833ab22.md) -- Define the roles and permissions that the Infoblox activities need to access the various resources on the Infoblox server.
        - [Infoblox DHCP activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6b79c3171839b863c0abff0076ac24b7be6c8fa2.md) -- The Infoblox DHCP activities manage the IP addresses reserved for DHCP in your network.
          - [DHCP Reserve IP v4 Address Range activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6b79c3171839b863c0abff0076ac24b7be6c8fa2.md) -- The Infoblox DHCP activities manage the IP addresses reserved for DHCP in your network.
          - [DHCP Delete IP Reservation activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6b79c3171839b863c0abff0076ac24b7be6c8fa2.md) -- The Infoblox DHCP activities manage the IP addresses reserved for DHCP in your network.
          - [DHCP List IP Reservations activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6b79c3171839b863c0abff0076ac24b7be6c8fa2.md) -- The Infoblox DHCP activities manage the IP addresses reserved for DHCP in your network.
        - [Infoblox DNS activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e787706d8708390165f3dfefb0d18e6c7e8bc9d.md) -- The Infoblox DNS activities manage DNS records in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [List DNS C-records activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e787706d8708390165f3dfefb0d18e6c7e8bc9d.md) -- The Infoblox DNS activities manage DNS records in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [Register DNS A-record activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e787706d8708390165f3dfefb0d18e6c7e8bc9d.md) -- The Infoblox DNS activities manage DNS records in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [Register DNS C-Record activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e787706d8708390165f3dfefb0d18e6c7e8bc9d.md) -- The Infoblox DNS activities manage DNS records in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [List DNS Record activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e787706d8708390165f3dfefb0d18e6c7e8bc9d.md) -- The Infoblox DNS activities manage DNS records in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [DNS Delete activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2e787706d8708390165f3dfefb0d18e6c7e8bc9d.md) -- The Infoblox DNS activities manage DNS records in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
        - [Infoblox IPAM activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6f8448ffc9ab849d256670332c76e6b4250a3e7.md) -- The Infoblox IPAM activities manage IP addresses in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [IPAM Register IP Address activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6f8448ffc9ab849d256670332c76e6b4250a3e7.md) -- The Infoblox IPAM activities manage IP addresses in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [IPAM Reserve IP Address activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6f8448ffc9ab849d256670332c76e6b4250a3e7.md) -- The Infoblox IPAM activities manage IP addresses in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [IPAM List IP Reservations activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6f8448ffc9ab849d256670332c76e6b4250a3e7.md) -- The Infoblox IPAM activities manage IP addresses in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [IPAM Delete activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a6f8448ffc9ab849d256670332c76e6b4250a3e7.md) -- The Infoblox IPAM activities manage IP addresses in your network using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
        - [Infoblox network activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0bbc38afe029b23c3a1769947589318cf1a447a8.md) -- The Infoblox network activities manage networks using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [Create Network activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0bbc38afe029b23c3a1769947589318cf1a447a8.md) -- The Infoblox network activities manage networks using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [Get Network Details activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0bbc38afe029b23c3a1769947589318cf1a447a8.md) -- The Infoblox network activities manage networks using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [Delete Network activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0bbc38afe029b23c3a1769947589318cf1a447a8.md) -- The Infoblox network activities manage networks using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
          - [List Registered Networks activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0bbc38afe029b23c3a1769947589318cf1a447a8.md) -- The Infoblox network activities manage networks using an Infoblox DDI Grid Server.
      - [PowerShell activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/81aeb20a6dae34b6a015a7a1a41f86b2805018d5.md) -- PowerShell is built on the Windows .NET Framework and is designed to control and automate the administration of Windows machines and applications.
        - [PowerShell activity designer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0c245beadeeeeda2d2c1302d3745390f6a5bbceb.md) -- PowerShell activities are configured to return data to a workflow from a host using Microsoft PowerShell.
        - [PowerShell protocols and troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d41fd7eb59610849450fabecf443efda46d8baa.md) -- PowerShell uses the Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) and Windows Remote Management (WinRM) protocols to enable Orchestration activities to run commands on remote Windows hosts.
          - [MID Server PowerShell files](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5986695d89526f2da611305ea0289b7a17b7dd05.md) -- PowerShell functions are stored in script files (*.ps1) that use a PowerShell Script module (*.psm1) file name extension.
          - [PowerShell troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d824e201d73f1bf974da51acc3e0a21c8d6544a.md) -- Authentication and access denied errors can prevent PowerShell activities from running a command on a target host.
            - [Authentication failure in an Active Directory activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d824e201d73f1bf974da51acc3e0a21c8d6544a.md) -- Authentication and access denied errors can prevent PowerShell activities from running a command on a target host.
            - [Authentication failure in an Exchange activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d824e201d73f1bf974da51acc3e0a21c8d6544a.md) -- Authentication and access denied errors can prevent PowerShell activities from running a command on a target host.
            - [Remote Procedure Call (RPC) server unavailable or access denied](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9d824e201d73f1bf974da51acc3e0a21c8d6544a.md) -- Authentication and access denied errors can prevent PowerShell activities from running a command on a target host.
        - [Join Domain activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/470b2b05436f331a7bb8c6ee824e18e2f78015de.md) -- The Join Domain activity joins a Windows computer to a domain.
        - [Install Windows App activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4c85e01b8cdb4c470b020a197b6ec8eead3355eb.md) -- The Install Windows App activity installs an application from an MSI package on a Windows target machine.
          - [Enable WMI Windows Installer provider](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4c85e01b8cdb4c470b020a197b6ec8eead3355eb.md) -- The Install Windows App activity installs an application from an MSI package on a Windows target machine.
        - [Change Service State activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/89176a539199cb77306156d3923ece8b48b336e3.md) -- The Change Service State activity starts or stops a Windows service on a remote system.
        - [Restart Windows Server activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7a5bdc1ab6e228712c34a8648bb86e5f9addc7c6.md) -- The Restart Windows Server activity stops and then restarts a Windows server using Powershell.
        - [Uninstall Windows App activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6e7a8204270178f0fa589a4548cd85dea5670d45.md) -- The Uninstall Windows App activity uninstalls an application from a Windows target machine.
      - [Probe activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/65d4c571d002cd342302adfa0b415afe3931fc45.md) -- Orchestration provides an activity pack customized using the ServiceNow activity designer that runs probes on target hosts to return specific information.
        - [Resolve DNS Name activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/65d4c571d002cd342302adfa0b415afe3931fc45.md) -- Orchestration provides an activity pack customized using the ServiceNow activity designer that runs probes on target hosts to return specific information.
        - [SNMP Query activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/65d4c571d002cd342302adfa0b415afe3931fc45.md) -- Orchestration provides an activity pack customized using the ServiceNow activity designer that runs probes on target hosts to return specific information.
      - [SCCM activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/eed761f63b39464cf1d84c402df0783460ae6df6.md) -- The Microsoft System Center Configuration Management (SCCM) activity pack provides Orchestration activities you can use to manage software deployments and collections on an SCCM server.
        - [Request SCCM activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/38b093ce14730356049af3b3a9a101aa45f7082e.md) -- The Orchestration - System Center Configuration Manager plugin installs the SCCM activity pack that deploys software from an SCCM host and manages user and device collections.
        - [Configure the MID Server for SCCM activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3391572f1e84c967aacedeea19d105c9517e1a98.md) -- To use a MID Server with Microsoft System Center Configuration Management (SCCM) activities, configure it to communicate with the SCCM server.
        - [Add to Device Collection activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/fd6c9f0f40dc2b5ac5f9d54cd8800c93d287d2de.md) -- The Add to Device Collection activity adds the specified device into a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) device collection.
        - [Add to User Collection activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4b4e372b14ea9876f9aa0171d1925c02d81b11ab.md) -- The Add to User Collection activity adds a user to a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) user collection.
        - [Get Applications activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/153c0bc7e56b77f8b442c6e23ad3468357e2dbff.md) -- The Get Applications activity returns a list of all the applications available on a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) server.
        - [Get Deployments activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a08151cfa30c1e46f8ddc3c579f09629432ad300.md) -- The Get Deployments activity returns the list of deployments performed by Orchestration using a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) server.
        - [Get Device Collections activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0722050bfae8f3666d204473c51f41319a1af804.md) -- The Get Device Collections activity returns the list of available device collections on a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) host.
        - [Get User Collections activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f344133c86cb97d9f28cb0535e30453dd96d68e6.md) -- The Get User Collections activity returns the list of available user collections on a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) server.
        - [Is Device in Collection activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0ee57495aad7b2794041dce735161934d796fd94.md) -- This activity verifies if a device exists in an SCCM device collection.
        - [Is User in Collection activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c22c45d9b8dc65fe5db954ac705af7677e500db4.md) -- This activity verifies if a user exists in an SCCM user collection.
        - [Remove from Device Collection activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/df0f3409642e4411bc45f5d853bc71bd6b008571.md) -- The Remove from Device Collection activity removes a device from a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) device collection.
        - [Remove from User Collection activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/87d156c06f0a7ba68aef2c9614a87eb4b9a945aa.md) -- The Remove from User Collection activity removes a user from a Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager (SCCM) user collection.
      - [SFTP File Transfer activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/469b70a685ea39873214b91eb21f26557d189889.md) -- Use the SFTP File Transfer activities to manage files and directories on an SFTP server and to move files from one SFTP server to another.
        - [SFTP File Transfer workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/40f06e72fdb97770c4a4fa3b432db7bbc468ead4.md) -- The SFTP File Transfer activity pack includes a scoped workflow that uses multiple activities to manage files on SFTP servers.
        - [Copy File activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0f9a7f296e5f52a51f833d9b5b9af005de15266f.md) -- The Copy File activity copies a file from an SFTP server (source host) to another SFTP server (target host).
        - [Create Directory activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/405efeb27278efa40a916a0a94c342d9aad2003b.md) -- The Create Directory activity creates a new directory on an SFTP server.
        - [Get File List activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4a1bf8f6b350b628ec0e9901a68b844dc455edbe.md) -- The Get File List activity returns a list of files from a given directory and its subdirectories on an SFTP server (source host).
        - [Remove File or Directory activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9686d999a266d1cb64770b623ae8548a427ad698.md) -- The Remove File or Directory activity removes a file or a directory on an SFTP server, including subdirectories, when configured.
        - [Rename File or Directory activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/587ab677701aae6c8892a6647ac83a584e34e3b4.md) -- The Rename File or Directory activity renames a file or directory to a new name on an SFTP server.
        - [Set File Attributes activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c2cf352aadbae8db18ba865f254365c450f3f85c.md) -- The Set File Attributes activity sets common file attributes, such as timestamps, size, permissions, and UID/GID, for a file or directory on an SFTP server.
      - [SSH activity pack](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/67b9176998c65019c86aa32cc60a8a1d566d762f.md) -- Orchestration provides an activity pack of SSH activities that were customized using the ServiceNow activity designer.
        - [Secure Copy activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/47eb977fc600ed9192ae85929b4d4044138e7bad.md) -- The Secure Copy activity copies a file from one host to another, without storing the copied file on the MID Server.
        - [Files Compare activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/26abbaa845967e4f22312dfd1a094b9deaee68d5.md) -- The Files Compare activity compares two files on a Linux or UNIX computer.
        - [File Read activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f33a94c91fa33f9c07262df9c840a1c9e37af124.md) -- The File Read activity reads a file on a Linux or UNIX computer.
        - [File Write activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8b9c1708b4b1e80004ed5612a3bff1a14851f0f1.md) -- The File Write activity writes a file on a Linux or UNIX computer.
        - [File Copy activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ebed478c0a11b43d8a54604544f90539e86bc2f3.md) -- The custom File Copy activity copies a file on a Linux or UNIX computer.
        - [File Replace String activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/39a7083819ced12e17f0e3b2383fd508beb580c6.md) -- The File Replace String activity finds and replaces a string in a file on a Linux or UNIX computer.
        - [Reset Linux User Password activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8f1db1258e70a98ccdeb2152cc3f32deec295282.md) -- The Reset Linux User Password activity resets the password for a given user on a Linux computer.
      - [Global activities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90579fe919bdcb5fe09d7b0a923e254fa46828f3.md) -- Global activities are Orchestration activities created in the global scope.
        - [Test Server Alive activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/90579fe919bdcb5fe09d7b0a923e254fa46828f3.md) -- Global activities are Orchestration activities created in the global scope.
