      - [Activity scoping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8d0e07e99f7182e2e0a17589176b6a54786d229c.md) -- Custom activities run in their own scope, even if it is different from that of the workflow.
      - [Publish a custom activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e50da6c4dcc24835d1e7dedc87cabfe1323051eb.md) -- When a user creates a custom activity and saves or submits it, that activity appears in the Custom and Packs tabs of the designer palette, but is visible only to the user who created it.
        - [Return a locked activity to a published state](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e50da6c4dcc24835d1e7dedc87cabfe1323051eb.md) -- When a user creates a custom activity and saves or submits it, that activity appears in the Custom and Packs tabs of the designer palette, but is visible only to the user who created it.
      - [Copy a custom activity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9ec0ff9d7a9b98329a8107342846beec4d4725c7.md) -- You can copy activities for reuse from the Custom tab in the global scope.
    - [Orchestration databus](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/511f588e498bed971a5b4f898ae2149139a57ba7.md) -- The databus allows workflow designers to track the flow of data through an Orchestration workflow and provides access to output data that can be consumed by other custom activities.
      - [Reuse data in the activity designer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/511f588e498bed971a5b4f898ae2149139a57ba7.md) -- The databus allows workflow designers to track the flow of data through an Orchestration workflow and provides access to output data that can be consumed by other custom activities.
    - [MID Servers for Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/29b4101b510e74bb246e6a507d67de4cf62f067b.md) -- Orchestration automatically selects an appropriate MID Server based on the capabilities that you configure in activities, the IP addresses of target devices, and the application that the MID Server is allowed to use.
      - [MID Server capabilities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/78499f01ff73454599aa26b8e16fcc9a2535dee3.md) -- MID Server capabilities define the specific functions of a MID Server within an IP address range.
        - [Configure MID Server capabilities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6a0d0729719cc24be1caa1d63c701f2e592bce30.md) -- MID Server capabilities define the specific functions of a MID Server within an IP address range, allowing an application to select the most appropriate MID Server. Configure capabilities on MID Servers for applications like Orchestration, , and .
      - [Select the default MID Server for Orchestration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46897a22b934c121acd6dcd04e1a01e60ec20927.md) -- Orchestration uses the default MID Server if it cannot find a MID Server with the correct IP range and capability.
      - [PowerShell probe version 2 system property](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/dc51b713d3766ea5309acba65cd752f33f802987.md) -- View detailed PowerShell credential information and view extended logging information.
      - [PowerShell log property](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10100993aac9ad73eff66b09e41e5b68d2cf2177.md) -- Enable debug messages to display from PowerShell.
    - [Use the Orchestration Usage dashboard](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f2a16058db4d9122926aadeef31fa3101139ef7e.md) -- This dashboard shows an overview of Orchestration usage metrics to show customers how their organization uses Orchestration and to support license compliance.
  - [Imports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/09a5536bdd5e8c0fd9b8e1fc95a50689d7621798.md) -- Import data from external systems and transform it into ServiceNow AI Platform record data.
    - [Import sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/5b1f81451e2240c20a47159481f78f9c96a12d2b.md) -- Import sets enable administrators to import data from various data sources, and then map that data into ServiceNow tables.
      - [Key concepts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e03c13212060ecdb2d269cd139521cf48eb3e9c0.md) -- Learn about import sets before importing data to your instance.
      - [Concurrent imports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/49ce7aec7e402b27d7b24da0e0633978090dd385.md) -- Split incoming data into multiple import sets and transform the import sets concurrently to reduce processing time.
      - [Data sources](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b4e0dca1f3cd073ade83c564d15ec072106660f6.md) -- Data sources are used to create an import set so that data can be processed, if necessary, prior to being mapped onto a production table.
        - [File type data sources](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1c5b7e729b0d27f4d81c2929c6136884ff057cc6.md) -- Import a file from a local source, a remote network server, or another instance by providing a path and authentication information.
          - [Processing custom CSV files](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d9e4392f0982233b3a612c681de84da9c6dfe44a.md) -- You can process CSV files that are delimited by a character other than commas.
          - [JSON file import examples](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a5c67125b90ada48d71fdad0a012b47baf4bcef9.md) -- These examples demonstrate how to import various types of JSON data and the necessary path for each row. JSON files that you import should follow these guidelines.
        - [FTP data source extended properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/41dfc9788cdc37a3cca5da3d2b87c416a5767393.md) -- Certain properties are available for customizing your FTP data source.
        - [JDBC type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1007cc6ac2a3aa8c25f3e767edd31b6e37d55d03.md) -- A JDBC data source retrieves its data via a JDBC driver, usually type 4 network.
          - [Add a new JDBC format choice](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1007cc6ac2a3aa8c25f3e767edd31b6e37d55d03.md) -- A JDBC data source retrieves its data via a JDBC driver, usually type 4 network.
          - [Add Sybase or DB2 JDBC format choices](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1007cc6ac2a3aa8c25f3e767edd31b6e37d55d03.md) -- A JDBC data source retrieves its data via a JDBC driver, usually type 4 network.
          - [Install a driver on a MID Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1007cc6ac2a3aa8c25f3e767edd31b6e37d55d03.md) -- A JDBC data source retrieves its data via a JDBC driver, usually type 4 network.
          - [Create a JDBC data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1007cc6ac2a3aa8c25f3e767edd31b6e37d55d03.md) -- A JDBC data source retrieves its data via a JDBC driver, usually type 4 network.
          - [Create an import connection alias](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1007cc6ac2a3aa8c25f3e767edd31b6e37d55d03.md) -- A JDBC data source retrieves its data via a JDBC driver, usually type 4 network.
        - [LDAP type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c45bfd3bb9726d35a8aa71661f2843314652644c.md) -- An LDAP data source is automatically created when you configure your instance to integrate with LDAP.
        - [Data Stream (Integration Hub) data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c157881c63b1bbc676e2ed7b11af4c0f9a25f2b5.md) -- Enable platform Data Sources to load data from Integration Hub Data Stream actions.
        - [Custom (Load by Script) type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6f3b61ac996439b5d36821089d9371962761afb3.md) -- Use a custom script to store any type of incoming data in the import set table.
        - [Create a data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cd66242371e183dfc1507e4c6f495cf429720286.md) -- Create a data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create a File type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b0760fe030bdab821fc48432f09476d0e262e4a8.md) -- Create a File type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create a JDBC type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3d1c1020e50065c5500d34b47487afbf751e899f.md) -- Create a JDBC type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create an LDAP type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1abe8d61f439900890f9c4b6f6eb530a88b2bf55.md) -- Create an LDAP type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create an OIDC type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c2ccd5d553bcfb3db211943a5a651e553c4d047a.md) -- Create an OIDC type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create a REST (Integration Hub) type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6854eae04bd56be16907080454bb47895bc494b.md) -- Create a REST (IntegrationHub) type data source record to define what data an import set should import from a REST API.
            - [Define action properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/287d98ff5ca837e4da98a5e97ff1dc7022765726.md) -- Create and configure a Data Source request action in Integration Hub. After the request action is published in Integration Hub, you can choose it as a Request action in the Data Source record.
          - [Create a Data Stream (Integration Hub) type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/827f63616289c4aa36c790555e27535a68854875.md) -- Create a Data Stream (IntegrationHub) type data source record to define what complex data an import set should import from a Data Stream action.
          - [Create a Custom (Load by Script) type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/03a81dbd81b8d95bcb2fccfec0d7dd93d6ebeb9c.md) -- Create a Custom (Load by Script) type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
        - [Data source fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/48b5f4b59fa50516c4eb5d335dba36e818be8a22.md) -- In addition to common fields, other fields appear on the data source form, depending on the value of the Type field.
      - [Transform maps](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f1733e67a8a6658f58c3d63c0d49f050bcb97bda.md) -- A transform map is a set of field maps that determine the relationships between fields in an import set and fields in an existing ServiceNow table, such as Incident [incident] or User [sys_user].
        - [Transformation script variables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7d7687d636b976d7c29f138f7001871b797b00c5.md) -- Multiple variables can be used to define explicit mapping relationships in a transform map script.
        - [Map with explicit transform map scripts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/388f709ae2fb650ac7dd212633fe1250a52078a2.md) -- Explicitly define mapping relationships in the Transform Map record itself.
        - [Map with transformation event scripts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/bbdbe01d7bcc20e98524e2aa35ed81e4737f14d5.md) -- Transformation events occur during the process of transforming an import set table onto a table.
      - [Robust Import Set Transformers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/70e7f387ccc34feab70c771f3244e243096239b5.md) -- Use robust import set transformers instead of transform maps if you want to extract, transform, and load data to one or more target tables.
        - [Create a robust import set transformer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9cc65b5cef7711dd9c5371194932b9b6d80523bb.md) -- Define how information is sent from the source table to target tables via a Robust Transform Engine (RTE).
        - [Robust import set transformer properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/43e5c58ec9537d55f51cc47a37563b17335a5a29.md) -- Properties that define the types of updates that are permitted.
        - [Create robust transform definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/67196fcde26586e0243b174f263238f0252dc4ee.md) -- Specify your own Robust Transform Engine (RTE) to transfer data from a source table to a target table.
        - [Extract Transform Load (ETL) definition overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0adc06d4c7f5f41e238d8d65e4b06ae2f8c14cb0.md) -- ETL definitions extract data from a source table, transform the data as desired, and load the data into one or more target tables. ETL definitions also support nested data structures.
          - [Temporary entity model](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4ce5ab64d3cdcc5ffccaedc3c798a2ffc18ddd6b.md) -- Use temporary ETL entities to avoid repetitive operations in target entities.
        - [ETL Definition quick start guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/55eb4a2b9ada42234396ef62306219fe588115a7.md) -- Learn how to set up and use an ETL definition to import data into ServiceNow tables.
        - [Create Extract Transform Load (ETL) definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f1a6cb34dff042493e27c030644e595a60d6352e.md) -- Create ETL definitions to extract data from a source table, transform the data as desired, and load the data into multiple target tables. ETL definitions also support nested data structures.
          - [Define ETL entities](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/28fd1448ffab03a762de2532c5c02e9874fa5f00.md) -- Define the Extract Transform Load (ETL) entities used by the Robust Transform Engine.
          - [Define ETL entity mappings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4ed917c887c4a465216b52216af48a49599c7fe4.md) -- Map the source entity to a target entity.
          - [Create ETL entity field definitions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3533484f180baa4612e452dd9daf4e5539ca8e4f.md) -- Define the entity fields mapped for Extract Transform Load (ETL) operations.
          - [Define Robust Transform Engine operations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3b63c881484b96a49484dbbcf32decc23131f9ce.md) -- Define the operations the Robust Transform Engine (RTE) should perform.
        - [Import run details](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/aa9351ccb47a0070413ff1ed9ab9fde82bbd9378.md) -- View detailed information about import set runs, individual rows in the import set, and import logs.
      - [Updating records using coalesce](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4d7392298d1c60a68798727aeb9dbf85cf94e45b.md) -- The coalesce option allows you to update existing target table records when transforming import data.
      - [Standard import set tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7bd99a3e46355c654afa2a3bc4f701f80f4a7175.md) -- Several Import Set tables are available by default.
      - [Import sets maximum row size](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f7dba8450553d83ac376b56ff33cce41f7784682.md) -- Rows imported using import sets must not exceed the maximum row size.
      - [Importing data using import sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d4c4eef5160cb717839c5178c69bb45b29bbf4ad.md) -- To import data define a data source and transform map, and run or schedule an import.
        - [Create a data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/cd66242371e183dfc1507e4c6f495cf429720286.md) -- Create a data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create a File type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b0760fe030bdab821fc48432f09476d0e262e4a8.md) -- Create a File type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create a JDBC type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3d1c1020e50065c5500d34b47487afbf751e899f.md) -- Create a JDBC type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create an LDAP type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1abe8d61f439900890f9c4b6f6eb530a88b2bf55.md) -- Create an LDAP type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create an OIDC type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c2ccd5d553bcfb3db211943a5a651e553c4d047a.md) -- Create an OIDC type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
          - [Create a REST (Integration Hub) type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/f6854eae04bd56be16907080454bb47895bc494b.md) -- Create a REST (IntegrationHub) type data source record to define what data an import set should import from a REST API.
            - [Define action properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/287d98ff5ca837e4da98a5e97ff1dc7022765726.md) -- Create and configure a Data Source request action in Integration Hub. After the request action is published in Integration Hub, you can choose it as a Request action in the Data Source record.
          - [Create a Custom (Load by Script) type data source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/03a81dbd81b8d95bcb2fccfec0d7dd93d6ebeb9c.md) -- Create a Custom (Load by Script) type data source record to define what data an import set should import.
        - [Data source fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/48b5f4b59fa50516c4eb5d335dba36e818be8a22.md) -- In addition to common fields, other fields appear on the data source form, depending on the value of the Type field.
        - [Create a transform map](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/87992133b06870a2473f6773b512811c555e4ffd.md) -- Every import operation to a production table requires at least one transform map associated with an import set.
        - [Mapping options](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/31d268eb82ce0f7b83c4ba3b1d9c685f8921930b.md) -- You can map fields in a number of ways depending on the circumstances of the import and whether data must be transformed prior to loading onto a production table.
        - [Create a field map](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8faf20e70986eabcb8ea1124284538a0e080a9cf.md) -- Field maps establish a relationship between a field in an import set table and a field in the target table.
        - [Field map script variables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/22fcea6f9e96b991dea8878c4d91eb94af09d718.md) -- Several predefined variables are available in the Source script field.
        - [Run an import](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ec06ae37ec896e55dfb571ca642f88c6fac34cc1.md) -- You can manually run an import to immediately import data.
        - [Importing date/time values](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b76a06f261915207c7199dfa0b665e509de2b0e7.md) -- Considerations when importing data containing date/time values.
        - [Review the import set](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e527a6e9fab078c927ae3406d446bd2f9342c6fc.md) -- After an import set completes, you can review the completed import and clean up import set tables. Even if no errors are reported by the progress indicator, review how your data is imported into the new import set.
        - [Viewing the import log](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4b1416db31277136e25b04519f5c2e0323b01e6e.md) -- The import log is where you can find information about the internal processing that occurs during an import operation.
        - [Import run history](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1fb38850626fcf15df1dc1c1d266a466347659ae.md) -- The import history gives status information about individual import operations.
        - [Schedule a data import](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/a9370e94e7b276e2add41b3ba4d5683fbabfc48e.md) -- Schedule imports to make it possible to specify that certain import operations occur at a regular interval.
          - [Scheduled data import scripting options](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/2838ae0e78df8cf9f872c8bc63e6de2ca035f762.md) -- Multiple JavaScript objects are available in the Scheduled Data Import Pre script and Post script fields.
        - [Monitor scheduled data import executions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8624b91140d09c85614c92d9cf8bbf059005be25.md) -- Monitor scheduled data import executions to see the hierarchy and flow of the scheduled chained imports.
        - [Monitor concurrent import sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/68fa2a62e010053fc808d6588494996e3ec605d5.md) -- Monitor concurrent import sets to check the status of import sets and import set jobs, resume or reprocess import sets, and view transform history.
        - [Monitor concurrent import set jobs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7c0cdbf0c6b3c858291693b681b1265664151a34.md) -- Check the status of concurrent import set jobs.
        - [Post CSV or Excel files directly to an import set](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/56c266529230f11a9e5d1e74ecd34b693abae4fb.md) -- An administrator can post CSV or Excel files directly to instance.
          - [Posting a CSV file - Perl and Java examples](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/11b8f56efd7eb61e8b615abe65d7cf598d57df3c.md) -- An example using Perl to post a CSV file with basic auth credentials and Java Apache HttpClient class to post a CSV file with basic auth credentials.
        - [Delete import sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/e0c3f627cf22cbafb5b8b7546936a75dfc589f34.md) -- Delete import sets to clean up your database on a scheduled basis, one time only, or on demand.
        - [Delete import set tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c793177196168e4869a47cb16d060652f0afc040.md) -- Delete import set tables, related transform maps, or data only (preserving the table structure) to clean up your database.
      - [Import sets properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/6761b05c977ab10570f580345530f4ab9ebe1774.md) -- Multiple properties control import set behavior.
      - [Web service import sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4ff1c29938c18b14e5d954c4d04b37ab5e96622e.md) -- Web service import sets complement direct web services and scripted SOAP web services providing a web service interface to import set tables.
        - [Creating an import set web service](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b6f3a7f2df71ee909684c4d7dcc9415f10f89054.md) -- Create a web service import set table to define how to stage and transform imported data.
        - [Web service import set mode](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/634cb58afbfa4e1df5b3f6c4a7d16f92b5c5b33b.md) -- When a SOAP message inserts a record into an import set table, and there is no import set for that table in the Loading state, a new import set will be created with the Mode set to Synchronous.
        - [Inserting multiple records using insertMultiple](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/aadbf2fc9f9919dfd53453b0b4c0ae1b9e86f8a7.md) -- You can insert multiple records in one SOAP request by using the insertMultiple operation.
        - [Web service import sets security requirements](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c9ad454193aa6f4910b0c64cc36fea699adf00e4.md) -- Web Service Import Sets use the same security mechanisms as SOAP Web Services.
      - [Troubleshoot import set performance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Running business rules during transform](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Slow transform scripts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Importing data that has not changed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Coalescing on non-indexed fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Running imports simultaneously](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Large import set tables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Altering table schema during import](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Importing very large data sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
        - [Large data imports with many reference fields](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/04198f1ba53113106c321c9c5f8645269c2b0c1d.md) -- Review these performance issues to troubleshoot and improve the performance of your import set jobs.
      - [Importing from another ServiceNow instance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/798efe99715a174b60f7df85aef6053e54e9afe7.md) -- There are several methods for moving data from one instance to another.
        - [XML records from lists](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/390e7305803664b5cc7a6ac94e4b1ecd2b9e314d.md) -- You can directly export records as XML from any list or form.
          - [Automatic matching of display values](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/390e7305803664b5cc7a6ac94e4b1ecd2b9e314d.md) -- You can directly export records as XML from any list or form.
        - [Using XML import sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/46f28c1fd7c748239b2dc6b87be21bebae023d7c.md) -- Use an XML import set to import data from another instance.
          - [Create an XML data source to another instance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7fc2c4b5778d2517d61b53ed67901083748c24b2.md) -- Data sources are used to create an import set so that data can be processed, if necessary, prior to being mapped onto a production table.
          - [Create a transform map](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/1a72f329fc2564c3b946b12896111a328af79940.md) -- A transform map is a set of field maps that determine the relationships between fields in an import set and fields in an existing ServiceNow table, such as Incidents [incident] or Users [sys_user].
          - [Add onBefore scripts to the transform map](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/7cb62b6d7efdad01e22f31f7aa93cbb9056391b7.md) -- Create one onBefore transform map script to copy the sys_id of new records from the source to the target instance. Create a second onBefore transform map script to identify records on the target instance that have the same unique values but different sys_id values.
        - [Retrieving data from a CSV formatted file](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/8a82a1666b3a5fa58617ccc82522f799a24cf6c4.md) -- In this method, you import data from another instance using an HTTPS data source to return a CSV formatted file containing the rows to be imported.
    - [Easy import](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d19f7a6166db92c44723839c4381aa6c45c2b45f.md) -- Easy import is a simplified import process that enables you to import only the columns you want.
      - [Download an import template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c3aacb98f8fdd65c90981dfa4943b605143bf0dd.md) -- Select the list you want to import data to and create an import template from that list.
      - [Add a record in the template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d51f23247e1c07fa5b300130d8e916a88df1f316.md) -- Add rows to the template to create new records.
      - [Update a record in the template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/58e10d710f096e829b09c8fd3f8763128255900d.md) -- Modify rows in the template to update existing records.
      - [Import a record from the template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/968c4596a3d255206599ae00e2ce5eb0ad0c4068.md) -- After updating the import template with new data, import the template to your instance.
      - [Show reference fields as lists in Excel templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/3e2a3e152d88e88b0381979016ef1a2918482d3d.md) -- Display selected reference fields as lists in Excel templates to simplify data selection and updates.
      - [Easy import template validation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/df27c7d09604eb343ed00696b01b61c7979aba9e.md) -- Each import template must pass two sets of validation.
        - [Template data validation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/df27c7d09604eb343ed00696b01b61c7979aba9e.md) -- Each import template must pass two sets of validation.
        - [Template type validations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/df27c7d09604eb343ed00696b01b61c7979aba9e.md) -- Each import template must pass two sets of validation.
        - [Data type validations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/df27c7d09604eb343ed00696b01b61c7979aba9e.md) -- Each import template must pass two sets of validation.
      - [Easy import properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/10667cfe8ad9013497166d3ac06a0f16744d4eca.md) -- Several properties control the behavior of easy import.
  - [Exports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/56cdd0c63ff32f7872a0ffab27fbe2ca859be637.md) -- Exports enable you to push data from an instance to an external file. To dynamically export data from a script or web service, export data from the URL.
    - [Export sets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/ee28339370f283f73cfa01e3c2118b86c95e20d7.md) -- Export sets enable you to push data from an instance to an external file.
      - [Create an export set](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9a2a3e8523338a4b3e17acf22dbcd023af4533b7.md) -- Create an export set to export records from your instance to a file on a MID Server.
        - [Create an export set from a list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/b9342c7a9bae8cb2a79f324de17bf47858fc7e5b.md) -- You can quickly create an export set from a list.
      - [Create an export definition](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/028c14fd79c763e45b54c838ad3057a1417084c5.md) -- Create an export definition to define what data to export in an export set.
      - [Create an export target](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/492a0ce0591a8bd8352e8483f95a659945303df1.md) -- Define where to export data to by creating an export target.
        - [Export set supported file types](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/0254f2bdae07b686d84e7210e2bd4d849b78463f.md) -- Export sets support multiple file types for exporting and pushing data.
      - [Schedule an export](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d3782fba0a7cef32a380fe827fe7d0f7acf74442.md) -- You can schedule an export to regularly push data from an export set to a remote destination. By setting up a recurring, scheduled export you are able to regularly push data to an external location, such as for reporting or for preserving a snapshot of the data.
        - [Scheduled export set delta exports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d3782fba0a7cef32a380fe827fe7d0f7acf74442.md) -- You can schedule an export to regularly push data from an export set to a remote destination. By setting up a recurring, scheduled export you are able to regularly push data to an external location, such as for reporting or for preserving a snapshot of the data.
        - [Scheduled export set scripting options](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/d3782fba0a7cef32a380fe827fe7d0f7acf74442.md) -- You can schedule an export to regularly push data from an export set to a remote destination. By setting up a recurring, scheduled export you are able to regularly push data to an external location, such as for reporting or for preserving a snapshot of the data.
      - [Export set history](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/72d82398e3da89d31e91650d4f4285936c42ab44.md) -- An export set history record is automatically created whenever an export set runs, either scheduled or manually started by a user. Export set history records allow you to monitor and troubleshoot the progress of export sets.
        - [Cancel an export set](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/566274838a754c7fd5a15b0d5b028c0d35893063.md) -- You can cancel a running export set to stop the data from being sent to a MID server.
      - [Export Set properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/96ebb41cc43beeca58bcfc2ad1f3a401172b79e7.md) -- Multiple properties control export set behavior.
      - [Parallel exports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/4cdf92043685233c9a9c2da1703916f10724fd04.md) -- Split outgoing data into multiple export sets and process export sets in parallel to reduce processing time.New topic
    - [Export directly from a URL](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/c34bbb3282298ffeb7b6d4b689c8d2f3fe44c2a2.md) -- Dynamically export data from a script or web service by building a URL query.
      - [Call URL export programmatically](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/9f2709c6dddba4cf48611236af414dc7b9a1a6ab.md) -- Dynamically export data from a script or web service by calling a URL export from any programming language.
      - [Break up a large export](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/australia/markdown/governance-risk-compliance/37098dae3260b3abf1d10efae77a58a01f8a919b.md) -- If the number of records to be exported exceeds the actual export limit, you may want to break the export into smaller increments that do not place a significant performance load on the platform.
